2.4: Yusupu nembe aayabwi mwanja bu'ka kukilambo sa Nasaleti kuwilaya ya Galilaya li'nga akabalangilwe. Mwanjaa ywembe aabile mulukolo lwa Daudi, aayi'i kukilambo sa Betelehemu, kunkoa wa Yudea kwaabelekuli nkulungwa Daudi.
2.5: Aayi'i balangilwa pamope na Malia nnwawa ywankobekage, naywembe pamasu'ba go aai ntopelwe.
2.6: Pabaabile kwo, ngaliika lisu'ba lyake lyo komboka.
2.7: Ngakomboka mwana nnalu'me mmele wake, anng'walike tugu'bo twa kyana na kunng'onjeka mukili'lyo sa ng'ombe mwanjaa baapatikeli poogonjo, nyumba ya ageni yai yatwi'la. Asungi na Malaika
2.8: Pandu po paabile na asungi ba ngondolo, babakelekage kilo mumakwabo li'ndi'la myugo yabe.
2.9: Malaika wa Bwana ngaapitya kwa kiimuimu, na bweya wa utukupu wa Bwana ngawamulikya pu'pu'lu'. Baatiyogopa muno.
2.10: Malaika ngaabakia, “Kanemuyogope! Ninnetyangite abali inannoga yo napusika muno, yailu'a kwapata bandu boti.
2.11: Mwanjaa li'no pansengo wa Daudi abelikwe Nkosopoli, abelikwe kwa kitumbu sinu mwenga nga Kilisitu Bwana.
2.12: Na wu'no walu'a panga mwanju kasinu, panga mukankwemba mwana kilekeleke banng'walike ngu'bo ya kyana banng'onjike mukili'lyo sa ng'ombe.”
2.13: Popopo lipi'nga lya malaika ba kunani ngalilu'mbana na aywo malaika kabannumba Nnu'ngu' kababaya,
2.14: “Utukupu kwa Nnu'ngu' kunani, na amani padunia kwa bandu baapendi ywembe.”
2.15: Bu'ka pabaabu'i abo malaika buyangania kunani, asungi ngababakiana, “Tuyende nswaa mpaka ku Betelehemu tukalibone likowe li' lyatubakie Bwana.”
2.16: Bai, baayi'i kwo talima, ngabaakwemba Malia, Yusupu, na yu'lu' mwana kilekeleke banng'onjike mukili'lyo sa ng'ombe.
2.17: Abo asungi pabaamweni mwana ywo, ngabaabakia bandu boti makowe gabagayu'wine bu'kana na aywo mwana.
2.18: Boti pabayu'wine go, baatisangala bu'kana na makowe gababakiyilwe na asungi.
2.19: Lakini Malia aagabi'i mumwoyo wake goti no gania.
2.20: Balu' asungi, baabuyangani kasabe ku'no kabankwi'ya Nnu'ngu' no lumba uku'lu' wake kwa goti gabaagayu'wine na kugabona, gabi kati mwabaabakiyilwe. Mwana atinilwa lina
2.21: Pagapite masu'ba manane bu'ka belekwa, lisu'ba lya kumwina liku'mbi' mwana, bantinike lina lyake Yesu. Lina lyo aatinilwe na malaika masu'ba ata ndumbo ya mwana we anayi'mali. Yesu abi'ki'lwa nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu'
2.22: Pagaikite masu'ba go peleteyelwa Yusupu na Malia kati mwaipalilwage na salya ya Musa, abelei bo bampu'twi mwana no yenda nakwe ku Yelusalemu li'nga bampiye kwa Nnu'ngu'.
2.23: Musalya ya Bwana Nnu'ngu' iandikilwe, “Kila mwana mmele nnalu'me abaulilwe kwa Bwana.”
2.24: Kai', baayi'i li'nga bapiye salaka ndutu abi'li' au mabunda gabi'li' ga ngunda, kati mwaipalikwage musalya ya Bwana.
2.25: Pamasu'ba go akwo Yelusalemu, kwai na mundu yumo mwene aki na kunkilikitya Nnu'ngu' lina lyake akemelwage Simioni, ywembe ali'ndage kwa kilu'lu' kosopolelwa kwa Isilaili. Loo Mpeleteu aabile pamope nakwe.
2.26: Loo Mpeleteu aamumukuli panga kiwo kinkolyali pangali kummona Kilisitu wa Bwana, Nkulungwa ywalondolilwe.
2.27: Bai, kalongoyelwa na Loo Mpeleteu, Simioni aayingi mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'. Abelei ba Yesu pabannetike mwana wabe mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', bampangi kati mwaipalikwage na salya,
2.28: Simioni aampoki mwana Yesu mumaboko gake ku'no kankwi'ya Nnu'ngu', kabaya,
2.29: “Nambi'yambi' Bwana utimisike malagano gako, unnyi'ki'ti'ye ntumisi wako ayende kwa amani.
2.30: Maana kwa minyo gangu' niubweni ukosopoli wauuletike
2.31: waubi'i wiso ubonekane na mili'ma yoti.
2.32: Bweya wawaalu'a kwamulikya bandu ba panja, na utukupu kwa bandu bako Isilaili.”
2.33: Tati' na mau' bake Yesu baatisangala kwa makowe gaalongei Simioni kwa abali ya mwana.
2.34: Simioni aatikwayalya, ammakie Malia mau' bake, “Mwana yu' alu'a panga kitumbu so oba no kosopolelwa kwa bandu baingi mu Isilaili. Nembe alu'a panga kati mwanju wo kanilwa na bandu,
2.35: li'nga gabagania bandu baingi kwo iya gaumukulwe. Na wenga wamwene, lwu'ngu' lwalubile kati lipanga linola lwalu'a kuoma pamwoyo wako.”
2.36: Kwaabile na nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu' nnwawa nng'oi muno lina lyake Ana, biti Fanueli wa kabila lya Asheli. Bu'ka ku'nda, aatami na nsengowe myaka saba bai.
2.37: Kai', aatami wangali nnalu'me mpaka paikiye upi'ndo wa myaka samanini na nsese. Nsimu awo woti, aatami palua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' kwo punga no lu'ba kilo na muntwekati.
2.38: Popopo ngaisa Ana na kunnumba Nnu'ngu' no baya makowe ga mwana ywo kwa bandu boti babalolelage kombolelwa kwa Yelusalemu. Buyangania ku Nasaleti
2.39: Abo abelei pabaayomwi panga goti gagaamulilwe na salya ya Bwana, baabuyangani kasabe Nasaleti, kuwilaya ya Galilaya.
2.40: Mwana ngaku'la, aayendeli pata makakala, aatwi'li ikima na ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu' yaai pamope nakwe. Mwana Yesu palua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'
2.41: Abelei bake baai na salya yo yenda ku Yelusalemu kila mwaka masu'ba ga si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Pasika.
2.42: Mwana paikiye myaka ku'mi na ibi'li', baayi'i boti kati mwaibile salya yabe ya kila mwaka.
2.43: Paiyomwike si'li'ku'si'li'ku', baatumbwi mwanja wo buyangania kasabe, lakini Yesu aaigali ku Yelusalemu wangali abelei bake tanga panga bannei nsu'gu'.
2.44: Bembe bawasage aalongwaniye na lipi'nga lya babalongolile. Baayi'i mwanja wa kutwa banammonali, ngabatumbwa kumpala mwababile alongo na mambwiga.
2.45: Pabakotwike kummona baabuyangani ku Yelusalemu kumpala.
2.46: Lisu'ba lyenetatu ngabankwemba mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', atami pakatikati ya balimu ba salya, kaapi'kani'a na kwalaluya maswali.
2.47: Boti babannyu'wine makowe gake baagasangalike malango gake na mu'lu' mwayangwae kwa ikima.
2.48: Abelei bake pabaamweni, baatisangala. Malia mau' bake ngabannaluya, “Wamwana wangu', mwanjaa namani utupangite nyo? Tati' bako na nenga twendekupala, malango gaatuobike.”
2.49: Ywembe ngayangwa, “Mwanjaa namani munipalage? Mwatangikeli panga, nipalilwa tama munyumba ya Tati' bangu'?”
2.50: Lakini abelei bake baatangiteli makowe go galombolya namani.
2.51: Bai, baabuyangine nakwe mpaka ku Nasaleti, na apeyage isima yabe yoti. Mau' bake baagabi'kite makowe ago goti pamwoyo wabe.
2.52: Nembe Yesu aayendeli ku'la kimalango na kyi'mo, no pendelwa na Nnu'ngu' na bandu.

3.1: Mwaka wa ku'mi na tano waatawalage Kaisali Tibelio, Pontio Pilato atawalage kunkoa wa Yudea. Helode atawalage Galilaya na nnunawe Pilipi atawalage pakilambo sa Itulea na Tulakoniti. Lusania atawalage Abilene.
3.2: Anasi na Kayafa baai api'ndo aku'lu' ba dini. Pamasu'ba go, likowe lya Nnu'ngu' ngalimwisilya Yoani mwana wa Zakalia ku'lu' kulubele.
3.3: Bai, Yoani ngayenda muilambo yoti yaipakine na libi'ndi' lya Yordani. Kaabakia bandu boti bagalambuke, bammuyangani Nnu'ngu' no batisilwa, li'nga aabu'ki'ye masambi gabe.
3.4: Ngamo iandikilwe mukitabu sa nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu' Isaya, “Lilobe lya mundu akema kulubele, mumpetuli Bwana ndi'la yake, mugolwe simbasimba yake.
3.5: Mabi'ndi' goti gaalu'a kulilwa, kila kitu'mbi' na litu'mbi' yaalu'a pwimwanilwa no yanjayilwa, papapi'ndike, paalu'a gololelwa. Mali'la gangapetwa, gaalu'a petulwa.
3.6: Na bandu boti baalu'a kuubona ukosopoli wauleta Nnu'ngu'.”
3.7: Bai, Yoani aabakiage bandu baingi babaaisile li'nga aabatise kabaya, “Mwenga mwa kinng'ambo, nyai ywanking'indile mwitile nyongo yayaisa?
3.8: Mulaye kwa itendo yinu panga mummuyangani Nnu'ngu' kwo kana buyangania sambi. Kanemutumbwe kwipuna, ‘Twenga twa bana ba Bulaimu.’ Nimmakianga kakape panga, Nnu'ngu' akombwa kugagalambwa maliwe gamugabona gapange bana ba Bulaimu.
3.9: Bai, libago libi'kilwe paliina lya nkongo kwa nyo, kila nkongo wangali pambika itunda inannoga waalu'a pi'ngu'lwa no sonjelwa mwoto.”
3.11: Aayangwi, “Ywabile na ngu'bo ibi'li' ampei mwene buula, na ywabile na kilyo apange nyinyonyo.”
3.12: Nabembe alonga koli ngabaisa li'nga babatisilwe ngabannaluya, “Mwalimu, tupange buli?”
3.13: Nembe ngayangwa, “Kanemwabonele bandu kwa kwaalonga koli pi'ta yi'lu' yaibi'kilwe na silikali.”
3.14: Nabembe asikali ngabannaluya, “Na twenga tupange buli?” Nembe ngayangwa, “Kanemupokonywe kikowe sa mundu ywoywoti kwa makakala, wala kunsitakya mundu kwa likosa lya kunku'pi'ki'a. Inni'ngane mikwiso yamuli'pi'lwa.”
3.15: Boti baai na kikowe sabakipi'kaniage, baai ngabatumbwa kwilaluya kumyoyo yabe kwa abali ya Yoani panga kwaali' ywembe nga Kilisitu ywabayilwe.
3.16: Apo, Yoani ngaabakia boti, “Nenga nimmatisanga kwa masi', nsu'gu' yangu' aisa mwene uweso kulikoni nenga, aywo nenga nipwaikali ata undwana kamba ya ilatu yake. Ywembe alu'a kummatisanga kwa Loo Mpeleteu na kwa mwoto.
3.17: Ywembe aabile na kyelo mumaboko gake, so pepekeya ilalyo akaimati muliku'ngwa paligu'lu, na mayu'ngu'lu'lu' akagatiniye kumwoto wangali imika.”
3.18: Kwa nyo, pamope na gaayi'ganage maingi, Yoani aakong'ondeli bandu kaabakia abali inannoga.
3.19: Lakini Yoani ankalipi ntawala Helode, kwa kitumbu sa kuntola Helodia nnyumbo wa nnunawe na kumpanga nnyumbowe, na ankalipi kwa ulau woti waupangite.
3.20: Kai', Helode aayongiye ulau kwa kunnyingia Yoani muutabilwe. Yesu endabatisilwa
3.21: Bandu boti pabayomwi batisilwa, nembe Yesu aatibatisilwa. Na Yesu paasalyage, kunani kwatiyu'gu'ka.
3.22: Na apo, ngapaulukilwa na Loo Mpeleteu ywabile na uyi'me wa ngunda. Lilobe lyayu'wanike bu'ka kunani, “Wenga nga wamwana wangu' wanikupendile, ninogelilwe nawenga.” Lukolo lwa Yesu
3.23: Yesu paatumbwi tanganikwa na bandu kwa lyengo lyake, aabile na myaka salasini, na bandu bakitage panga ywembe mwana wa Yusupu, mwana wa Heli.
3.24: Heli abi mwana wa Matathia, ywabile mwana wa Lawi, mwana wa Melki, mwana wa Yanai, mwana wa Yusupu.
3.25: Ywaabile mwana wa Matathia, mwana wa Amosi, mwana wa Nahumu, mwana wa Esli, mwana wa Nagai.
3.26: Ywaabile mwana wa Maathi, mwana wa Matathia, mwana wa Shemeni, mwana wa Yoseki, mwana wa Yuda.
3.27: Ywaabile mwana wa Yohanani, mwana wa Lesa, mwana wa Zelubabeli, Zelubabeli aai mwana wa Shealtieli, Shealtieli ai mwana wa Neli,
3.28: mwana wa Melki, Melki aai mwana wa Adi, mwana wa Kosamu, Kosamu aai mwana wa Elmadamu, ywaabile mwana wa Eli.
3.29: Ywaabile mwana wa Yoshua, mwana wa Eliezeli, mwana wa Yolimu, mwana wa Mathati, mwana wa Lawi,
3.30: Ywaabile mwana wa Simioni, mwana wa Yuda, mwana wa Yusupu, mwana wa Yonamu, mwana wa Eliakimu.
3.31: Ywaabile mwana wa Melea, mwana wa Mena, mwana wa Matatha, mwana wa Nathani, mwana wa Daudi.
3.32: Ywaabile mwana wa Yese, mwana wa Obedi, mwana wa Boazi, mwana wa Salmoni, mwana wa Nashoni.
3.33: Ywaabile mwana wa Aminadabu, mwana wa Admini, mwana wa Alani, ywabile mwana wa Esiloni, mwana wa Pelesi, mwana wa Yuda.
3.34: Ywaabile mwana wa Yakobi, mwana wa Isaki, mwana wa Bulaimu, mwana wa Tela, mwana wa Naholi.
3.35: Ywaabile mwana wa Selugia, mwana wa Leu, mwana wa Pelegi, mwana wa Ebeli, mwana wa Sala.
3.36: Ywaabile mwana wa Kainamu, mwana wa Alfaksadi, mwana wa Shemu, mwana wa Nuu, mwana wa Lameki.
3.37: Ywaabile mwana wa Methusela, mwana wa Henoki, mwana wa Yaledi, mwana wa Mahalaleli, mwana wa Kenani.
3.38: Ywaabile mwana wa Enoshi, mwana wa Sethi, mwana wa Adamu, ywaabile ywa Nnu'ngu'.

4.1: Yesu abu'i mulibi'ndi' lya Yordani ai ntwi'lya Loo Mpeleteu. Ngalongoyelwa na Loo mpaka kulubele,
4.2: akwo aapayilwe na Ibilisi kwa masu'ba alubaini, masu'ba ago goti aalileli kili'be. Paliikite lisu'ba lya alubaini ngaimminya njala.
4.3: Apo Ibilisi ngammakia, “Wenga manautei wa mwana wa Nnu'ngu' ulibakie liwe li' lipange likati.”
4.4: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Iandikilwe, ‘Mundu alamali kwa likati bai, ila kwa kila liyi'gi'yo lyalibu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu'.’ ”
4.5: Bu'kapo Ibilisi ngampeleka mpaka pandu patu'ndu'bau na kunnaya ukulungwa woti wa padunia. Ibilisi ngammakia,
4.6: “Naakupeya uweso wa kulungwa yoti yi', kwa mwanjaa ayi' yoti nitipeyelwa na mana nipendi kumpeya mundu nendakombwa.
4.7: Bai, mana wanikilikitya ayi' yoti yapanga mali yako wenga.”
4.8: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Iandikilwe, ‘Unkilikiti Bwana Nnu'ngu' wako, na kuntumikia ywembe bai.’ ”
4.9: Ibilisi ngampu'twa mpaka ku Yelusalemu, panani ya Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' ngammakia, “Manaitei wenga nga wamwana wa Nnu'ngu', witu'mbu'ye pai',
4.10: kwa mwanjaa iandikilwe, ‘Aabakia malaika bake bakuli'ndi'le,’
4.11: na kai', ‘Baakupu'twa mumoko gabe, li'nga wakanekunywa magu'lu' gako muliwe.’ ”
4.12: Lakini Yesu ngannyangwa, “Iandikilwe, ‘Kaneumpaye Bwana Nnu'ngu' wako.’ ”
4.13: Ibilisi paibweni ampayike kwa kila ndi'la, nganneka kwa kumpelemba. Yesu atumbwa lyengo lyake ku Galilaya (Mat 4:12-17, Mal 1:14-15)
4.14: Apo Yesu ngaki'li'bu'kya ku Galilaya ai ntwi'lya makakala ga Loo Mpeleteu na makowe gake gayu'wanike muilambo yoti ya papipi.
4.15: Naywembe aai kayi'gana mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', ngalumbilwa na bandu boti. Yesu akanilwa ku Nasaleti (Mat 13:53-58, Mal 6:1-6)
4.16: Bai, Yesu ngayenda ku Nasaleti, pandu paalelilwe, na lisu'ba lya Sabato kwa Ayahudi aayingi munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' kati mwayabile mimu yake. Ngayi'ma li'nga asome Maandiko Mapeleteu kwa lilobe.
4.17: Ngapokya kitabu sa nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu' Isaya, ngakiumukwa na kupakolya pandu papaandikilwe,
4.18: “Loo wa Bwana ai panani yangu', aniyi'mike mwene li'nga naleti aki'ba abali inannoga. Anitumike naatangasili atabilwe yu'gu'li'lwa kwabe na kimbulibuli bapate lola kai' anitumike nakombwe bababonelwa,
4.19: no tangasa mwaka wa Bwana wo yaliwa bandu ngu'ngu' yake.”
4.20: Payomwi soma, ngakiwi'ki'lya si'lu' kitabu na kumpeya ntumisi, bu'kapo ngatama. Bandu boti ngabammu'nju'lya minyo.
4.22: Boti baatinapusika, munomuno baatisangala kwa makowe manogau gaagalongei. Ngabalaluyana, “Ayu' ka ngamwana wa Yusupu?”
4.23: Nembe ngaabakia, “Nitangite mulu'a nibakia nnongelo gu', ‘Wa nng'anga witepwe wamwene.’ Kai' mwabaya, ‘Goti gatugayu'wine ugapangite ku'lu' ku Kapernaumu, ugapange kai' pano pakilambo sako.’ ”
4.25: Pi'kani, kwai na alwawa awi'li'ka baingi ku Isilaili nsimu wa Elia, kai' kwai na njala ngu'lu' munni'ma woti kwa mwanjaa aanileli ula kwa myaka itatu na nusu.
4.26: Ata nyo, Elia atumilweli kwa nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa ywoywoti ila kwa nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa ywa ku Salepta nni'ma wa ku Sidoni.
4.27: Kai' ku Isilaili nsimu wa Elisha kwaabile na bene matana baingi. Ata nyo, ntu'pu' nywapeleteyilwe ila Naamani mwenekaya wa ku Silia.”
4.28: Boti babaabile mu'lu' munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' pabagayu'wine galu', baatiusika muno.
4.29: Ngabayi'ma na kumpikia panja ya kilambo sabe na kumpeleka panani ya kitu'mbi', li'nga bantaikuli pai' bu'ka mungeleuko.
4.30: Lakini Yesu ngapi'ta pakatikati yabe no bu'ka. Mundu mwene moka (Mal 1:12-28)
4.31: Bu'kapo Yesu ngaelya mpaka ku Kapernaumu kuwilaya ya Galilaya, ngaba kayi'gana bandu lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi.
4.32: Ngabasangala uweso wabile nawo muuyi'gani, kwa mwanjaa ayi'ganage kwa amuli.
4.33: Na mu'lu' munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' kwabile na mundu ywalobi moka, aapangite lwengele lwoiba na makutu kakemelya,
4.34: “Ubile na ki'li' na twenga, wenga wa Yesu wa ku Nasaleti? Buli uisi kutulangamisa? Nikutangite wenga wanyai. Wenga nga wa Mpeleteu mwene makakala ga Nnu'ngu'!”
4.35: Yesu ngankalipya aywo moka kabaya, “Ndu'ti! Ummu'ke mundu yu'!” Bai, aywo moka ngantu'ya pai' yu'lu' mundu na kummu'ka wangali kunsulu ata pasene.
4.36: Bandu boti ngabasangala, ngababakiana, “Ali' likowe lyayambi' mwanjaa kwa uweso na makakala ammakia moka bu'ka naywembe endabu'ka!”
4.37: Makowe ga Yesu gatiyu'wanika muilambo yoti ya nni'ma gu'lu'. Yesu endakwatepwa bandu baingi (Mat 8:14-17, Mal 1:29-34)
4.38: Yesu pabu'i mu'lu' munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', ngayenda kasake Simoni. Mau' yumo nkiwe Simoni, aai na oma ngali' ngabannu'ba antepwe.
4.39: Yesu ngaisa no yi'ma papipi nakwe, ngaikalipya yi'lu' oma, ngayu'yu'ki'lwa. Yu'lu' mau' ngakakatuka popopo na kwatumikia.
4.40: Lisu'ba palipilyage, boti babaabile na atamwe ba matamwe mbali'mbali', baatikunnetya. Naywembe aabi'kite maboko gake panani ya kila mundu, ngaatepwa boti.
4.41: Moka gaatikwabu'ka bandu baingi, ngagakemelya kagabaya, “Wenga nga wa Mwana wa Nnu'ngu'!” Lakini Yesu nga gakalipya wala aagayi'ki'tiyeli longela, kwa mwanjaa gaatangite panga ywembe nga Kilisitu ywabayilwe.
4.42: Ata pakusile Yesu aatibu'ka yenda pandu pakisake, kipi'nga sa bandu ngakimpala. Pabaamweni, ngabapaya kunkanikiya li'nga kaneabu'ke kasabe.
4.43: Lakini Yesu ngaabakia, “Nipalikwa kwaalya abali inannoga ya Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' mumili'ma yi'ngi', kwa mwanjaa nitumilwe kwa go.”
4.44: Bai, aai kaala ku Yudea mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'.

5.1: Lisu'ba limo, Yesu aayi'mi mbwega ya litanda liku'lu' lya Genesaleti, na bandu baingi baatikunti'li'ta no patigana kabapi'kania liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'.
5.2: Apo Yesu ngaibona ngalaba ibi'li', mbwega ya litanda liku'lu'. Alopoli bene bai pambwega kabagu'lwa mbi'li'li' yabe.
5.3: Yesu ngayingya mungalaba yimo yayaabile ya Simoni, na kumpala aiekekeye mumasi' pasene kuutalu na mbwega ya litanda liku'lu'. Ngatama no yi'gana lipi'nga lya bandu ku'no abile mungalaba.
5.4: Payomwi yi'gana ngammakia Simoni, “Uendelese ngalaba mpaka papayendekiye, na mukatumbukiye mbi'li'li' yinu li'nga mulobe omba.”
5.5: Simoni ngannyangwa, “Mpi'ndo, tutikeleka kilo soti loba lakini tupatikeli kili'be, ila mwanjaa ulongei wenga niyenda tumbukia.”
5.6: Pabaatumbukiye mbi'li'li' yabe, ngabaloba omba bambone, mpaka mbi'li'li' yabe kaitumbwa kutwanika.
5.7: Ngabaakema ayabe ba mungalaba yi'ngi', li'nga sabaayangatiye. Ngabaisa no twi'li'ya omba ngalaba yoti ibi'li', ngaipala swika kwo topa.
5.8: Simoni Petili paagabweni go, ngakilikita nnu'ngi' ya Yesu na kummakia, “Bwana, ubu'ke nnu'ngi' yangu', kwa mwanjaa nenga namwene sambi.”
5.9: Simoni na aine boti baatisangala pata omba banansima kati balu'.
5.10: Yakobi na Yoani, bana ba Zebedayo, baai alobi aine Simoni. Yesu ngammakia Simoni, “Kaneuyogope, bu'ka nambi'yambi' ulu'a loba bandu.”
5.11: Ngabaleta ngalaba mbwega ya litanda liku'lu' ngabakileka kila kili'be, na kunki'ngama. Yesu antepwa mwene matana (Mat 8:1-4, Mal 1:40-45)
5.12: Yesu paabile pakilambo simo sa nni'ma wo, ngakwembana na mundu mwene matana yi'ga yoti. Mundu ywo ngagonja ukukama na kunnu'ba Yesu, “Bwana mana upendile, wendakombwa kunipeletea.”
5.13: Yesu, ngagoloya luboko, ngankunywa no baya, “Mbala, upeleteke!” Popopo matana gake ngagammu'ka.
5.14: Yesu ngammakia, “Kaneummakie mundu ywoywoti, ila uyende ukailaye kwa mpi'ndo ywa dini, na ukapiye salaka kwo peleteka kwako kati mwaabaite Musa no panga kakape upeletike.”
5.15: Lakini makowe ga Yesu gaayendeli yu'waanika kila pandu. Ipi'nga ya bandu yaatikongolekana kumpi'kania no tepulwa matamwe gabe.
5.16: Lakini ywembe aayi'i pandu pakisake, no lu'ba Nnu'ngu'. Yesu antepwa mundu ywatombolwike (Mat 9:1-8, Mal 2:1-12)
5.17: Lisu'ba limo Yesu kaayi'gana, Mafalisayo na balimu ba salya bu'ka kila kilambo sa ku Galilaya, ku Yudea na ku Yelusalemu baatami po. Makakala ga Bwana gabi pamope nakwe li'nga kwatepwa atamwe.
5.18: Ngabaisa bandu bampu'twile mumasela mundu ywatombolwike yi'ga. Bapalage kunnyingiya nnyumba li'nga bammi'ke nnu'ngi' ya Yesu.
5.19: Bu'kana no yoloka kwa bandu, baakombwili kunnyingiya nnyumba, ngabaamwa bau'bu'ke pamwagala, no bu'ya iyonjo yabayipile na kumwuluya mumasela nnu'ngi' ya Yesu,
5.20: Yesu paabweni bai na imani ngu'lu', ngammakia aywo mundu, “Mbwiga, masambi gako usamilwe.”
5.21: Balimu ba salya na Mafalisayo ngabailaluya, “Ayu' nyai ywalongela mayi'gi'yo ga kupulu? Ntu'pu' mundu ywakombwa samya sambi, ila Nnu'ngu' kisake!”
5.22: Yesu wakwipwi gabagania ngaalaluya, “Mugania ki'li' mumyoyo yinu?
5.23: Lyaku' lyalibile liyu'yu'u muno baya, ‘Usamilwe sambi,’ au baya, ‘Yi'ma uyende’?
5.24: Bai, mbala mutange panga Mwana wa Mundu abile na amuli yo samya bandu sambi padunia.” Apo ngammakia yu'lu' mundu ywatombolwike, “Nikubakia, uyi'me utole masela gako uyende kasako.”
5.25: Bu'kapo, yu'lu' mundu ywatombolwike ngayi'ma nnu'ngi' yabe boti, ngatola saagonjelile no yenda kasake, ku'no kankwi'ya Nnu'ngu'.
5.26: Boti batisangala no gania ngabankwi'ya Nnu'ngu' kababaya, “Tugabweni makowe gayambi' li'no.” Lawi akemelwa abe mwanamasi' (Mat 9:9-13, Mal 2:13-17)
5.27: Bu'ka pa go, Yesu aapitike panja, ngammona nnonga koli yumo ywakemelwage Lawi, atami palyengo lyake. Yesu ngammakia, “Uniki'ngame.”
5.29: Lawi aampangi Yesu si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ngu'lu' kasake. Na lipi'nga liku'lu' lya alonga koli na bandu baingi babaabile po, baatami nabo pamope.
5.30: Mafalisayo na balimu ba salya, baaku'ku'li'ki banamasi' bake kababaya, “Kwa ki'li' mulya no nywa pamope na alonga koli na bene sambi?”
5.31: Yesu ngaayangwa, “Akoti bampalali nng'anga, babampala nng'anga balu' bababile atamwe.
5.32: Niisili kwakema bandu anogau ila bene sambi li'nga bammuyangani Nnu'ngu'.” Makowe go punga (Mat 9:14-17, Mal 2:18-22)
5.33: Bandu bi'ngi' ngabammakia, “Banamasi' ba Yoani Ywabatisage bakokotyage punga no lu'ba, ata apwasi ba Mafalisayo bapanga nyinyonyo. Lakini banamasi' bako bendalya no nywa.”
5.34: Yesu ngayangwa, “Balu' babakokilwe kulisengele bapalikwa punga ku'no mwene lisengele babile nakwe pamope? Lili!
5.35: Lakini nsimu walu'a isa, wobu'yi'lwa mwene lisengele kasabe, na nsimu wo, ngabaalu'a punga.”
5.36: Yesu ngaabakia lukongo lu'no, “Bandu bapapwali kibamba sa ngu'bo yayambi' na kukibi'ka mungu'bo ngonaa. Mana bapangite nyo, ngu'bo yo yanogelyali. Kai', yapanga bapapwi ngu'bo yayambi'.
5.37: Kai' bandu bayi'yali kinywo sa njabibu yayambi' mumapondo maumala, kwa mwanjaa aso kinywo sayambi' salu'a kanja mapondo go, kinywo salu'a yitanika na, mapondo gaalabika.
5.38: Kinywo sa njabibu yayambi', kiyi'yi'lwa mumapondo gayambi'.
5.39: Ntu'pu' mundu ywaminyikia nywa kinywo sa njabibu yayambi' bu'ka po nywa kinywo sa njabibu ngona, maana ibayilwa yi'lu' ngona nga inannoga muno.”

6.1: Lisu'ba limo lya Sabato ya Ayahudi Yesu paabile kapi'ta mumigunda ya ngano, banamasi' bake baatumbwi ti'kwana no ting'anda yeyo ya ngano li'nga balye nombo yake.
6.2: Mafalisayo baingi ngabaalaluya, “Mboni mupanga makowe gagakanilwa na salya kulisu'ba lya Sabato?”
6.3: Yesu ngaayangwa, “Munasomali mwaapangite Daudi na aine pabaabile na njala?
6.4: Ywembe aayingi mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', no tola galu' makati gagabi'kilwe nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu', lya na kwapeya aine. Yatikanilwa mundu lya makati galu' ila api'ndo ba dini bai.”
6.5: Apo ngaabakia, “Mwana wa Mundu nga Bwana wa Sabato.” Mundu mwene luboko lutomboloka (Mat 12:9-14, Mal 3:1-6)
6.6: Lisu'ba li'ngi' lya Sabato ya Ayahudi, Yesu aayingi munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' no yi'gana. Mu'lu', mwaabile na mundu ywalemile luboko lwa mmalyo.
6.7: Balimu ba salya na Mafalisayo bapalage kitumbu sakunsitakya Yesu, kwa nyo baatikumpekeseni bannole mana alu'a kuntepwa mundu lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi.
6.8: Lakini Yesu aatangite mwabaganiage, ngammakia yu'lu' mwene luboko lutomboloka, “Kakatuka, uyi'me pakatikati yabe.” Ngayenda no yi'ma.
6.9: Yesu ngaabakia, “Ninnaluya mwenga, lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi nantali panga makowe manogau au ganannyata, tepwa au bulaga?”
6.10: Paaloi boti bababile palu' ngammakia yu'lu' mundu, “Goloya luboko lwako.” Naywembe paapangite nyo, luboko lwake lwapangite lukoti kai'.
6.11: Lakini bembe baatiusika muno ngabalaluyana, lyakau lyaku' lyakumpangya Yesu. Yesu asawa banamasi' ku'mi na abi'li' (Mat 10:1-4, Mal 3:13-19)
6.12: Lisu'ba limo Yesu aayi'i lu'ba Nnu'ngu' kukitu'mbi', aakelike sekesekembe.
6.13: Pamalau' ngaakema banamasi' bake, na nkati yabe ngabawa bandu ku'mi na abi'li' abo ngaakema atumilwe,
6.14: Simoni (ywaatinilwe na Yesu lina lya Petili) na Andelea nnunawe, Yakobi na Yoani, Pilipi na Batolomayo,
6.15: Matei, Tomasi, Yakobi wa Alufayo na Simoni wa kipi'nga sa Mazeloti,
6.16: Yuda ywa Yakobi, na Yuda Isikalioti ywaansongi Yesu. Yesu endayi'gana no tepwa bandu (Mat 4:23-25)
6.17: Yesu aalongwaniye na banamasi' bake kaelya bu'ka kukitu'mbi', aayi'mi pandu pankanya. Apo pai na lipi'nga liku'lu' lya banamasi' bake na bandu baingi bababu'i lwingo lwoti lwa Yudea, Yelusalemu, kumbwani ya Tilo na Sidoni. Boti baisi kumpi'kania Yesu no tepulwa matamwe gabe.
6.18: Aatepwi boti, kai' aatepwi na babaauyilwage na moka.
6.19: Bandu boti bapalage bankunywe, kwa mwanjaa nkati yake gapitage makakala ga kwatepwa boti. Nantali na kibona (Mat 5:1-12)
6.20: Yesu ngaagalambukya banamasi' bake ngabaya, “Nantali mwenga mwamile mwaki'ba, kwa mwanjaa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' winu.
6.21: Nantali mwenga mwamuminya njala nambi'yambi', kwa mwanjaa mwalu'a yukuta. Nantali mwenga mwamuli'la nambi'yambi', kwa mwanjaa mwalu'a eka.
6.22: “Nantali mwenga mwamusukilwa na bandu, mwamubaulwa, mwamui'mbu'lwa, no linyatia lina linu kwa mwanjaa ya Mwana wa Mundu.
6.23: Pagaapita ago goti mwanapusike no u'mbau'mba, kwa mwanjaa upo yinu ngu'lu' ibile kunani. Kwa mwanjaa api'ndo babe baapangile alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' nyinyonyo.
6.24: Lakini mwakibona mwenga mwamatayili, kwa mwanjaa mupatike upo yinu.
6.25: Mwakibona mwenga mwamuyukuta nambi'yambi', kwa mwanjaa mwalu'a minya njala palu'ngi'. Mwakibona mwenga mwamweka kwo napusika nambi'yambi', kwa mwanjaa mwalu'a li'la no lombola.
6.26: Mwakibona mwenga mwamulumbilwa na bandu boti, kwa mwanjaa api'ndo babe baapangi alondoli ba ubu'su' nyinyonyo.” Kwapenda andumu (Mat 5:38-48, 7:12)
6.27: “Lakini nimmakianga mwenga mwamunipi'kania, mwapende andumu binu, na mwapangi manogau babansukwanga.
6.28: Mwalu'bi makowe manogau balu' babannosa na mwalu'bi balu' babampangya ulau.
6.29: Mundu mana akuku'mbwi ligomo limo ung'alambukiye na linebi'li'. Mundu mana akupokonywi likoti lyako unneki na kiyampani sako.
6.30: Ywoywoti ywakulu'ba wampei na mundu mana akupokonywi kili'be sako kaneunnonge kukuki'li'bu'ki'ya.
6.31: Mwamupala bandu bampangi mwenga, nabembe mwapangi nyinyonyo.
6.32: “Mana mwaalu'a kwapenda babampendile, mwenga mwalu'a pata upo yaku'? Ntu'pu', kwa mwanjaa ata bene sambi baapenda babaapendile.
6.33: Kai' mana mwapangi manogau balu' babampangi manogau, mwalu'a pata upo yaku'? Kwa mwanjaa ata bene sambi bapanga gogogo.
6.34: Na mana kamwapeya ngu'ta balu' bamwu'bi'lya kunni'pya, mwapata upo yaku'? Kwa mwanjaa ata bene sambi baapeya ayabe li'nga baki'li'bu'ki'yi'lwe si'si'lu'si'lu'.
6.35: Ila mwenga mwapende andumu binu na kwapangya manogau, mwapei ngu'ta wangau'bi'lya ki'li'bu'ki'yi'lwa na upo yinu yapanga ngu'lu', namwe mwapanga mwabana ba Nnu'ngu' ywa kunani. Kwa mwanjaa ywembe nnogau kwa kingasukulu na bababile alau.
6.36: Mube na kiya kati Tati' binu mwababile na kiya. Makowe ga kwaukumu bi'ngi' (Mat 7:1-5)
6.37: “Kanemwaukumu bi'ngi', na mwenga mwaukumilwali na Nnu'ngu'. Kanemwabi'ki bi'ngi' lukoolo, namwenga mwabi'ki'lwali lukoolo na Nnu'ngu'. Mwasami bi'ngi', namwenga mwasamilwa na Nnu'ngu'.
6.38: Mwapei bandu ili'be yabapala na mwenga Nnu'ngu' ampeya, mwapokya kili'ngo satwi'la no indilya, tikyatikya ika no yitanika. Kwa mwanjaa kili'ngo sososo samwaali'ngya, nga samwaali'ngi'lwa na Nnu'ngu'.”
6.39: Ngaabakia lukongo, “Mbulibuli endakombwa kunnongoya ndi'la mbulibuli nnyine? Lili, boti abi'li' baalu'a tumbukya mulyi'mbwa.
6.40: Mwanamasi' ampi'tali mwalimu wake, lakini mwanamasi' ywayitagile ngaywaba kati mwalimu wake.
6.41: Mwanjaa buli ukibona kielenje muliyo lya nnyino na lubago lwa muliyo lyako ulubonali?
6.42: Au ukombwabuli kummakia nnyino, ‘Nnyangu', nileka nikubu'ye kielenje sakibile muliyo lyako’, na wamwene lubile lubago muliyo lyako? Wammu'su'bu'su', ulubu'ye wi'ti' lubago lwa muliyo lyako, ngaummu'ye nnyino. Mundu atanganikwa kwa makowe gake (Mat 7:16-20, 12:33-35)
6.43: “Nkongo unannoga upambikali itunda inannyata wala nkongo unannyata upambikali itunda inannoga.
6.44: Bandu bautanga nkongo bu'kana na itunda yake, itanganikwe panga, bandu batu'mbwali tini wala njabibu mumimimwa.
6.45: Mundu nnogau apiya manogau gagabile mumwoyo wake, na mundu nnau apiya malau gagabile mumwoyo wake. Kwa nyo, nkano wa mundu ulongela gagabile mumwoyo wake. Asengi ba ngolo ibi'li' (Mat 7:24-27)
6.46: “Kwa mwanjaa buli munikema, ‘Bwana, Bwana,’ ku'no kamukana panga ganimmakianga?
6.47: Nilu'a kumpeyanga lukongo lu'no lwa mundu ywaisa kasangu' kugayu'wa makowe gangu' na kugapanga.
6.48: Aywo alandana na mundu ywasenga nyumba kwo i'mbi'ya mpaka mumpi'mbi' ngaupita nkukulo wa libi'ndi' pawiku'mbwi nyumba yo lakini isengwanikeli, kwa mwanjaa yaasengilwe ngangamau.
6.49: Lakini ywoywoti ywagayu'wa makowe gangu' kakotoka kugapanga, aywo alandana na mundu ywasengite nyumba pangali i'mbi'ya. Pawisi nkukulo ayo nyumba ngaiyiluka no sengwanika.”

7.1: Payomwi longela gaabini kwabakia bandu, Yesu aayi'i ku Kapernaumu.
7.2: Akwo kwaai na mpi'ndo yumo ywa yesi ywembe mpangakasi wake ywampendile, endeminya na kiwo sendekumwegelelya.
7.3: Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi paayu'wine makowe ga Yesu, ngatuma agoi nsi'si' ba Kiyahudi, bakannu'be Yesu li'nga santepwe mpangakasi wake.
7.4: Pabaikite kwa Yesu, baatikumpembelelya kababaya, “Ili'ngani mundu yu' umpangi likowe li'.
7.5: Kwa kitumbu ywembe aaupendi muno nni'ma witu na ngaywatusengi yi'lu' nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'.”
7.6: Bai, kabayenda, baalongwaniye na Yesu. Pabaabile kabaegelya panyumba ya mpi'ndo ywa yesi, yu'lu' ngatuma mambwigalye bakammakie Yesu, “Bwana, kanewisuluye muno, kwa mwanjaa nenga ili'nganili wenga yingya munyumba yangu'.
7.7: Kwa nyo, nga kitumbu sanikotwike isa kwaubile, naibweni nili'nganili. Ila ulongele bai likowe, na mpangakasi wangu' alu'a lama.
7.8: Nanenga nibi pai' ya utawala nyonyonyo, na nibile na banayesi pai' yangu'. Nimmakia yumo, ‘Yenda,’ ywembe endayenda, nimmakia ywi'ngi' ‘Isa!’ nembe endaisa, na mpangakasi wangu' ‘Panga kikowe si'!’ nembe endapanga.”
7.9: Yesu payu'wine go, aatisangala, aakigalambuki si'lu' kipi'nga sa bandu sakimmi'ngi'yage, ngabaya, “Nammonali mundu mwene imani ngu'lu' kati yi' mu Isilaili yoti!”
7.10: Balu' bandu babaatumilwe kwa Yesu pabaabukiye kasake yu'lu' mpi'ndo, bankoli yu'lu' mpangakasi ayu'yu'kilwe. Yesu annyu'ya mwana wa mau' ywawi'like na nsengowe
7.11: Bu'kapo, Yesu ngayenda kukilambo sa Naini, aalongwaniye na banamasi' bake, na lipi'nga lya bandu babammi'ngi'yage.
7.12: Bai, paegeli pa niango wo yingya pakilambo so, baapitike bandu babapu'twi ntwi wa nnalu'me yumo ywabelekwi kisake kwa nnwawa ywawi'like na nsengowe. Bandu baingi ba kilambo so, baabile pamope na mau' ywo.
7.13: Bwana Yesu paamweni mau' ywo, aammi'ki kiya, ngammakia, “Kaneuli'le.”
7.14: Bu'kapo, ngayenda kugakunywa galu' masela na balu' babaapu'twile baatiyi'ma, ngabaya, “Wamunsembe, Nikuamulisa uyumuke!”
7.15: Yu'lu' nnalu'me ywawile ngakatuka tama utama, no tumbwa longela. Yesu ngankamukiya kwa mau' bake.
7.16: Bandu boti baatiyogopa na kunnumba Nnu'ngu' kababaya, “Nnondoli nku'lu' ywa Nnu'ngu' apitike mulukolo lwitu. Nnu'ngu' aisi kwakombwa bandu bake.”
7.17: Makowe gake go gaatiyu'wanika kwoti akwo Yudea na ilambo ya papipi. Banamasi' ba Yoani babaatumilwe yenda kwa Yesu (Mat 11:2-19)
7.18: Banamasi' ba Yoani baayi'i kummakia Yoani makowe ago goti. Nembe Yoani payomwi kwakema banamasi' bake abi'li' bu'ka kwa boti,
7.19: aatumike kwa Bwana, bakannaluye, “Wenga nga yu'lu' ywaisa, au tunni'nde ywi'ngi'?”
7.20: Balu' banamasi' pabaaikite kwa Yesu, baatikummakia, “Yoani Ywabatisage atutumike kasako tukulaluye, ‘Wenga wa yu'lu' ywaisa, au tunni'nde ywi'ngi'?’ ”
7.21: Palu' pabannaluyage Yesu aai mulyengo lya kwatepwa bandu baingi balu' babalumyage kwa matamwe, na babaayingililwe na moka na kwapanga atu'lu'ka minyo baingi balole.
7.22: Bai, Yesu ngayangwa, “Muyende mukammakie Yoani galu' gamugabweni kwa minyo ginu na kugayu'wa. Atu'lu'ka minyo bendalola, itewe bendayenda, bene matana bendapeleteyelwa, aibamakutu bendayu'wa, awi'li bendayu'ka, na aki'ba baalilwa abali inannoga.
7.23: Nantali mundu yu'lu' ywakotwike ba na kyukala nanenga.”
7.24: Apo pababu'i balu' baatumike Yoani, Yesu aatumbwi kulibakia lipi'nga lya bandu abali ya Yoani, “Mwayi'i linga namani ku'lu' kulupu'ngu'ti'? Buli, mupalage kugabona mambu'ngi'li'i kagapu'ngi'la na nsunga?
7.25: Mana nyinyo lili, mwayi'i linga namani? Mwayi'i kunnola mundu ywaweti magu'bo gene bei? Babawala magu'bo gene bei no tama kwa maisa ga kitayili batama mu mayumba ga akulungwa!
7.26: Bai, munibakie, mwayi'i linga namani, mwayi'i kunnola nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu'? Eloo, kai' kumpi'ta nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu'.
7.27: Ayu' Yoani ngaywabayilwa mu Maandiko Mapeleteu, ‘Lola, nenga nintuma mpangakasi wangu' akulongoli, aywo alu'a kupetulya ndi'la yako.’ ”
7.28: Yesu aayomwi kwo baya, “Nimmakia, kati ya bandu boti babatami panni'ma, ntu'pu' ywabile nku'lu' muno kumpi'ta Yoani Ywabatisage. Ata nyo, yu'lu' ywabile nsene muno mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' nga nku'lu' kulikoni ywembe.”
7.29: Bandu boti pamope na alonga koli pabagayu'wine go, baaulumbite unnogau wa Nnu'ngu'. Abo nga balu' babaupoki ubatiso wa Yoani.
7.30: Lakini Mafalisayo na balimu ba salya baakani panga mwapendi Nnu'ngu', kwa kuukana ubatiso wa Yoani wawaisi kwabe bembe.
7.31: Yesu ngaalaluya, “Bandu ba mmelekwo wu', nalandaniye na kili'be gani? Bandu ba uyi'me gani?
7.32: Landana kwabe kati bana babatamaga palisoko, kababakiana kipi'nga simo na si'ngi', ‘Tumwonekiye ngoma, namwenga mwinikeli! Tunnyi'mbi myambo ya ili'lo lakini muli'ili!’
7.33: “Kwa mwanjaa Yoani paisile, nembe endage punga na anywageli wi'mbi', namwenga mwabaite, ‘Ayingililwe na moka!’
7.34: Nembe Mwana wa Mundu aisi kaalya no nywa, na mwenga mubaya, ‘Munninge ayu' mundu mila no lobya, mbwiga wa alonga koli na bene sambi!’
7.35: Ata nyo, ikima ya Nnu'ngu' ikong'ondeli panga inannoga kwa balu' boti babaiyi'ki'tya.” Yesu kasake Simoni Mfalisayo
7.36: Mfalisayo yumo ankemite Yesu akalye kilyo kasake. Ngayingya nnyumba ya ywo Mfalisayo, aatitama no lya.
7.37: Bai, pakilambo si'lu' kwai na nnwawa yumo mwene sambi. Paayu'wine panga, Yesu abile nnyumba ya ywo Mfalisayo, aapu'twi supa ya liwe yene mauta ganannungya.
7.38: Atiisa ngayi'ma papipi na magu'lu' ga Yesu, ku'no kali'la, na moli gake gaatu'mbu'ki mumagu'lu' ga Yesu. Aywo nnwawa aagaponwi magu'lu' ga Yesu kwa nywili yake ndaso. Payomwi kumponwa, aaganoni galu' magu'lu', na kugapakaya mauta ganannungya.
7.39: Yu'lu' Mfalisayo ywankokite Yesu paagabweni go, aganiyite pamwoyo wake, “Kenda mundu yu' akapanga nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu', alu'e tanga panga, ayu' nnwawa ywankunywa mwene sambi.”
7.40: Yesu ngammakia ywo Mfalisayo, “Simoni, nibile na kikowe sa kukubakia.” Nembe Simoni ngammakia, “Nendakupi'kania Mwalimu, baya.” Yesu ngabaya,
7.41: “Bandu abi'li' bankopite mundu mbanje, yumo aakopite dinali mya tano, na ywi'ngi' amusini.
7.42: Wabasindwi li'pa maleni gabe, aywo mundu aatikwasamya boti abi'li'. Tumbwe, ywaku' kati ya bo bandu abi'li' ywalu'a kumpenda muno yu'lu' bwana?”
7.43: Simoni aatiyangwa, “Apo, niibona ywasamilwe leni liku'lu', ngaywaalu'a kumpenda muno yu'lu' bwana.” Yesu ngammakia, “Kakape.”
7.44: Kai' nganng'alambukya yu'lu' nnwawa na kummakia Simoni, “Wendakummona ayu' nnwawa? Nenga paniyingi pano panyumba yako, unipeili masi' go uluwa mumagu'lu' gangu', lakini nnwawa yu' anigu'lwi' magu'lu' gangu' kwa moli gake na kuniponwa kwa nywili yake.
7.45: Wenga unipangiteli abali kwa kuninonia, lakini ayu' nnwawa, bu'ka paniyingi pano, ywembe aganoniage magu'lu' gangu'.
7.46: Wenga unilayiteli unoga mwoyo wako kwa kunipakaya mauta muntwe, lakini ayu' nnwawa apangite nyo kwa kunipakaya mauta mumagu'lu' gangu'.
7.47: Kwa nyo nendakubakia, asamilwe masambi gake maingi kwa mwanjaa alayite unogau wake nku'lu'. Ywasamilwe kisene apenda pasene,”
7.48: Bai, Yesu ngammakia yu'lu' nnwawa, “Usamilwe masambi gako.”
7.49: Apo nga balu' babaabi pamope nakwe pamesa, ngabalaluyana, “Ayu' mundu gani, ywakombwa samya sambi?”
7.50: Nembe Yesu ngammakia yu'lu' nnwawa, “Imani yako ikukosopolile, uyende kwa amani.”

8.1: Bu'kapo, Yesu api'ti mumisengo miku'lu'miku'lu' na misenemisene, kaala abali inannoga ya Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'. Balu' banamasi' ku'mi na abi'li' bai pamope nakwe.
8.2: Kai', kwaai na alwawa balu' baabi'ngite Yesu moka na kwa tepwa matamwe. Nabembe baalekangineli nakwe, maina gabe Malia (ywakemelwage Makatalena), ywembe aabi'ngilwe mitumbi saba ya moka,
8.3: Yoana nnyumbo wa Kusa ywaabi mpangakasi nku'lu' ywa Helode, Susana na bi'ngi' baingi. Abo alwawa, batumyage mali yabe bene kwatumikiya bembe. Lukongo lwa mpandi (Mat 13:1-9, Mal 4:1-9)
8.4: Lisu'ba limo lipi'nga lya bandu lyatemesekana, na bandu bamwisilyage Yesu bu'ka kila kilambo. Nembe aabakie lukongo lu'no.
8.5: “Mpandi aayi'i misa mbeyu yake, paamisage mbeyu yo, yi'ngi' yaatu'mbu'ki mundi'la, yali'batilwe na api'ta ndi'la no sonyolwa na iyuni.
8.6: Yi'ngi' yatu'mbu'ki pa maliwe, na paibalike, yaatiyu'ma kwo oba masi'.
8.7: Yi'ngi' yaatu'mbu'ki pakatikati ya kiwi'mbi', yi'lu' ya pakiwi'mbi' paibalike, yaatolilwe kikolo.
8.8: Yi'ngi' yatu'mbu'ki muukando unannoga, yabalike, no pambika mbeyu mya kwa kila lupeyu lumo.” Payomwi longela go, ngau'bu'ya lilobe, kabaya, “Mwene makutu go yu'wa, na ayu'we!” Kitumbu so yi'gana kwa ngongo (Mat 13:10-17, Mal 4:10-12)
8.9: Banamasi' bake Yesu ngabannaluya, “Lukongo lu' lulombolya namani?”
8.10: Nembe ngayangwa, “Mwenga muyaliwite tanga iyo ya Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu', lakini abo bi'ngi' lili, ila abo babakiyilwa kwa ngongo li'nga batange panga, galu' gagaandikilwe mulilagano lya kwai'mbu' gendatimya, ‘Mana kabalola, kanebakibone sabakilolase, na mana kabayu'wa, kanebatange sabakiyu'wase.’ Yesu aanwa lukongo lwa mpandi (Mat 13:18-23, Mal 4:13-20)
8.11: “Bai, kikomekeyo sa lukongo lu'no nga si'no, mbeyu yaibayilwa pano nga liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'.
8.12: Yi'lu' yaitu'mbu'ki mundi'la, ilaya bandu balu' babapi'kania liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' kai' yu'lu' ndumu endaisa na kulibu'ya mumyoyo yabe baakane u'bi'lya no kosopolelwa.
8.13: Yi'lu' yaitu'mbu'ki pamaliwe mana ibalike ntu'pu' poyingya ngi'ga, apo ilandana na bandu balu' babaliu'bi'lya liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' kwo napusika na pabapayilwa pasene, bakoloka mwoyo.
8.14: Yi'lu' yaitu'mbu'ki pakiwi'mbi', ilandana na bandu balu' babapi'kania li'lu' liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu', lakini mana babu'i basuluyilwa na kyukala, utayili na matamanio ga yi'ga, abo bapambikali itunda no komala.
8.15: Na yi'lu' yaitu'mbu'ki mu ukando wa mbolya, nga bandu balu' babaliyu'wa li'lu' liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' bendaligania, na kulibi'ka mu mwoyo unannoga na kuliisimu. Abo, bendakomeya mpaka bapiye itunda. Lumuli lwaluwi'ki'lilwe (Mal 4:21-25)
8.16: “Bandu bakoyali kimuli na kukiwi'ki'lya mukibi'ga, au mmu'ngu'. Lakini bakibi'ka patu'ndu'bau li'nga bandu balole bweya.
8.17: Sosoti sakiiyilwe saiyanikwali, na makowe ga iyo yoyoti yaiyanikwali na yabonekana paminyo ga bandu.
8.18: Kwa nyo mwili'ndi'le kwa go gamugayu'wa, kwa mwanjaa ywabile na kili'be alu'a yongeyelwa, lakini ywangali kili'be ata si'lu' kisene sabile naso saatolelwa.” Mau' na alongobe Yesu (Mat 12:46-50, Mal 3:31-35)
8.19: Mau' na akina nnunabe, baamwisili Yesu, lakini bakombwili kumwegelya kwa mwanjaa kipi'nga sa bandu.
8.20: Yesu aapeyilwe abali, “Mau' bako na akina nnunabo bai panja, bapala kukubona.”
8.21: Lakini Yesu aabakie bandu boti, “Mau' na akina nnunangu', balu' babapi'kania lilobe lya Nnu'ngu' na kulikamwa.” Yesu agaamulisa mabi'mbi' ga baali gatame liki (Mat 8:23-27, Mal 4:35-41)
8.22: Lisu'ba limo Yesu na banamasi' bake bau'bwike mu ngalaba na ngaabakia, “Tuloke litanda tuyende mpaka kwiyi'.” Bai, ngabatumbwa mwanja.
8.23: Pabaabile mu ngalaba, Yesu lwampatike lugono, ngagonja. Nsunga nkali' na masi' gaatiyu'gayu'ga no yingya nkati ya ngalaba, apo baakibweni kiwo kakiegelya.
8.24: Balu' banamasi' bannyendeli Yesu na kunnyumuya kababaya, “Mpi'ndo, mpi'ndo! Twenda waa!” Yesu ngayumuka na kuukalipya nsunga nkali' no yu'gayu'ga kwa masi', nawembe ngauyi'ma no tama liki.
8.25: Bu'kapo ngaabakia, “U'bi'lya kwinu kubi kwaku'?” Lakini bembe baatisangala no yogopa ku'no kababakiana, “Ayu' nga mundu gani, ywakalipya nsunga no yu'gayu'ga kwa masi' nayembe yendakunnyu'wa?” Yesu antepwa mundu ywayingililwe na moka (Mat 8:28-34, Mal 5:1-20)
8.26: Baayendeli na mwanja mpaka kumbwani ya nni'ma wa Agelasi, waulolangana na Galilaya kwiyi' ya litanda.
8.27: Paulukage kumbwani, mundu yumo ywalobi moka amwisili bu'ka kukilambo. Bu'ka myaka yambone mundu ywo atamage wausu bai na atamage kuulema.
8.28: Pamweni Yesu, aitu'yike pai' nnu'ngi' yake, no kemelya kwa lilobe liku'lu' kabaya, “Wenga wa Yesu wa Mwana wa Nnu'ngu' Nku'lu', ubile na kitumbu gani nanenga? Nendakulu'ba, sondesonde kaneunilumiye!”
8.29: Alongei nyo kwa mwanjaa Yesu agakalipi go moka gabu'ke kwa mundu ywo. Ago moka gakoyage kunnyingilya mundu ywo, pamope no panga bandu bammi'i nnyumba na kuntaba kwa nyololo na pingwi mumagu'lu' na mumoko. Kila pabantaba ipungo yo, endekwiti'kwana no butukya kulupu'ngu'ti' kwa makakala ga aywo moka.
8.30: Bai, Yesu ngannaluya, “Lina lyako wanyai?” Ywembe ngayangwa, “Lina lyangu' na Yesi,” kwa mwanjaa ganiyingi moka maingi.
8.31: Ago moka ngagannu'ba panga kaneagamulise yenda kulyi'mbwa liku'lu'.
8.32: Pandu po kwabile na kipi'nga kiku'lu' sa magu'be kagali'lya pakitu'mbi'. Bai, balu' moka ngabannu'ba kai', aayi'ki'tiye bakaayingi balu' magu'be. Nembe Yesu ngaayi'ki'ti'a.
8.33: Kwa nyo, galu' moka gaatikummu'ka yu'lu' mundu na kwayingya balu' magu'be, nabembe baimbiliti pa linyenji no tumbukya mulitanda, masi' ngagaabulaga.
8.34: Balu' asungi pabagabweni goti gagaapitile, baatitila no yenda kwayaulya bandu makowe go, mukilambo na mumigunda.
8.35: Bandu ngabaisa lola gagapitike. Pabaikite paabile Yesu, baamweni yu'lu' mundu ywagammu'i moka atami papipi na Yesu, aweti ngu'bo na malango gake gabuyangine, ngabayogopa.
8.36: Balu' bandu babalibweni likowe lyo, kalipangika paminyo gabe, baayi'i kwabakia ayabe gabagabweni kwa yu'lu' mundu mwaatepulilwe.
8.37: Bandu boti ba nni'ma wa Gelasi, baatiyogopa kwa nyo, bannu'bike Yesu abu'ke. Yesu ngau'bu'ka mungalaba no bu'ka.
8.38: Yu'lu' mundu ywabu'yilwe moka, aannu'bite balongwane lakini Yesu aatikunkania ngammakia,
8.39: “Ubuyangani kasako, ukabaye makowe goti gaakupangi Nnu'ngu'.” Bai, yu'lu' mundu ngayenda kasake kapi'ta ku'no kaala kila pandu mukilambo si'lu' makowe goti gapangilwe na Yesu. Biti Yailo na nnwawa yumo bendatepulwa (Mat 9:18-26, Mal 5:21-43)
8.40: Yesu pabuyangani kwiyi' ya litanda, kipi'nga sa bandu satikunkemya kwa mwanjaa boti bendekunni'nda.
8.41: Apo ngaisa mundu yumo ywakemelwage Yailo, mpi'ndo ywa nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'. Aitaikuli pamagu'lu' ga Yesu na kunnu'ba ayende kasake.
8.42: Kwa mwanjaa mwi'nja wake ywabelekwi kisake, ywa myaka ku'mi na ibi'li' endekomya. Yesu paayendage, bandu bendekuntwi'li'lya na kunkunywa ku'no na ku'no.
8.43: Bai, kwai na nnwawa yumo pakatikati ya si'lu' kipi'nga sa bandu, ywembe abi na utamwe wa nkongomokwa kwa myaka ku'mi naibi'li'. Pamope no panga aayomwi ili'be yake yoti kwapelekya aganga, ntu'pu' ywaakombwi kuntepwa.
8.44: Aywo nnwawa aammi'ngi'yite Yesu nsu'gu', ngapakunywa mpindo wa nganju yake. Pakunywile, popopo utamwe wake waatikummu'ka.
8.45: Yesu ngalaluya, “Aywo nyai ywanikunywile?” Boti ngababaya panga, ntu'pu' mundu ywakukunywile. Nembe Petili ngabaya, “Mpi'ndo, kipi'nga sa bandu kitekuti'li'ta no kukutwi'li'lya.”
8.46: Lakini Yesu ngabaya, “Kubi na mundu ywanikunywile, mwanjaa nigabweni makakala kaganibu'ka.”
8.47: Yu'lu' nnwawa waibweni panga akombwali iya, ngapapitya nnu'ngi' ya Yesu ku'no kalendema kwo yogopa, ngaitu'ya pai, Yesu kannola. Apo, ngalongela nnu'ngi' ya bandu boti kitumbu sa kunkunywa Yesu na kitumbu sapatike tepulwa.
8.48: Yesu ammakie panga, “Biti, kwo u'bi'lya kwako uponi, uyende kwa amani.”
8.49: Paabile balo kalongela, Yailo aaletilwe abali bu'ka kaya, “Mwi'nja wako awile, sakunsulukia muno Mwalimu saku'.”
8.50: Yesu pagayu'wine go, ngammakia Yailo, “Kaneuyogope, we wu'bi'li bai alu'a tepulwa.”
8.51: Yesu paikite kasake Yailo, annyi'ki'tiyeli mundu yingya nnyumba pamope nakwe, ila aayingi na Petili, Yoani, Yakobi na abelei ba aywo mwi'nja.
8.52: Bandu boti baabile kabali'la no lombola mwakipitike kiwo sake. Yesu ngaabakia, “kanemuli'le, mwana atigonja bai, anawaali!”
8.53: Bandu ngabamweka kwa kunsalawa panga atangiteli kiwo, mwanjaa bembe baatangite awile.
8.54: Lakini Yesu ankamwi luboko na kummakia, “We mwana, yumuka!”
8.55: Bwu'mi wake ngaubuyangana, no yumuka. Yesu ngaabakia, bampei kilyo.
8.56: Abelei bake batisangala kummona mwu'mi, lakini Yesu ngaaking'indya panga, kanebammakie mundu ywoywoti aga gagapangilwe.

9.1: Yesu aakemite balu' ku'mi na abi'li' na kwapeya uweso wo bi'nga moka na kwatepwa atamwe.
9.2: Kai', ngatuma bakaale Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' na kwatepwa atamwe.
9.3: Aalagi, “Pamuyabwa mwanja kanemupu'twe kikowe sosoti, kanemupu'twe lukongoso wala nsaku, wala masulupu, wala mbanje wala kanemwapu'twe ata nganju yo bi'kiya.
9.4: Pansengo wowoti wabankemya no yingya, mwatame po mpaka pamwabu'ka pa kilambo so.
9.5: Bandu mana bakani kunkemya, mubu'ke pakilambo so no paapata ata litikwili lyalinamati mumagu'lu' ginu. Awo wapanga kati mwanju wa lukilo lwabe.”
9.6: Bai, baatumbwi mwanja bapi'ti muilambo kabaala abali inannoga na kwatepwa atamwe kila pandu. Kyukala sa Helode (Mat 14:1-12, Mal 6:14-29)
9.7: Kwa nyo ntawala Helode aapatike abali ya makowe goti gagaapangike aatangiteli mwanjaa babayage, “Yoani Ywabatisage ayu'kite bu'ka kuuwi'li!”
9.8: Bi'ngi' babayage panga Elia apitike, bi'ngi' babayage kwaali' nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu' yumo ywa kwai'mbu' ateyu'ka.
9.9: Lakini Helode ngagania, “Yoani natikumwi'sa, tumbwe aywo nyai ywaniyu'wa makowe gake?” Apalage kummona mundu ywo. Yesu apeya kilyo balu' bandu elupu tano (Mat 14:13-21, Mal 6:30-44, Yoa 6:1-14)
9.10: Bai, balu' atumilwe bake pababuyangine, bammakie Yesu makowe goti gabaapangite. Yesu ngabu'ka nabo, kuu'lu' mpaka kukilambo sa Betisaila.
9.11: Lakini ipi'nga ya bandu paikwipwi kwayi'i, baatikummi'ngi'ya. Yesu ngaakemya no longela nabo makowe ga Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu', aatepwi balu' babapalage tepulwa.
9.12: Lisu'ba palyatumbwi pilya, bannyendeli balu' ku'mi na abi'li' bammakie, “Walage bandu bayende kumisengo na kumigunda ya papipi, bakapate kilyo na muugonjo, kwa mwanjaa pano patubile, palupu'ngu'ti'.”
9.13: Lakini Yesu ngaabakia, “Mwapei mwenga kilyo.” Bannyangwi, “Twenga ntu'pu' kili'be sosoti, twigali na makati matano na omba abi'li'. Kwaali', tuyende twabene, tukaapi'mi kilyo bandu boti!”
9.14: Palu', kwai na annalu'me kati maelupu matano. Bai, Yesu ngaabakia banamasi' bake, “Mwabakie bandu batame muipi'nga ya mitumbi amusini amusini.”
9.15: Banamasi' baapangite kati mwababakiyilwe, baatamike mwitamo boti.
9.16: Bu'kapo, Yesu agatweti galu' makati matano na balu' omba abi'li', aalingite kunani na kwilu'bya balaka, kwimetwana na apei banamasi' bake li'nga baapei bandu.
9.17: Bandu boti baatilya no yukuta, na yaiigile baakongoli muitu'ndu', yatwi'li ku'mi na ibi'li'. Petili annyi'ki'tya Yesu panga nga Kilisitu (Mat 16:13-19, Mal 8:27-29)
9.18: Lisu'ba limo Yesu aabile kisake kalu'ba, na banamasi' bake babile papipi nakwe. Bai, ngaalaluya, “Bandu banibaya nenga na nyai?”
9.19: Nabembe ngabannyangwa, “Bi'ngi' babaya panga wenga wa Yoani Ywabatisage, bi'ngi' Elia, bi'ngi' yumo kati ya alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' ba kwai'mbu' balu' babayu'kite.”
9.20: Apo ngalaluya, “Na mwenga buli, munibaya nenga na nyai?” Petili ngayangwa, “Wenga nga wa Kilisitu ywa Nnu'ngu' Nkulungwa ywabayilwe.” Yesu alongelya abali ya kiwo sake (Mat 16:20-28, Mal 8:30-9:1)
9.21: Kai', Yesu ngaaking'indya na kwakanikiya panga kanebammakie mundu ywoywoti likowe lyo,
9.22: ngayendelya baya, “Mwana wa Mundu apalikwa apate ngu'su'mbu' yansima no kanilwa na api'ndo, api'ndo ba dini, na balimu ba salya no bulagilwa. Lakini lisu'ba lyenetatu bu'ka kiwo sake, alu'a yu'ka.”
9.23: Payomwi po, ngaabakia bandu boti, “Mundu ywoywoti mana kapala panga mwanamasi' wangu', aikane mwene, aupu'twe nsalaba wake kila lisu'ba, na anibi'ngi'ye.
9.24: Kwa mwanjaa mundu ywapala kuukombwa bwu'mi wake mwene alu'a kuobeya, lakini ywauobeya kwa kitumbu sangu' alu'a kuukombwa.
9.25: Kwani kiyongeya namani, mundu ba nawo utayili woti wa dunia kwa kwiobeya mwene? Niibona ntu'pu' so pata.
9.26: Mundu mana kanibi'kya oni nenga na gano ganiyi'gana, Mwana wa Mundu alu'a kummi'kya oni mundu ywo nsimu walu'a isa laya utukupu wake na wa Tati' bake na wa malaika apeleteu.
9.27: Nimmakianga kakape panga, kubi na bi'ngi' papanopano baapanga banawaali wangali kuubona Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.” Yesu agalambuka kuminyo (Mat 17:1-8, Mal 9:2-8)
9.28: Paliikite lisu'ba lya nane bu'ka palongei go, Yesu aayi'i na Petili, Yoani na Yakobi mpaka kukitu'mbi', akwo aayi'i lu'ba Nnu'ngu'.
9.29: Paalu'bage kuminyo yake kwatigalambuka, na magu'bo gake gabile mauu no ng'alang'atya muno.
9.30: Na bandu abi'li' baabonekine kabalongela nakwe, na bo bai Musa na Elia.
9.31: Bandu bo pabaapitike babile na utukupu, balongei nakwe bu'kana na kiwo sake, sembe kilu'e yomolya gabini Nnu'ngu' akwo ku Yelusalemu.
9.32: Petili na aine baatopilwe na lugono, ata nyo pabayumwike baubweni utukupu wake, na balu' abi'li' babaayi'mi pamope nakwe.
9.33: Bai, bandu bo abi'li' pabaabile kababu'ka, Petili aammakie Yesu, “Mpi'ndo, yanogeleli twenga tukatama pano! Bai, tusenge isewe itatu, simo sako, simo sa Musa na si'ngi' sa Elia.” Kwo baya nyo kakape, aakitangiteli salongelage.
9.34: Petili palongelage go, aapangite minyo ku'pi'li'. Lyunde ngalielya na kwawi'ki'lya, na lyunde lyo palyaisilile, balu' banamasi', baatiyogopa muno.
9.35: Lilobe lyayu'wanike bu'ka kulyunde, “Ayu' nga Mwana wangu' ywaninsawile, mumpi'kani ywembe.”
9.36: Bu'ka paliyu'wanike lilobe lyo, Yesu aabonekine ai kisake. Banamasi' baatami liki, bammakieli mundu ywoywoti makowe go. Yesu antepwa mwana mwene moka (Mat 17:14-18, Mal 9:14-27)
9.37: Pamalau' yake pabaelyage bu'ka kukitu'mbi', kipi'nga kiku'lu' sa bandu sakwembine na Yesu.
9.38: Apo, mundu yumo mukipi'nga si'lu', ngakatuya lilobe aabaite, “Mwalimu, nendakulu'ba sonde li'li'li' unninguli mwana wangu'. Mwana wangu' we yu'yu' bai!
9.39: Moka endagakunnyingilya na kumpanga apange ndu'ti, annyi'ya kyundaunda na kumpiya matutume munkano. Mana annyingilile, endakuntesa muno na annekali kiyu'ngu'ya.
9.40: Naalu'bite banamasi' bako bakammi'nge, lakini baakombwili.”
9.41: Yesu ngabaya, “Mwenga mwa lubelekwo lulau na lwangali ubi'lya! Nilu'a tama na mwenga na kunkomeya, mpaka pakubawi? Unnete mwana wako pano.”
9.42: Mwana ywo payendage kwa Yesu, yu'lu' moka ngantu'ya pai' na kunnyi'ya kyundaunda. Lakini Yesu ammi'ngite yu'lu' moka kwa yu'lu' mwana na kuntepwa, kwapeya tati' bake.
9.43: Bandu boti bausangalike uweso nku'lu' wa Nnu'ngu'. Yesu alongela kai' abali ya kiwo sake (Mat 17:22-23, Mal 9:30-32) Balu' bandu pabasangalage goti gaagapangite Yesu, aabakie banamasi' bake,
9.44: “Muyu'we masikilo mugayu'we makowe gano. Mwana wa Mundu ayenda songelwa, no yingya mumaboko ga bandu.”
9.45: Lakini bembe baatangiteli kikomekeyo sa nnongelo wo. Likowe li' lyatiiyilwa li'nga baakane tanga, nabembe baayogwipe kunnaluya panga, alombolya buli bu'kana na nnongelo wo. Nyai ywabile nku'lu'? (Mat 18:1-5, Mal 9:33-37)
9.46: Kwai na ntau kati ya balu' banamasi', kwa abali yo laluyana panga nyai pakati yabe ywabile nku'lu' kulikoni boti.
9.47: Yesu pagatangite gabaganiage mumyoyo yabe, ngantola mwana nsimana na kummi'ka papipi na mwene.
9.48: Ngaabakia, “Mundu ywoywoti ywampokya mwana nsene yu' kwa lina lyangu' anipokya nenga, na ywoywoti ywanipokya nenga ampokya ywanitumike. Kwa mwanjaa yu'lu' ywabile nsene kuliko boti pakati yinu, ywembe nga nku'lu' kulikoni boti.” Ywagau'bi'lya gamugapanga mubile nakwe pamope (Mal 9:38-40)
9.49: Yoani ngalongela, “Mpi'ndo, tumweni mundu yumo kabi'nga moka kwa lina lyako, na twenga twapayite kunkanikiya mwanjaa, ywembe aabileli mukipi'nga situ.”
9.50: Lakini Yesu ngammakia, “Kanemunkanikiye, yu'lu' ywakotoka taukana na mwenga, aywo ai pamope namwenga.” Asamalia bakana kumpokya Yesu
9.51: Pauegeli nsimu wu'lu' wa Yesu pu'tu'lwa kunani, ywembe aabini ayende ku Yelusalemu.
9.52: Bai, ngatuma bandu bannongoli nabembe ngabayenda. Bayingi pakilambo simo sa Asamalia pala bakammi'ki makowe wisowiso.
9.53: Lakini benekaya ba po bapaili kumpokya, kwa mwanjaa ywembe ayendage ku Yelusalemu.
9.54: Bai, banamasi' bake Yoani na Yakobi pabagabweni go, ngababaya, “Bwana, upala twamulise mwoto uuluke bu'ka kunani walangamise?”
9.56: Baabu'i palu' no yenda kukilambo si'ngi'. Kwileka yoti kunki'ngama Yesu (Mat 8:19-22)
9.57: Pabaabile mumwanja, mundu yumo aammakie Yesu, “Nalu'a kuki'ngama kwokwoti kwawayenda.”
9.58: Yesu ngabaya, “Ibweya babile na mapango gabe go tama, na iyuni iyumba yabe, lakini Mwana wa Mundu ywembe ntu'pu' pogonjo.”
9.59: Wayomwi po, aammakie mundu ywi'ngi', “Uniki'ngame.” Lakini mundu ywo ngayangwa, “Bwana, uniyi'ki'ti'ye wi'ti' nikasike tati' bangu'.”
9.60: Yesu ngayangwa, “Waleke babawile basikane bene na bene, lakini wenga uyende ukaale makowe ga Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
9.61: Na mundu ywi'ngi' aatikummakia, “Bwana, naalu'a kubi'ngi'ya lakini uniyi'ki'ti'ye wi'ti' nikaalage bandu ba kasangu',”
9.62: Yesu ngammakia, “Ywoywoti ywakamwa lingumbo, na katumbwa li'ma ku'no kalinga nsu'gu', aywo apwaikali kwa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”

10.1: Bu'kapo, Bwana aasawi bi'ngi' sabini na abi'li' ngaatuma abi'li' abi'li', li'nga balongoli kila pandu paabini mwene yenda.
10.2: Aatikwabakia, “Mauno gatwi'la, lakini auni bali'nganali. Kwa nyo, munnu'be Bwana mwene nng'unda alete auni munng'unda wake.
10.3: Nambi'yambi' muyende, lakini mutange panga nintumanga kati bana ba ngondolo babayenda pakatikati ya mapu'mbe.
10.4: Kanemupu'twe likanda wala linyamanda wala ilatu, kai', mundi'la kanemumpange mundu abali.
10.5: Na kila nsengo wamulu'a yingya mwatumbwe kwapanga abali kamwabakia, ‘Amani ibe pansengo wu'no.’
10.6: Na mana kubi na mwana wa amani, amani yinu ilu'a igala nakwe, na manaitei ntu'pu', ilu'a kummuyangania mwabene.
10.7: Bai, mutame pansengo wowowo kamulya no nywa samwapeyelwa, kwa mwanjaa mpangakasi apeyelwa nkwiso wake. Kanemuyangangane muutamo, li'no nsengo wu'no malau' wu'lu'!
10.8: Mana mwikite pakilambo nsi'si', bandu manabankemile, mwalye yabampeya.
10.9: Mwatepwe atamwe bababile kwo, mwabakie bandu, ‘Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' umwegelile mwenga.’
10.10: Lakini mana mwikite pakilambo sosoti, mana bakani kunkemya, mwabu'ke na mana kampi'ta mumali'la gabe mubaye,
10.11: ‘Ata lyu'ku'mbi' lya kilambo sinu lyalinamati mumagu'lu' gitu, twendapaapata kwo kana kwinu. Lakini mutange panga Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' wegelile.’
10.12: Nimmakianga panga lisu'ba lyo, kilambo so salu'a baa mmaule kulikoni galu' ga bandu ba Sodoma. Mwakibona mwamisengo mwamukana kumuyangania Nnu'ngu' (Mat 11:20-24)
10.13: “Wakibona wenga wa Kolazini! Wakibona wenga wa Betisaida! Kenda mangelongelo gagapangike kasinu gakapangika ku'lu' Tilo na Sidoni, sai'no bawati mabunia bu'ka palipite no tama muligu kababuyangania kwa Nnu'ngu' wabe.
10.14: Ata nyo lisu'ba lyo senulwa, mwenga mwasenuka paku'lu kulikoni Tilo na Sidoni.
10.15: Nawenga wa Kapernaumu buli! Ulu'a kwikatuya mpaka kunani? Ulu'a tu'mbu'yi'lwa mpaka kumambi'.”
10.16: Aayendeli baya, “Ywampi'kania mwenga, anipi'kania nenga na yu'lu' ywakana kumpokya mwenga, akana kunipokya nenga. Na ywoywoti ywakana kunipokya, akana kumpokya yu'lu' ywanitumike.” Balu' sabini na abi'li' bendabuya
10.17: Bu'kapo balu' sabini na abi'li', ngabaki'li'bu'ka ku'no kabanapusika, “Bwana, ata moka gendatuyu'wa kwa lina lyako.”
10.18: Yesu ngaabakia, “Naamweni Ibilisi katu'mbu'ka bu'ka kunani kati njai.
10.19: Nimpeyangite amuli yo li'bata nng'ambo na ipi'li'li' na makakala goti ga yu'lu' ndumu, kai' ntu'pu' kikowe sakilu'a kunsulu.
10.20: Lakini kanemunapusike mwanjaa moka gendakunnyu'wa ila, munapusike kwa mwanjaa maina ginu gaandikilwe kunani.” Pulaa ya Yesu (Mat 11:25-27, 13:16-17)
10.21: Popopo, Yesu asangiliye kwa Loo Mpeleteu aabaite, “Nendakunsukulu Mwa Tati', Bwana wa kunani na padunia, kwa mwanjaa makowe ga, mwaiyite bene ikima na malango, kwatambulya bana anangu'ta. Eloo Tati', kwa mwanjaa mo ngamwamupai.”
10.22: Bu'kapo ngabaya, “Tati' bangu' banikamukiye ili'be yoti. Ntu'pu' ywantangite Mwana ila Tati', Kai' ntu'pu' ywatangite Tati' ila Mwana, na ywoywoti yu'lu' Mwana apendi kuntambulya.”
10.23: Bu'kapo ngaatendebukya banamasi' bake alongei nabo pakiyi'ki'ya, “Nantali babagabona gano gamugabona mwenga!
10.24: Nimmakianga kakape, alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' na akulungwa, baapai kugabona galu' gamugabona mwenga na gamugayu'wa. Lakini bagabwenili na bagayu'wineli.” Lukongo lwa Nsamalia mwene kiya
10.25: Bu'kapo mundu yumo ywa salya aatiyi'ma na kunnaluya, kaapala kumpi'ndi'ka, “Mwalimu, nipange buli li'nga niupate ukoto wangali yomoka?”
10.26: Ywembe ngannyangwa, “Iandikilwe buli musalya? Wenga utanga buli?”
10.27: Mwalimu wa salya ngannyangwa, “Umpende Bwana Nnu'ngu' wako kwa mwoyo wako woti, kwa loo yako yoti, kwa makakala gako goti na kwa malango gako goti. Na umpende ywotama papipi nakwe, kati mwowipenda wamwene.”
10.28: Yesu ngammakia, “Mwoyangwile unogiye! Upange nyo nawenga walu'a lama.”
10.29: Lakini mwanjaa ywembe apalage kwibalangilya panga nnogau, annalwiye Yesu, “Na mundu ywa papipi yangu' nga ywaku'?”
10.30: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Mundu yumo aelyage bu'ka ku Yelusalemu yenda ku Yeliko. Payendage, mundi'la, aayingililwe na makatauluma, bampokonywi ili'be yake yoti, kunneka wausu na kunku'mbwa, bannei aindwike.
10.31: Nembe mpi'ndo yumo wa dini kapi'ta pandi'la yi'yi'lu'yi'lu', apite mbwega ku'no kammona.
10.32: Nembe Mlawi yumo, paikite pandu po, apite mbwega mbwega ku'no kammona.
10.33: Lakini mundu yumo Nsamalia ywabile mumwanja wake, paikite pabile yu'lu' mundu aammi'ki kiya.
10.34: Atikunnyendelya na kunnyangatiya, kwa kunnyi'ya mauta na wi'mbi' wa njabibu na kuntabya itambala. Wayomwi go, ngamwu'bu'ya mu mbu'nda wake na kumpeleka ku nyumba ya ageni yenda kummu'bu'ya.
10.35: Pamalau' yake ngampeya mbanje dinali ibi'li' yu'lu' mwene nsengo, no lagana nakwe panga, ‘Ummu'bu'ye mundu yu', na sosoti sawalu'a tumya kai', nalu'a kuli'pa kibuyo.’ ”
10.36: Bu'kapo Yesu aatilaluya, “Kati ya bandu bo atatu, ywaku' ywabonekine panga mundu ywa papipi ywa yu'lu' ywayingililwe na balu' makatauluma?”
10.37: Yu'lu' mwalimu ywa salya ngayangwa, “Yu'lu' ywammi'ki kiya nga mundu wa papipi.” Yesu ngammakia, “Uyende, ukapange nyinyonyo.” Yesu kasake Malita na Malia
10.38: Pabaabile mumwanja, baaikite kukilambo simo na nnwawa yumo ywakemelwa Malita, ankemi kasake.
10.39: Malita aabile na nnunawe ywakemelwage Malia, ayu' aatami papipi na Yesu, kapi'kania gayi'ganage.
10.40: Lakini Malita ywembe aiauyage na makowe gambone ga nng'eni. Bai, ngannyendelya Yesu ngammakia, “Bwana, wenga wibona sawasawa nnunangu' anileka niauke kisangu'? Ummakie aniyangatiye.”
10.41: Lakini Bwana annyangwi, “Malita, Malita, wendakwiauya na kwisuluya kwa makowe maingi.
10.42: Kikowe simo bai nga sangama. Malia asawi kikowe sangama muno, alu'a li'ndi'li'lwa na sembe apokonyolwali.”

11.1: Lisu'ba limo, Yesu aabile pandu nsi'si' kaalu'ba Nnu'ngu'. Payomwi lu'ba Nnu'ngu' yumo bu'ka mukipi'nga sa banamasi' bake aatikummakia, “Bwana, tukulu'ba utuyi'gane lu'ba Nnu'ngu' kati Yoani Ywabatisage mwayi'ganiye banamasi' bake.”
11.2: Yesu aabakiye, “Pamulu'ba Nnu'ngu' mubaye nnyanya, ‘Tati' bitu mwamubile kunani, Lina linu likwi'yi'lwe, Ukulungwa winu wise.
11.3: Mutupei kilyo situ sa kila lisu'ba.
11.4: Mutusami masambi gitu, kati twenga mwatwasamya babatukosile, kai' kanemutuyi'ngiye mumakowe ga kutupaya.’ ”
11.5: Kai' ngaabakia, “Tubaye yumo mukipi'nga sinu aabile na mbwigalye, nembe annyendeli kasake meku, na kummakia, ‘Mbwiga, sonde li'li'li' uniyaiki makati gatatu.
11.6: Mbwiga lyangu' aai mumwanja api'ti kasangu', nanenga ntu'pu' sa kumpeya.’
11.7: Nembe paabile nnyumba ngannyangwa, ‘Ngani kunisuluya! Ne niyigile niango wangu'! Yi'no saa yo gonja nenga na bana bangu', nikupeyali ubu'ke bai!’
11.8: Tubaye apala yumuka kumpeya kwa mwanjaa ywembe mbwigalye lili, ila kwa mwanjaa mundu ywo aayendeli kunnu'ba, alu'a katuka ampei sosoti sakipala.
11.9: Kwa nyo, nimmakianga mulu'be namwenga mwapeyelwa, mupale namwenga mwapata. Mupange u'li, namwenga mwayu'gu'li'lwa.
11.10: Kwa mwanjaa ywoywoti ywalu'ba ngaywapeyelwa, ywapala ngaywapata na ywapanga u'li, ngaywayu'gu'li'lwa.
11.11: Ywaku' kasinu mana mwana wake aalu'bite tati' bake omba, alu'a kumpeya nng'ambo ayu'ye omba?
11.12: Na mana alu'bite lipinga kitiwi, alu'a kumpeya kipi'li'li'?
11.13: Kati mwenga mwamubile mwalau, mumanyi kwapeya bana binu ikowe inannoga, nga munomuno tati' binu ba kunani, balu'a kwapeya Loo Mpeleteu balu' babannu'ba.” Yesu na Belisebuli (Mat 12:22-30, Mal 3:20-27)
11.14: Lisu'ba limo Yesu abi'ngage moka ywagampangite mundu yumo kaneakombwe longela. Bai, ago moka pagammu'i, aywo mundu ngakombwa longela, kipi'nga sa bandu satisangala.
11.15: Lakini bandu bi'ngi' pakipi'nga sabe babaike, “Abi'nga moka kwa uweso wa Belisebuli, mpi'ndo wa moka.”
11.16: Bi'ngi' bendekumpaya, li'nga apange mangelongelo itanganikwe panga ayi'ki'tilwe bu'ka kunani.
11.17: Lakini mwanjaa ywembe aagatangite gabaganiage, ngaabakia, “Ukulungwa wowoti waubaganike ipi'nga yaitaukana, ukombwali konda. Nga mwalubile lukolo lwolwoti lwaluyu'mana, lusi'yali langanyika.
11.18: Mana Ibilisi kaitaukya mwene, ukulungwa wake ulu'a yi'ma kitiwi? Mubaya buli nde, panga nibi'nga moka kwa uweso wa Belisebuli?
11.19: Mana kanibi'nga moka kwa uweso wa Belisebuli, bamwatuma mwenga babi'nga kwa uweso wa nyai? Kwa kitumbu so, bembe ngabalu'a kunkania mwenga mwabu'su'.
11.20: Lakini mana kanibi'nga moka kwa uweso wa Nnu'ngu', bai mutange panga Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu', tiyali wikite kwinu.
11.21: “Mundu mwene makakala, pali'ndi'la nsengo wake kwa yombo yo li'ndi'lya, mali yake yoti ipanga ngoto.
11.22: Lakini mana aisile ywampite kwa makakala na kunnyingilya, ampokonywa yombo yo li'ndi'lya yaiu'bi'lyage na mali yake kwibagana.
11.23: Ywoywoti ywakotoka lu'mbana nanenga, ayenda kinsu'gu' nanenga, ywoywoti ywakotoka kongolya pamope nanenga, alu'a yanjaya. Buyangania kwa moka (Mat 12:43-45)
11.24: “Moka mana abi'ngilwe kwa mundu, ati'li'ta ti'li'ta mulubele kaapala pandu po pu'mu'lya, mana ntu'pu' aibakia mwene, ‘Nilu'a buyangania kasangu' kwanibu'i.’
11.25: Pabuyangana, aikwemba yi'lu' nyumba ipyayililwe no nemekelwa na nkati yake ntu'pu' ywatama.
11.26: Bai, ayenda kwakoka moka aine saba alau pi'ta ywembe, boti bayenda kunnyingya mundu ywo. Kwa nyo, ali ya mundu ywo yapanga mbaya muno kulikoni mwayaabile.” Pulaa ya kakape
11.27: Palongelage go, nnwawa yumo pakipi'nga si'lu' sa bandu ngatu'ndu'bi'ya lilobe lyake no baya, “Nantali nnwawa ywakupapite na kukuyongeya.”
11.28: Lakini Yesu ngabaya, “Nantali muno balu' babapi'kania liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' na kulikamwa.” Bapala mwanju (Mat 12:38-42)
11.29: Kipi'nga sa bandu pakiyendelyage isa Yesu aatikwabakia, “Lubelekwo lu'no lwene sambi lupala lulole mwanju, lakini lupeyelwali lola, mwanju wabaubweni kwa Yona, uli'ngani.
11.30: Kati mu'lu' Yona mwabile mwanju kwa bandu ba ku Ninawi, nyinyonyo na Mwana wa Mundu ngamwalu'a panga mwanju kwa lubelekwo lu'no.
11.31: Malikiya wa Seba alu'a pitya Nsimu wo ukumilwa lubelekwo lu'no. Nembe alu'a kuluukumu kwa mwanjaa lubile na masambi. Mwanjaa ywembe aaisi bu'ka kuutalu li'nga api'kani mayi'gi'yo gene malango ga Selemani, na aaisi kwipwa panga, kumbe pano pabile na nku'lu' kulikoni Selemani.
11.32: Bandu ba Ninawi balu'a yi'ma Nsimu wo ukumilwa. Nabembe balu'a luukumu lubelekwo lu'no panga lubile na masambi. Kwa mwanjaa bembe bammuyangani Nnu'ngu' bu'kana na maalo ga Yona, na kumbe pano pabile na nku'lu' kulikoni Yona. Bweya wa yi'ga (Mat 5:15, 6:22-23)
11.33: “Ntu'pu' mundu ywakoya kimuli kukibi'ka mmu'ngu' au mukitu'ndu', ila akiu'bu'ya kunani, li'nga bandu babayingya nnyumba bapate kuubona bweya.
11.34: Liyo lyako nga kyenge sa yi'ga yako, mana libile likoto, yi'ga yako yoti yalu'a ba mubweya. Liyo lyako mana libile litu'lu'ka na yi'ga yako na yembe ilu'a ba mulubi'ndu'.
11.35: Wili'ndi'le lelo na bweya waubile nkati yako, wakane yu'ka lubi'ndu'.
11.36: Bai, manaitei yi'ga yako yoti ibile mubweya, wangali ba pandu popoti pene lubi'ndu', nawenga walu'a baa mubweya munomuno kati mu'lu' mwaupanga bweya wa kyenge.” Yesu abi'kya lukolo Mafalisayo na balimu ba salya (Mat 23:1-36, Mal 12:38-40)
11.37: Yesu paabile kalongela, Mfalisayo yumo ankemi kilyo kasake, nembe ngayenda lya.
11.38: Aywo Mfalisayo asangalike kummona kalya wangali uluga masi' mumaboko, kwa mwanjaa yayi'ki'tilweli musalya.
11.39: Bwana ngammakia, “Mwenga mwa Mafalisayo, mumanyi gu'lwa nnobo na nkungu kunja, lakini nkati yake kutwi'li bwimi no akala mwoyo.
11.40: Mwenga mwalogeloge! Buli, nengite Nnu'ngu' ywatengenise panja, nga ywatengenise nkati?
11.41: Mwapei aki'ba yi'lu' ili'be yaibile nkati ya myoyo yinu na yi'ngi' yoti yapanga alali yinu.”
11.42: “Lakini, mwakibona Mafalisayo, kwa mwanjaa mupiya saka ata maakapi ga ndakyo ya ilyo, ndebele na maakapi gi'ngi'. Lakini mugaleka makowe gagakong'ondya aki na kumpenda Nnu'ngu'. Mugakamwe makowe ga, wangali kugalibalya galu' gi'ngi'.
11.43: Mwakibona mwenga mwa Mafalisayo, kwa mwanjaa mupendi tama nnu'ngi' pandu pa isima amo mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' no pangilwa abali kwa isima pakipi'nga sa bandu.
11.44: Mwakibona, kwa mwanjaa mulandana na masiko gangali i'mbya maliwe, bandu bapi'ta panani yake wangali tanga ubolau wabauli'bata.”
11.45: Yumo mukipi'nga sa balimu ba salya ngammakia, “Mwalimu, makowe golongela, twenga wendatupwi'wa.”
11.46: Yesu annyangwi panga, “Mwakibona mwenga mwabalimu ba salya, kwa mwanjaa mwatwi'ka bandu igombo yangali pu'tu'li'ka, ku'no mwabene mukombwali ata golwa lukonji lumo kwayangatiya.
11.47: Mwakibona, kwa mwanjaa musengya masiko ga alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' balu' babaabulagilwe na api'ndo binu.
11.48: Kwa nyo, mukong'ondelya panga, muyi'ki'tile mwabapangite api'ndo binu, bembe bai abulagi ba abo alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', na mwenga musengya masiko gabe.
11.49: Kwa nyo, ikima ya Nnu'ngu' yabaite nnyinyo, ‘Nalu'a kwapelekya alondoli na atumilwe ba Nnu'ngu', lakini bi'ngi' balu'a kwabulaga na bi'ngi' kwapeya ngu'su'mbu'.’
11.50: Bu'kana na makowe ga lubelekwo lu'no lwalu'a pwatilwa, kwa mwanjaa myai ya alondoli boti ba Nnu'ngu' yaiyitanike bu'ka palutumbwi dunia,
11.51: bu'ka yitanika kwa myai ya Abeli mpaka yi'lu' ya Zakalia, yu'lu' ywabulagilwe mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', pakati ya kibi'ki'lyo na pandu papeleteu. Nimmakianga, Kakape lubelekwo lu'no lwalu'a pwatilwa kwa makowe go.
11.52: Mwakibona, mwenga mwa balimu ba salya! Kwa mwanjaa mwiyite si'lu' kiyu'gu'lyo sa niango wo yi'ganilwa, mwabene muyingili na mwakanikiye babayingyae kanebayingi.”
11.53: Pabu'i palu', balu' Mafalisayo na balimu ba salya, baatumbwi kunnyingilya kwa kunnaluya maswali gambone kwa ukali',
11.54: kabampi'ndi'ka li'nga bannyonje kwa malongelo gake bapate kitumbu sa kunsongya.

12.1: Bandu maelupu baatikusikana no li'batana, Yesu aatumbwi wi'ti' kwabakia banamasi' bake, “Mwili'ndi'le na uyi'me wa ulu'u wa Mafalisayo nga unapiki.
12.2: Lakini ntu'pu' sakiwi'ki'lilwe, sasaakotoka umukulwa, kila sakiyu'bite salu'a kwipulwa.
12.3: Kwa nyo, kila samulongei mulubi'ndu', bandu balu'a kiyu'wa pabweya, na kila gamulongei kwo yu'yu'tana kuungati milyango iyigalilwe, galu'a bayilwa panani ya mwagala wa nyumba. Ywapalikwa yogopelwa (Mat 10:28-31)
12.4: “Nimmakianga mwenga mwa mambwiga bangu', kanemwayogope balu' babakombwa bulaga yi'ga bai, lakini bakombwali yendelya panga kikowe si'ngi' mana babulige.
12.5: Nilu'a kummakianga yu'lu' ywapalikwa kunnyogopa, Munnyogope yu'lu' ywakombwa bulaga na kuntaikulya mundu kumwoto. Eloo, nimmakianga munnyogope ywo.
12.6: Itanganikwe panga injosi tano ipi'mi'yi'lwa kwa ela njene muno, au nyonyoli? Lakini nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu', alibalilwali ata yumo.
12.7: Lakini ata nywili ya mumitwe yinu ibalangilwe yoti. Kanemuyogope, mwenga nga mwampu'ku'bi'la kulikoni injosi yambone. Kunnyi'ki'tya na kunkana Kilisitu (Mat 10:32-33, 12:32, 10:19-20)
12.8: “Nimmakianga kakape, kila mundu ywaniyi'ki'tya nnu'ngi' ya bandu panga ywembe ywangu', Mwana wa Mundu nembe alu'a kunnyi'ki'tya nnu'ngi' ya malaika ba Nnu'ngu' panga mundu ywo ywake.
12.9: Lakini mundu ywoywoti ywanikana nnu'ngi' ya bandu, nembe alu'a kanilwa nnu'ngi' ya malaika ba Nnu'ngu'.
12.10: “Ywoywoti ywalongela likowe lyo kana kunnyi'ki'tya Mwana wa Mundu, alu'a samilwa, lakini ywannongelya ubu'su' Loo Mpeleteu, alu'a samilwali.
12.11: “Pabampelekanga mwenga nnu'ngi' ya mayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' na nnu'ngi' ya api'ndo na atawala, kanemwalendeme gania panga mukaikengya, au mukayangwa buli.
12.12: Kwa mwanjaa Loo Mpeleteu alu'a kunnyi'gana si'lu' samupalilwa yangwa popopo.” Lukongo lwa tayili nnogeloge
12.13: Mundu yumo palu' pakipi'nga sa bandu aatikummakia, “Mwalimu, ummakie nnunangu' yu', tubagane ulisi wabatuleki tati'.”
12.14: Yesu annyangwi, “Mbwiga, nyai ywanibi'i nenga panga na mundu ywa kwakenga au kwa awana pakati yinu?”
12.15: Bai, ngaabakia boti, “Mwili'ndi'le na kila uyi'me wa bwimi, kwa mwanjaa ukoto wa mundu ubu'kanali no yoloka kwa ili'be yabile nayo.”
12.16: Bu'kapo, ngaalongelya kwa lukongo lu'no, “Kwabile na tayili yumo ywembe munng'unda wake aatimeya munomuno.
12.17: Tayili ywo, aganiyite pamwoyo wake, ‘Nilu'a panga buli nanenga ntu'pu' ligu'lu' lyo bi'kya ilyo yangu'?
12.18: Nilu'a panga nyo, nilu'a sengwana tugu'lu' twangu' tuketuke no senga ligu'lu' liku'lu' amo nganilu'a bi'ka ilyo yangu' yoti yaniunike na mali yangu'.
12.19: Apo, naubakia mwoyo wangu' panga pano le ubile na sobi'ki'ya, no tumya myaka yambone, no ponda mali bai, lya, nywa, no napusika.’
12.20: Lakini Nnu'ngu' ngammakia, ‘Wenga wa nnogeloge, kilo sa li'no, bwu'mi wako wendatolelwa. Na ili'be yi'lu' yoti yowitwi'li'kiye, ilu'a panga ya nyai?’ ”
12.21: Yesu ayomoli kwo baya, “Amo ngamwabile mundu ywaitwi'li'ki'ya mali kwa makowe gake mwene bai, lakini nki'ba nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu'.” Mwu'bi'li Nnu'ngu' (Mat 6:25-34)
12.22: Bu'kapo Yesu aabakie banamasi' bake, “Kwa kitumbu so nendakummakianga, kanemube na kyukala ati' kilyo twapata kwaku', au alu'a kutuwalika nyai?
12.23: Kwa mwanjaa nantali bwu'mi kulikoni kilyo, yi'ga nantali kuliko ngu'bo.
12.24: Mwalinge mwababile iyuni. Bapandangali wala baunali, kai' ntu'pu' ligu'lu' lyolyoti. Ata nyo Nnu'ngu' ayimali ilyo endakwayakia. Mwenga mwampu'ku'bi'la kuliko iyuni!
12.25: Nyai mukipi'nga sinu ywakombwa lumya kwa kwiauya no kombwa yongeya kwaali' pasene masu'ba ga bwu'mi wake?
12.26: Bai, manaitei mukombwali panga likowe lisene kati lyo, mwanjaa namani muba na kyukala kwa galu' gi'ngi'?
12.27: Mugalinge malu'ba mwagalembulya! Gapangali kasi kai' gaiwalikali. Lakini nimmakianga, ata Nkulungwa Selemani mwene na utayili waabile nawo na magu'bo gawalage, anaikali paugolou wa lilu'ba limo.
12.28: Manaitei Nnu'ngu' akombwa kuliwalika nyo lyamba lya munng'unda, lyembe li'no libile na malau' lyalu'a taikulwa palitu'ta no tinika mwoto. Buli, kangi' alu'a kumpangya muno mwenga? Mwenga mwa bandu ba imani njene!
12.29: “Bai, kanemube na kyukala kwa kwiauya pala kilyo au so nywa.
12.30: Mwanjaa bandu bangali kuntanga Nnu'ngu' baukya go, na Tati' binu batangite panga makowe go gendapalilwa na mwenga.
12.31: Mupale wi'ti' Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' na go gi'ngi' mwalu'a yongeyelwa na Ywembe. Utayili kunani (Mat 6:19-21)
12.32: “Kanemuyogope, mwenga mwakipi'nga kisene sa ngondolo, kwa mwanjaa Tati' binu bapendi kumpeyanga Ukulungwa.
12.33: Mupi'mi'yange mali yinu na mbanje ye mukaapei aki'ba. Mwitengenesi mipuko yangali otoka na kwibi'kya amana kunani, akwo ipu'ngwali. Akwo bai, baegelyali kai' ngu'lu'ku'lu' baalabiyali.
12.34: Palu' paibile amana yako, nga pawaba na mwoyo wako. Atumisi babatama wiso
12.35: “Mube tiyali, mutabite mikanda muibuno na yenge yinu itame kaiyaka.
12.36: Mutame kati atumisi babanni'nda bwana wabe abuyangane bu'ka kulisengele, li'nga mana bayu'wine ilulu bai, bannyu'gu'li nniango ayingi.
12.37: Nantali atumisi balu' bembe bwana wabe paabuyangana, akwemba kabakeleka! Kakape nendakummakianga, aywo bwana aibi'ka wiso na kwakemya pamesa li'nga balye.
12.38: Ata mana aabuyangana meku au kakusa na kwakwemba kabakeleka, nantali yabe atumisi bo!
12.39: Mutange panga kenda mwene nyumba akatanga saa yaisa mwii, alu'e keleka na alu'e yi'ki'tyali kunneka ayingi no yiba.
12.40: Na mwenga nyinyonyo, mutame wiso kwa mwanjaa, Mwana wa Mundu alu'a isa saa yangatanganikwa.” Ntumisi ywa u'bi'li'ka na ywangali u'bi'li'ka (Mat 24:45-51)
12.41: Petili ngalaluya, “Bwana, lukongo lu' utulongelya twenga bai au twa bandu boti?”
12.42: Bwana ngayangwa panga, “Ywaku' ntumisi ywa u'bi'li'ka na mwene ikima, ywembe bwana wake alu'a kummi'ka panani ya atumisi bake li'nga apei kilyo nsimu waupalilwa?
12.43: Nantali yake ntumisi ywo, manaitei bwana wake paaki'li'bu'ka alu'a kunkwemba kapanga nyo.
12.44: Kakape alu'a kumwu'bu'ya na kumpanga ntawala wa amana yake yoti.
12.45: Lakini mana ntumisi ywo abaite pamwoyo wake, ‘Bwana wangu' asi'liye buyangana,’ ngatumbwa kwaku'mbwa atumisi aine analu'me na alwawa no lya, nywa no lobya,
12.46: bwana wake alu'a buyangana lisu'ba lyangali pi'kanilya na saa yangali tanganikwa, alu'a kunku'mbwa muno ntumisi ywo na kumuukumu pamope na bangali u'bi'lya.
12.47: Ntumisi yu'lu' ywatanga mwapala bwana wake, lakini apangali gagapalilwa panga, aaputilwa munomuno.
12.48: Lakini ywapanga makowe gagampanga mundu asenuke wangali tanga, aaputilwa pasene. Ywapeyilwe yambone, alu'a longelwa yambone, ywapeyilwe yambone muno, alu'a longelwa yambone munomuno. Yesu kitumbu so lekangana bandu (Mat 10:34-36)
12.49: “Niisi koya mwoto padunia, napendi ukapanga uyakite!
12.50: Nibile na ubatiso wambalikwa niupoki, kwa ndi'la yaku' niiauye mpaka utimi!
12.51: Mukita niletike amani pano pa dunia? Ata pasene, amani lili, ila mayu'mano.
12.52: No bu'ka nambi'yambi', mana kubile na alongo batano, balu'a baganika, ku'no abi'li' kwi'ngi' atatu au kwi'ngi' atatu, ku'no abi'li'.
12.53: Tati' balu'a yu'mana na mwana na mwana alu'a yu'mana na tati' bake, mau' bayu'mana na mwi'nja wabe na mwi'nja ayu'mana na mau' bake, mau' mukwe bayu'mana na nkamwana na nkamwana ayu'mana na mau' mukwe.” Tanga nsimu (Mat 16:2-3)
12.54: Yesu ngaibakia kai' ipi'nga ya bandu, “Mana mugabweni maunde gayi'mi kulwingo lwa kundondi bai popopo mubaya, ‘Ula alu'a nia’, kakape endania.
12.55: Mana muubweni nsunga wa kusi kaupukatya mubaya, ‘Kwalu'a ba na lyoto muno,’ Na ngamwaipangika.
12.56: Mwenga mwa anapiki! Mumanyi londwa mumaumbile ga nni'ma na kumaunde, mukotoka ki'li' tanga maumbile ga nsimu wu'no? Awana na andumu bako (Mat 5:25-26)
12.57: “Kwa mwanjaa namani mukotoka kwiamulya mwabene panga likowe linannoga?
12.58: Mana ywa kusitakya, kakupeleka kukoliti, yabile male yomwana nakwe mubile mundi'la, akane kupeleka kwa akimu, nembe akimu akane kukukamukiya kwa asikali, nabembe bakane kuyingiya muutabilwe.
12.59: Kakape nikubakia, watama mo mpaka wayomwe li'pa lwela lwa kuundi'la.”

13.1: Nsimu wo baaisi bandu nsi'si' kummakia Yesu abali ya ku Galilaya, kwa bandu bababulagilwe na Pilato pabaaisi na inyama yabe isinjilwe kwa salaka ya mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'.
13.2: Nembe Yesu aatikwabakia, “Mwenga mubaya Agalilaya bo, bai na sambi kulikoni Agalilaya bi'ngi' ati' kwa mwanjaa batesilwe nyo?
13.3: Nimmakianga kakape panga, bapangiteli sambi kwapi'ta balu', lakini namwenga kati bobobo, mana mukotwike kunng'alambukya Nnu'ngu', mulu'a langanyika kati bembe.
13.4: Au' balu' ku'mi na banane babaatu'mbu'kilwe na nsengo nku'lu' ku Siloamu no waa, mubaya bembe bai na masambi kulikoni bi'ngi' boti babatamage ku Yelusalemu?
13.5: Nimmakianga nyinyo lili, lakini na mwenga mana mukani kunng'alambukya Nnu'ngu', mulu'a langanyika kati bembe.” Lukongo lwa ntini wangali pambika
13.6: Bu'kapo Yesu ngaabakia lukongo lu'no, “Mundu yumo aabile na ntini munng'unda wake, payi'i pala atu'mbwe itunda yake, aubweni unapambikali ata limo.
13.7: Bai, ngammakia mpangakasi wake, ‘Linga! Wu'no mwaka wenetatu nisa pa nkongo wu' pala nitu'mbwe litunda, lakini nalibonali lipambike ata limo! Upi'ngwe, uyomwa mbolya ya munng'unda bai wangali pambika.’
13.8: Lakini mpangakasi annyangwi, ‘Bwana, tuuleke kai' mwaka gu'no, nilu'a kuuti'li'ti'ki'ya nkulyo upate masi' na kuyi'ya mbolya.
13.9: Mana waapambika manisa, twauleka, mana waapambikali twaupi'ngwa.’ ” Yesu antepwa mau' yumo Lisu'ba lya ya Sabato
13.10: Yesu endeyi'gana munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' kulisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi.
13.11: Na po, kwabile na nnwawa yumo ntamwe kwa myaka ku'mi na minane aayingililwe na moka. Kwa mwanjaa nyo, ng'ongo wake waatilemala muno ata akombwageli yi'ma wi'ma.
13.12: Yesu pamweni aatikunkema ngammakia, “Mau', utamwe winu mutepulilwe.”
13.13: Aammi'ki maboko gake pantwe na popopo, yi'ga yake yapatike makakala go yi'ma kai' na ankwi'yite Nnu'ngu'.
13.14: Lakini mpi'ndo ywa nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' aatiusika kitumbu sa Yesu kuntepwa mau' ywo lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi. Kwa nyo, aabakie bandu babaabile palu', “Mubile na masu'ba sita go panga kasi, bai mugatumi masu'ba go isapala pona matamwe ginu, lakini kanemwise lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi.”
13.15: Apo Bwana ngannyangwa, “Mwenga mwa anapiki! Nyai kwinu ywalu'e somwa yu'gu'lya ng'ombe bake au mbu'nda bake mukyu'ngu'lu' annongoye kunyweli wa masi' ata likabile lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi?
13.16: Tumbwe pano kubile na mwi'nja ywa Bulaimu, ywembe Ibilisi ampangite alemale kwa myaka ku'mi na minane. Buli, yanogeleli lili kunnyu'gu'lya muutabilwe wake lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi?”
13.17: Payomwi longela go, babantaukyage baibweni oni lakini bandu bi'ngi' boti batipulaika muno kwa makowe goti gaagapangite palu'. Lukongo lwa mbeyu njene (Mat 13:33)
13.18: Yesu ngalaluya, “Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' ulandana na namani? Nilu'a kuulandanisa na ki'li'?
13.19: Ubile kati lupeke lwa nkongo wa aladali, lwaalutweti mundu yumo na kulupanda munng'unda wake, lwatibalika no panga nkongo nku'lu'. Iyuni yaigu'lu'ka yakombwi senga iyumba yabe mundambi' yake.” Lukongo lwa ngelule (Mat 13:31-32, Mal 4:30-32)
13.20: Ngalaluya kai' “Nilu'a kuulandanisa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' na namani?
13.21: Kati ngelule njene yaiyi'i mau' yumo na kuiyangabana pamope na bwembe mbisi tano, na bwembe woti waatilu'la.” Niango wo patimwa (Mat 7:13-14,21-23)
13.22: Yesu aayendeli na mwanja wake wa ku Yelusalemu, ku'no kapi'tya muilambo na mumili'ma, kayi'gana liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'.
13.23: Mundu yumo ngannaluya, “Buli Bwana, bandu babaalu'a kosopolelwa baayoloka lili?”
13.24: Yesu ngaabakia, “Mukasane yingya kwo pi'tya niango waupatimwa, kwa mwanjaa nendakummakia, baingi balu'a paya yingya, lakini baakombwali.
13.25: Nsimu waisa, apo mwene nyumba alu'a katuka no yigala niango. Mwenga mwaalu'a yi'ma panja no panga u'li kamubaya, ‘Bwana, utuyu'gu'li.’ Lakini ywembe alu'a kunnyangwa, ‘Ndangiteli kwamubu'ka!’
13.26: Na mwenga mwatumbwa kummakia, ‘Twenga ngatulyage no nywa pamope nawenga, kai' wenga uyi'ganage muilambo yitu.’
13.27: Lakini ywembe alu'a baya, ‘Ndangiteli mwenga muuma kwaku', mubu'kange nnu'ngi' yangu' mwenga mwaboti mwapanga sambi.’
13.28: Apo, ngapasapanga kili'lo no yaga mino, pamwabona ki Bulaimu, Isaki, Yakobi na alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', boti babile mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu', lakini mwenga mwabene, mutaikulilwe panja!
13.29: Bandu balu'a isa bu'ka kumbwani na kundondi, kukibu'la na kusi no tama pakilyo ku Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.
13.30: Eloo, balu' babalongolile balu'a panga ba kuundi'la na balu' ba kuundi'la balu'a longolya.” Yesu akiyendelya kiwo (Mat 23:37-39)
13.31: Wakati wowowo, Mafalisayo bi'ngi' baatikunyendelya na kummakia, “Ubu'ke pano uyende kwi'ngi' kundu, kwa mwanjaa Helode apala kukubulaga.”
13.32: Yesu ngayangwa, “Muyende mukammakie aywo kibweya nng'anga nnyanya, ‘Li'no na malau' nilu'a bi'nga moka na kwatepwa atamwe na lisu'ba lyenetatu nilu'a yomolya lyengo lyangu'.’
13.33: Ata nyo li'no, malau' na papasa, niyendelya na mwanja wangu', kwa mwanjaa inogelyali nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu' abulagilwe panja ya ku Yelusalemu. Yesu auli'lya Yelusalemu (Mat 23:37-39)
13.34: “Mwa Yelusalemu! Yelusalemu! Wabulaga alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' na kwaku'mbwa maliwe balu' babatumilwe na Nnu'ngu' kasako. Pali'nga nipalike kwabi'ka pamope bana bako, pamope kati ngu'ku' nyongolo mwakumbatya bana bake pai' ya mapapayo gake, lakini watekana.
13.35: Aya! Alu'a kuleka kisako, panyumba yako palu'a panga payame. Bai, nimmakianga mwanibonali kai' mpaka nsimu wamwabaya, ‘Ayaliwite aywo ywaisa kwa lina lya Bwana.’ ”

14.1: Lisu'ba limo lya Sabato ya Ayahudi, Yesu aayi'i lya kunyumba yimo ya alongosi ba Mafalisayo, bandu baabile popo kabannolekeya.
14.2: Nnu'ngi' yake Yesu, kwaabile na mundu yumo ywaminyage kitamwe so imba payi'ga.
14.3: Yesu aalalwiye balimu ba salya na Mafalisayo, “Buli, yendayi'ki'ti'lwa kuntepwa mundu lisu'ba lya Sabato?”
14.4: Lakini bembe bayangwili. Yesu ankamwi ywo ntamwe, kuntepwa na kunneka aibu'ki.
