14.5: Payomwi lyo aatikwabakia, “Ywaku' mukipi'nga sinu, ywembe mwana wake au ng'ombe wake mana atumbuki mulu'si' alu'e kunnopwali, mwanjaa ya lisu'ba lya Sabato?”
14.6: Nabembe baakombwili kunnyangwa lyaalalwiye. Nogamwoyo no tu'u'lya
14.7: Yesu paabweni balu' babasawa tama muiti'gu' ya nnu'ngi' mana bakokilwe. Alongei nabo kwa lukongo lu'no.
14.8: “Mana mundu akukokite palisengele kanewatame pandu pa isima. Pi'ngi' akokilwe mundumuko kulikoni wenga,
14.9: mwene kaya aisa na kukubakia, ‘Wenga ukatuke, unneki kiti'gu' ayu'!’ Apo, walu'a kwibona oni paminyo ga bandu boti na wayenda tama pakitamo sa nsu'gu'.
14.10: Ila, mana ukokilwe pakalamu, waatame pakiti'gu' sa nsu'gu', li'nga mwene kiyambo paaisa, akubakie, ‘Mbwiga lyangu', potamiye panogeli lili, sotame pano palu'ngi' panannoga.’ Apo, walu'a peyelwa isima nnu'ngi' ya bandu boti botami nabo pamope.
14.11: Mwanjaa ywoywoti ywaiu'bu'ya mwene alu'a uluyilwa na ywaiuluya, alu'a u'bu'yi'lwa.”
14.12: Kai' aammakie yu'lu' ywankokite, “Mana kaupala panga kalamu ibe muntwekati au kitamwiyo, kanewakoke mambwiga sika, alongo, babatama papipi yako, bababile matayili. Manaitei nyo yapanga wenga bakuki'li'bu'kiye sawapangile.
14.13: Saupalikwa panga, mana kopi'ya kalamu wakoke aki'ba, alemau, itewe na atu'lu'ka minyo.
14.14: Nawenga wayaliwa mwanjaa abo bawakokite, ntu'pu' sawaki'li'bu'ki'yi'lwa. Nnu'ngu' alu'a kuli'pa upo yako nsimu wo yu'ka bandu bene aki.” Lukongo lwa kalamu ngu'lu' (Mat 22:1-10)
14.15: Yumo ywa balu' babaatami na Yesu kabalya aatikummakia, “Nantali mundu yu'lu' ywalu'a lya kilyo mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
14.16: Yesu ngammakia, “Mundu yumo aapangite kalamu ngu'lu' na aakokite bandu baingi.
14.17: Paliikite lisu'ba lya kalamu, antumike mpangakasi wake akaabakie babakokilwe, ‘Mwise ku'no kila kili'be kitami wiso.’
14.18: Lakini kila mundu ywaakokilwe aatumbwi piya kitumbu no lu'ba lasi. Ywaalongoli kummona aammakie mpangakasi, ‘Nenga nipi'mite nng'unda kwa nyo, nipalikwa nikaubone, nikulu'ba unisami bai.’
14.19: Ywi'ngi' aatibaya, ‘Nipi'mite ng'ombe ku'mi bo li'mya na niyenda kunng'unda kwapakia, nilu'ba lasi unisami bai.’
14.20: Na ywi'ngi' abaike, ‘Niuma gamba nnwawa kwa nyo, nikombwali isa.’
14.21: Mpangakasi ywo aatibuyangana na kummakia bwana wake makowe go. Yu'lu' mwene nyumba aatiusika, ngammakia mpangakasi wake, ‘Uyende kiyu'ngu'ya kusimbasimba na kumali'la ga kumisengo ukaalete mono nnyumba aki'ba, itewe, atu'lu'ka minyo na bi'ngi' babalemile.’
14.22: Bu'kapo mpangakasi ywo ngabaya, ‘Bwana, bandu nabakiye kati mwoamulise, lakini balo banatwi'lyali.’
14.23: Yu'lu' bwana aammakie kai' mpangakasi wake, ‘Uyende kusimbasimba na mumali'la gagayenda mbwega ya misengo, ukaalasimise bandu bayingi li'nga liiku'ta lyangu' litwi'li.
14.24: Kwa nyo nendakummakianga, ntu'pu' ata yumo mwa balu' babakokilwe ywalu'a paya kalamu yangu'.’ ” Kili'ngo so panga wa mwanamasi' wa Yesu (Mat 10:37-38)
14.25: Apo ipi'nga yambone ilongwanage pamope na Yesu. Bai, aagalambuki bandu na kwabakia,
14.26: “Mundu ywoywoti mana kaisa kwangu' apalilwa kunipenda nenga kulikoni tati' bake, mau' bake, nnyumbowe, bana bake, nku'we na akina lu'mbu'be, kai' ata mwene. Mana akotwike kombwa panga go, apangali mwanamasi' wangu'.
14.27: “Mundu ywakotoka pu'twa nsalaba wake na kunibi'ngi'ya, akombwali panga mwanamasi' wangu'.
14.28: Ywaku' kasinu, ywembe mana kaapala senga nsengo nku'lu', akombwali wi'ti' balanga mbanje yaipalikwa, li'nga atange panga yabile nayo, yali'ngana yomolya senga?
14.29: Mana buli, mana ayomwi senga pai' bai no kotoka yomolya, bandu balu'a kumweka.
14.30: Kababaya, ‘Mundu yu' aatumbwi senga, lakini akombwili yomolya.’
14.31: “Au', nkulungwa ywaku' ywayenda ku'mbwana ngondo na nkulungwa nnyine, ywasomwa wi'ti' gania panga yesi lyake lyene banayesi elupu ku'mi, likombwa otwa kwa yu'lu' mwene banayesi elupu isilini?
14.32: Mana aibweni ankombwali, alu'a kwatuma bandu bo yenda panga masikisano pakemu, yu'lu' nnyine abile balo kuutalu.
14.33: Bai, mwenga nyinyonyo, ntu'pu' ata yumo ywakombwa panga mwanamasi' wangu' mana asindwi kukilekekeya kila kili'be sabile naso. Mwinyo wangali kilyi'lyi' (Mat 5:13, Mal 9:50)
14.34: “Mwinyo unogite, lakini mana unogau wake wobite, ulu'a galambuyilwa buli li'nga kilyi'lyi' sake kibuye?
14.35: Upwaikali kwa ukando ata kwa mbolya. Bandu bendakuuyita. Bai, mwene makutu go yu'wa ayu'we.”

15.1: Lisu'ba limo, alonga koli na bene sambi baingi baayi'i kumpi'kania Yesu.
15.2: Mafalisayo na balimu ba salya baatumbwi ku'ku'li'ka, “Munninguli mundu yu'! Aakemya bene sambi, no lya nabo nkungu gumo.”
15.4: “Ati', mundu yumo kati yinu mana abile na ngondolo mya, mana aobite yumo, alu'a panga buli? Aaleka balu' tisini na kenda mmwitu, no yenda kumpala yu'lu' ywaobite mpaka ammone.
15.5: Mana amweni, alu'a kumpu'twa palipamba kwo napusika.
15.6: Paaika kasake, aakema mambwigalye na kwabakia, ‘Munapusike pamope nanenga kwa mwanjaa yu'lu' ngondolo wangu' ywaobite nimweni.’ ”
15.7: Yesu aayendeli longela, “Mwenga nendakumakia, kwalu'a baa na pulaa kunani kwa mundu yumo mwene sambi buyangania kwa Nnu'ngu', kulikoni bandu tisini na kenda bene aki bapalilwali kummuyangania Nnu'ngu'.” Lwela lwaluobite
15.8: “Au mwibona buli? Tubaye nnwawa nsi'si' abi na ela ku'mi ya mapeni, mana aobiye yimo, alu'a panga buli? Alu'a koya lumuli na kwipyaya nyumba yoti ku'no kalolekeya mpaka aibone.
15.9: Mana aibweni, aakema mambwiga na bandu ba papipi nakwe no baya, ‘Munapusike pamope nanenga kwa mwanjaa niibweni yi'lu' ela yangu' yayaobite.’
15.10: Na mwenga nendakummakia, ngamo baanapusika malaika ba Nnu'ngu' kwa kummona mwene sambi yumo kammuyangania Nnu'ngu'.” Lukongo lwa mwana ywaobite
15.11: Yesu aayendeli longela, “Kwai na mundu yumo aabile na bana abi'li' analu'me.
15.12: Yu'lu' nnuna aabakie tati' bake, ‘Tati', mumbei ulisi wangu'.’ Nembe ayi'ki'ti kwabagana mali yake.
15.13: Gaapite masu'ba bai, yu'lu' nnuna aapi'miye ulisi wake no yabwa mwanja wa nni'ma wa kuutalu na yi'lu' mbanje yaapatike. Akwo, aatikwinyamana yi'lu' mbanje.
15.14: Payomwi tumya kila kikowe, kwapitike njala ngali' kunni'ma wu'lu', nembe ngatumbwa auka kwo pala kilyo.
15.15: Aalu'bike kibalua kwa mundu yumo ywa kunni'ma wo, nembe aampei lyengo lyo kwapeya yakulya magu'be kunng'unda wake.
15.16: Aminyikiage ata lya makabanda gabalyage magu'be mwanjaa, aabile ntu'pu' mundu ywa kumpeya kilyo sosoti.
15.17: Paapatike malango aatigania, ‘Mboni kwa tati' bangu' kubile na apangakasi baingi babalya no igaya, nenga niwaa njala?
15.18: Nilu'a buyangania kwa tati' bangu' na kwabakia, Tati', ninkosile Nnu'ngu' na mwenga.
15.19: Nili'nganili ata kemelwa na mwana winu. Munipange kati yumo ywa apangakasi binu.’
15.20: Bai, ngatumbwa mwanja wo buyangania kwa tati' bake. Kaegelya pakaya tati' pabamweni mwana, bammi'ki kiya, ngabammutukya, kunkumbatya na kunnonia.
15.21: “Mwana aabakie tati' bake, ‘Tati', ninkosile Nnu'ngu' na mwenga. Nili'nganili ata kemelwa na mwana winu.’
15.22: Lakini tati' bake ngaabakia apangakasi bake, ‘Kiyu'ngu'ya! Mulete ngu'bo inannoga mukang'walike! Mung'walike lupete na ilatu.
15.23: Musinje likinda lyalinenipe tulye no panga si'li'ku'si'li'ku'!
15.24: Kwa mwanjaa ayu' mwana wangu' aatiwaa, kumbe balo mwu'mi, aatioba, lakini nambi'yambi' abonekine.’ Batumbwi si'li'ku'si'li'ku'.
15.25: “Pagapangikage go, nku'we aai anagobwali bu'ka kunng'unda. Paabile mundi'la kaegelya pansengo, ngayu'wa ilulu na ngoma.
15.26: Ankemite mpangakasi yumo na kunnaluya, ‘Kubile na namani?’
15.27: Aywo mpangakasi, aatikunnyangwa, ‘Nnunago agobwile na tati' binu bansinjili likinda lyaliatike, kwa mwanjaa amweni abile salama salimini.’
15.28: Aywo nku'we ngausika, aakani ata yingya nnyumba. Tati' bake pabaapiti panja, baatikuntebeya ayingi nnyumba.
15.29: Lakini ywembe annyangwi, ‘Linga! Myaka yoti nitikuntumikia kati nammanda winu, nati'kwanali amuli yinu ata lisu'ba limo! Munipei namani? Munanipeyali ata likinda lya mbwi yumo, nani nipange si'li'ku'si'li'ku' na mambwiga bangu'!
15.30: Lakini mwana winu yu', ywalile mali yinu kwo nyamana li'no isa bai munsinjile li'lu' likinda lyalinenipe!’
15.31: Tati' bake batikunnyangwa, ‘Wamwana wangu', wenga ubile pamope nanenga masu'ba goti na kila sanibile naso sako.
15.32: Twaapalikwe tupange si'li'ku'si'li'ku' no napusika, kwa mwanjaa ayu' nnunago aatiwaa, kumbe balo mwu'mi, aatioba, lakini nambi'yambi', abonekine.’ ”

16.1: Yesu ngaabakia banamasi' bake, “Tayili yumo aabile na mwandiki wake. Aywo mwandiki aatisongelwa mwanjaa, aatinyamana mali ya tayili wake.
16.2: Yu'lu' tayili ngankema na kummakia, ‘Aga makowe gaku' ganigayu'wa kasako? Upiye na ubalange mabi'ko na matumyo kwa mwanjaa ukombwali panga wamwandiki wangu' kai'.’
16.3: Yu'lu' mwandiki ngagania, ‘Bwana wangu' anibi'ngite mulyengo lya uandiki, nipange buli? Yenda li'ma nikombwali no lu'balu'ba kati nki'ba oni.
16.4: Bai nitangite lyo panga, li'nga panabi'ngi'lwa mulyengo bandu banikemi kasabe.’
16.5: Bai ngaakema yumoyumo babalongelwage na bwana wake, ngammakia yu'lu' ywalongolile. ‘Ulongelwa ili'nga na bwana wangu'?’
16.6: Ywembe ngannyangwa, ‘Ilu'yo mya ya mauta ga njaituni.’ Yu'lu' mwandiki ngammakia, ‘Utole seti sako solongelwa na wandike amusini.’
16.7: Bu'kapo ngannaluya ywi'ngi', ‘Wenga ulongelwa ili'nga?’ Ngannyangwa, ‘Mabunia mya ga ngano.’ Yu'lu' mwandiki ngammakia, ‘Utole seti sako solongelwa na wandike samanini.’
16.8: “Bai, yu'lu' bwana aatikunnumba aywo mwandiki ywangaaminika, kwa mwanjaa atumi malango na ung'anga. Kwa mwanjaa bandu ba dunia yi'no bai na malango na ung'anga muno mumakowe gabe, kuliko bandu ba mubweya.”
16.9: Yesu ngayendelya baya, “Nimmakianga, mwipangi mambwiga bu'kana na mali ya dunia, li'nga pamwayomokelwa, baampokyange muutamo wangayomoka.
16.10: Ywoywoti ywau'bi'li'ka mumakowe masene, aau'bi'li'ka mumakowe maku'lu' na ywa kotoka au'bi'li'ka mumakowe masene, mumakowe maku'lu' aau'bi'li'kali.
16.11: Bai, mana mutei mwu'bi'li'kali kwa mali ya ulau ya padunia, nyai ywalu'a kunkamukia mali ya kakape?
16.12: Mana mutei mwu'bi'li'kali mumali ya mundu ywi'ngi', nyai ywalu'a kunkamukia mali yinu mwabene?
16.13: “Ntu'pu' ntumisi ywakombwa kwatumikia mabwana abi'li', kwa mwanjaa alu'a kunsukwa yumo na kumpenda ywi'ngi' au ayi'ki'tyana na yumo na kunsalawa ywi'ngi'. Mukombwali kuntumikia Nnu'ngu' na mali.” Milongelo ya Yesu (Mat 11:12-13, 5:31-32, Mal 10:11-12)
16.14: Mafalisayo pabagayu'wine go nabembe baai apenda mbanje, ngabansalawa Yesu.
16.15: Apo ngaabakia, “Mwenga mwilaya pabandu, panga mwaannogau, lakini Nnu'ngu' aitangite myoyo yinu. Kwa mwanjaa sakibonekana sangama pabandu, Nnu'ngu' akibona undi bai.
16.16: “Salya na maandiko ga alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' gaabile mpaka nsimu wa Yoani Ywabatisage. Bu'kapo, Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' wendaalilwa, na kila mundu auyingya kwa makakala.
16.17: Nantali kunani na dunia pi'ta, kuliko bu'yi'lwa liyi'gi'yo limo lya salya.
16.18: “Ywoywoti ywampeya nnyumbowe talaka no kobeka ywi'ngi', apanga upege, na ywoywoti ywankobeka nnwawa ywapeyilwe talaka, apanga upege. Tayili na Lasali
16.19: “Pai na mundu yumo tayili, ywawalage ngu'bo ya bei ngu'lu' ya lukanda lwa sambalau. Mundu ywo atumyage mbanje yambone kila lisu'ba.
16.20: Na paniango wa ywo tayili kwai na nki'ba yumo lina lyake Lasali, ywabile na mabanga.
16.21: Lasali aminyikiage peyelwa mbolotya yaitu'mbu'ka pamesa ya aywo tayili, kai' mapwa bendeisa no lambata mabanga gake.
16.22: “Bai, yu'lu' nki'ba paawile, malaika ngabantola na kummi'ka pakyuba sa Bulaimu. Na yu'lu' tayili nembe ngawaa no sikilwa.
16.23: Aywo tayili, aai mungu'su'mbu' akwo kumambi', palolekiye kunani, ngammona Bulaimu kuutalu abile nakwe Lasali.
16.24: Bai, ngakema, ‘Tati' Bulaimu, mumbi'ki kiya, muntume Lasali asuye lukonji lwake mumasi', aniu'lu'ki'ye mululimi lwangu', kwa mwanjaa nendalumya muno mumwoto gu'no.’
16.25: Bulaimu ngannyangwa, ‘Mwana wangu', uku'mbu'ki wapoki ganannoga mubwu'mi wako, lakini Lasali apoki maakau. Nambi'yambi' nembe endapu'mu'lya nawenga wendalumya.
16.26: Na kai', pakati yitu na mwenga pabi'kilwe lyi'mbwa liku'lu', li'nga babapala isa kwinu bu'ka ku'no kanebakombwe na babapala bu'ka kwinu isa kwitu kanebakombwe.’
16.27: Yu'lu' ywabile tayili ngabaya, ‘Bai Tati', ninnu'ba muntume Lasali ayende pansengo wa tati' bangu',
16.28: kwa mwanjaa nibi na aku'bangu' batano, akaakwi'li'ke, baakaneisa pandu pano pene ngu'su'mbu'.’
16.29: Lakini Bulaimu ngayangwa, ‘Aku'bo babi na Musa na alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', waleke baapi'kani bo.’
16.30: Lakini ywembe ngabaya, ‘Nyinyoli tati' Bulaimu, ila mundu mana aayu'ka bu'ka kumambi' no yenda kwakwi'li'ka, baagalambuka.’
16.31: Bulaimu ngabaya, ‘Mana baayu'wali Musa na alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', ata mundu ywaayu'ka bannyu'wali.’ ”

17.1: Apo, Yesu ngaabakia banamasi' bake, “Inonwipe kotoka pitya iku'balo ya sambi, lakini akibona yu'lu' ywalu'a piya iku'balo ya kumpangia mundu sambi.
17.2: Mundu kati ywo yai nantali kuntabya liwe lya lwaga paingo na kuntumbukia mubaali, kulikoni kumpangia sambi yumo ywa anangu'ta ba.
17.3: Mwili'ndi'le, ‘Manaitei nnongo akukosile, unkwi'li'ke na mana akuyu'wine unsami.’
17.4: Na mana akukosya mala saba kwa lisu'ba na kukuki'li'bu'kya kwo lu'ba nsama mala saba ipalikwa unsami.” Imani
17.6: Bwana ngayangwa, “Mukaba na imani alau njene kati lupeke lwa nkongo wa aladali, mupekombwa kuubakia nku'yu' gu', uyokoke na ukayokekelwe mubaali na wembe ulu'e kunnyu'wa. Makowe ga ntumisi
17.7: “Tubaye mundu yumo ai na ntumisi ywali'ma nng'unda au sunga ngondolo. Buli, paabuya kwo, alu'a kummakia ntumisi, ‘Uegeli kiyu'ngu'ya saulye?’
17.8: Lili! Alu'a kummakia, ‘Uniyupuli kilyo na wibi'ke wiso kwo ndumikia mpaka panaayomwa lya no nywa, nga wenga walye no nywa.’
17.9: Mulu'e kummakiali posaa aywo ntumisi kwa mwanjaa apangite kati mwaabakiyilwe?
17.10: Na mwenga nyinyonyo pamwayomwa panga goti gamubayilwe, mwabaye, ‘Twenga twatumisi bai, tupangite galu' gatupalikwe tupange.’ ” Yesu apeletea bene matana ku'mi
17.11: Yesu paabile mumwanja kayenda ku Yelusalemu, api'ti mumipaka ya ku Samalia na ku Galilaya.
17.12: Paabile kaika pakilambo simo, akwembine na bandu ku'mi bene matana, bayi'mi kuutalu.
17.13: Ngabatu'ndu'bi'ya malobe kababaya, “Yesu, wa Mpi'ndo, utubi'ki kiya!”
17.14: Paabweni ngaabakia, “Muyende mukailaye kwa api'ndo ba dini.” Bai, pabaabile kabayenda, ngabapeleteka.
17.15: Yumo mukipi'nga sabe paibweni apeletike, aatiki'li'bu'ka kannumba na kunkwi'ya Nnu'ngu' kwa lilobe liku'lu'.
17.16: Agonjike pai' wakukama nnu'ngi' ya magu'lu' ga Yesu ku'no kansukulu. Aywo aai Nsamalia.
17.17: Apo Yesu ngalaluya, “Nengite naapeletiye bandu ku'mi? Balu' kenda bai kwaku'?
17.18: Abonekineli ywi'ngi' ywaki'li'bwike kunsukulu Nnu'ngu' ila aywo nng'eni Nsamalia bai?”
17.19: Yesu ngammakia aywo mundu, “Uyi'me, uyende kasako, imani yako ikupeletiye.” Isa kwa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' (Mat 24:23-28,37-41)
17.20: Nsimu gumo Mafalisayo bannalwiye Yesu, “Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' waisa pakubawi?” Ywembe ngayangwa, “Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' wisali kwo bonekana.
17.21: Wala ntu'pu' ywakombwa baya, ‘Wi pano,’ au', ‘Wi palu'.’ Kwa mwanjaa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' wi nkati yinu.”
17.22: Bu'kapo ngaabakia banamasi' bake, “Masu'ba gendaisa pamwalu'a minyikia kulibona lisu'ba limo lya Mwana wa Mundu, lakini mwalibonali.
17.23: Bandu balu'a kummakianga, ‘Ai palu'!’ au, ‘Ai pano!’ Lakini mwenga kanemwabu'ke wala kanemwaki'ngame.
17.24: Maana kati njai mwaibeyulya ngamwalyalu'a baa lisu'ba lya Mwana wa Mundu.
17.25: Lakini alu'a tumbwa wi'ti' baa mungu'su'mbu' no kanilwa na lubelekwo lu'no.
17.26: Kati mwawabile nsimu wa Nuu, ngamwawalu'a baa nsimu wa masu'ba ga Mwana wa Mundu.
17.27: Bandu baayendeli lya no nywa, kobeka no ku'nda mpaka nsimu wa Nuu payingi musapina. Ngaupita nkukulo no langanyika boti.
17.28: Yapanga kati mwayabile kwa Lutu. Bandu bai kabalya no nywa, pi'ma no pi'mi'ya, kena no senga.
17.29: Lisu'ba li'lu' lyabu'i Lutu Sodoma, mwoto wa bwaluti na kibi'li'tu' watei kwenda nia, kati ula kauluka bu'ka kunani, na kwalangamisa boti.
17.30: Ngamwalyalu'a baa lisu'ba li'lu' lyoumukulwa Mwana wa Mundu.
17.31: “Lisu'ba lyo, ywoywoti ywalu'a baa pamwagala kaneauluke yenda tola mali yake nnyumba na ywalu'a baa kunng'unda kaneaki'li'bu'ke nsu'gu'.
17.33: Ywoywoti ywapala kuukosopolya bwu'mi wake alu'a kuobeya na ywoywoti ywaalu'a kuuobeya alu'a kuukosopolya.
17.34: Nimmakianga panga, lisu'ba lyo bandu abi'li' baagonja pamope, yumo atolelwa na ywi'ngi' alekelwa.
17.35: -36 Alwawa abi'li' bapanga pamope kabayaga, atolelwa yumo na ywi'ngi' alekelwa.”
17.37: Apo nga bannaluya, “Bwana, nga kwaku'?” Naywembe ngaabakia, “Papabile na ntwi ngapabakongolekana tai.”

18.1: Bu'kapo Yesu aasimuli lukongo li'nga kwalaya panga ipalikwa lu'ba Nnu'ngu' kila lisu'ba pangali totokelwa.
18.2: Ngabaya, “Munni'ma gumo kwai na akimu ywangali kunkilikitya Nnu'ngu' wala kumpi'kania mundu.
18.3: Munni'ma wowowo, kai' kwai na mau' yumo nng'wi'li'kwa na nsengowe, ywakoyage kwa akimu ywo kunnu'ba li'nga apate aki yake bu'ka kwa nndumu wake.
18.4: Kwa masu'ba gambone aywo akimu apendili kumpeya aki yake yu'lu' nng'wi'li'kwa, lakini kuundi'la ngaibakia, ‘Pamope no panga nenga ninkilikityali Nnu'ngu' wala napi'kaniali bandu,
18.5: lakini kwa mwanjaa nng'wi'li'kwa yu' endaniauya, nilu'a kumpeya. Mana ngotwike aayendelya kuniauya mpaka totokelwa!’ ”
18.6: Bai, Bwana ngayendelya baya, “Mupi'kaniange mwaalongei yu'lu' akimu nnau.
18.7: Mubaya, Nnu'ngu' alu'a kotoka kwayi'mya balu' baasawile, babanni'lya kilo na muntwekati? Aselewa kwapi'kania?
18.8: Nimmakianga alu'a kwayi'mya kiyu'ngu'ya. Nsimu waaisa Mwana wa Mundu alu'a kwikwemba imani padunia?” Lukongo lwa Mfalisayo na nnonga koli
18.9: Na Yesu ngaabakia kai' lukongo balu' babaibona anogau na kwasalawa bi'ngi'.
18.10: “Bandu abi'li' baayi'i lu'ba kulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'. Yumo aai Mfalisayo na ywi'ngi' nnonga koli.
18.11: Aywo Mfalisayo ngayi'ma pakisake no lu'ba, ‘Wa Nnu'ngu', nendakusukulu kwa mwanjaa nenga, kati bandu bi'ngi' lili, bababile abwimi, abu'su' na apege. Kai' nenga kati ayu' nnonga koli lili.
18.12: Nenga nendapunga mala ibi'li' kwa juma, nipiya salaka na saka ya mabi'ko gangu'.’
18.13: Lakini yu'lu' nnonga koli, ngayi'ma kuutalu na aakombwili tu'ndu'bi'a minyo gake kunani, ila aatikotima no ku'ku'li'ka kabaya, ‘Wa Nnu'ngu', unibi'ki kiya nenga na mwene sambi.’
18.14: Nimmakianga, yu'lu' nnonga koli aki'li'bu'ki kaya asamilwe. Lakini yu'lu' ywi'ngi', asamilweli. Kwa mwanjaa ywaiu'bu'ya aulu'yi'lwa na ywaiuluya au'bu'yi'lwa.” Yesu abaliki bana anangu'ta (Mat 19:13-15, Mal 10:13-16)
18.15: Bandu ngabannetya Yesu bana anangu'ta li'nga akunywe kwa maboko li'nga kwaayalya. Banamasi' pabaabweni, baatikwakanikiya kwa ukali'.
18.16: Lakini Yesu aatikwakema ngabaya, “Mwaleke abo bana baise kasangu', kanemwakanikie, kwa mwanjaa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' nga wa bandu kati baa.
18.17: Nimmakianga kakape, mundu ywoywoti ywakotoka pokya Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' kati bana anangu'ta, ayingyali mu Ukulungwa wo.” Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' na utayili (Mat 19:16-30, Mal 10:17-31)
18.18: Kolongosi yumo wa Kiyahudi, ngannaluya Yesu, “Mwalimu nnogau, nipange buli li'nga niupate ukoto wangayomoka?”
18.19: Yesu ngammakia, “Mboni unikema na nnogau? Ntu'pu' ywai nnogau ila Nnu'ngu' kisake.
18.20: Uitangite amuli, ‘Keneube wampege, Kaneubulage, kaneuyibe, Keneukong'ondeli makowe ga ubu'su', waisimu tati' na mau' bako.’ ”
18.21: Ywembe ngabaya, “Ago goti nigakamwile bu'ka kuunangu'ta wangu'.”
18.22: Yesu pagayu'wine go, ngammakia, “Balo upalikwa panga kili'be simo. Upi'mi'ye kila kili'be sobile naso na kwabagana aki'ba mbanje yo na walu'a ba na amana kunani, bu'kapo uniki'ngame.”
18.23: Yu'lu' mundu paagayu'wine go, aatinyopa muno kwa mwanjaa aai tayili muno.
18.24: Yesu paamweni kanyopa muno, ngabaya, “Atayili yingya mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' kunonwipe.
18.25: Male ngamiya yingya mulipoyo lya singano, kulikoni tayili yingya mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
18.26: Balu' bandu pabagayu'wine go, ngababaya, “Nyai ywalu'a kosopolelwa?”
18.27: Yesu ngayangwa, “Gagakotoka kombolwa na mundu, kwa Nnu'ngu' gendakombolwa.”
18.28: Nembe Petili ngannaluya, “Na twenga, buli? Tuilei ili'be yitu yoti tukuki'ngime wenga!”
18.29: Yesu ngaabakia, “Kakape nimmakianga, mundu ywoywoti ywaulei nsengo wake, au nnyumbowe, au nnongowe, au abelei bake, au bana kitumbu sa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu',
18.30: alu'a pokya gambone nambi'yambi' na ukoto wangayomoka pawaisa.” Yesu alongela pampanda patatu kwa kiwo na uyu'ki wake (Mat 20:17-19, Mal 10:32-34)
18.31: Yesu ngayenda nabo pambwega balu' ku'mi na abi'li' ngaabakia, “Mupi'kani wi'ti'! Tuyenda ku Yelusalemu na akwo, kila sakiandikilwe na alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' kwa Mwana wa Mundu kikatimya.
18.32: Kwa mwanjaa alu'a kamukiyilwa kwa bandu bangali Ayahudi nabembe balu'a kunsalanga, kumpwi'wa na kumwunia mataa.
18.33: Balu'a kunku'mbwa bokola na kummulaga, lakini lisu'ba lyenetatu alu'a yu'ka.”
18.34: Lakini bembe bakwipwili likowe lyo ata pasene, kwa mwanjaa sateiyilwa kikomekeyo sa makowe go na baatangiteli gagaalongelikwe. Yesu antepwa mbulibuli ku Yeliko (Mat 20:29-34, Mal 10:46-52)
18.35: Yesu pai papipi na ku Yeliko, kwai na mundu yumo mbulibuli atami mundi'la kalu'balu'ba.
18.36: Paayu'wine lipi'nga lya bandu kalipi'ta ngalaluya, “Kubile na ki'li'?”
18.38: Naywembe ngatu'ndu'bi'ya lilobe kabaya, “Yesu, Mwana wa Daudi, unibi'ki kiya!”
18.39: Balu' babaalongolile, ngabankwi'li'ka na kummakia atame liki. Lakini ywembe ngayendelya tu'ndu'bi'ya lilobe, “Mwana wa Daudi, unibi'ki kiya!”
18.40: Yesu ngayi'ma na kwabakia panga bannete nnu'ngi' yake. Palu' yu'lu' mbulibuli paikite papipi, Yesu ngannaluya,
18.41: “Upala nikupangi ki'li'?” Naywembe ngannyangwa, “Bwana, nilu'ba nikombwe lola.”
18.43: Na popopo aywo mbulibuli aakombwi lola, ngaanki'ngama Yesu kankwi'ya Nnu'ngu'. Na bandu boti pabagabweni go, bannumbike Nnu'ngu'.

19.1: Yesu aikite kunni'ma wa ku Yeliko, ngapi'ta mumali'la ga nni'ma wo.
19.2: Akwo kwai na mundu yumo ywakemelwa Zakayo, aywo aai mundu nku'lu' ywa alonga koli, kai' aai tayili.
19.3: Apalage kummona Yesu, lakini akombwili kummona kwa mwanjaa bandu bai baingi na kyi'mo sake sai kipi.
19.4: Kwa nyo, aabutuki nnu'ngi' no u'bu'ka munku'yu' li'nga ammone Yesu, kwa mwanjaa api'ti ndi'la yi'lu'.
19.5: Bai, Yesu paikite palu', ngalola kunani ngammakia, “Zakayo, uuluke kiyu'mbi'ti'ka, kwa mwanjaa li'no nipalikwa ngapiliye kasako.”
19.6: Apo Zakayo ngauluka kiyu'ngu'ya na kunkemya kasake kwo napusika.
19.7: Bandu boti pabagabweni go, ngabaku'ku'li'ka no baya, “Ayi'i tama na mundu mwene sambi.”
19.8: Zakayo ngayi'ma na kummakia Yesu, “Bwana, upi'kani! Nenga lisinda lya mali yangu' nalu'a kwapeya aki'ba na mana nampokonywi mundu kili'be, nalu'a kunki'li'bu'ki'ya mala nsese.”
19.9: Yesu ngammakia, “Li'no ukosopoli wi pansengo gu'no, kwa mwanjaa ayu' naywembe nga ywa lukolo lwa Bulaimu.
19.10: Kwa mwanjaa Mwana wa Mundu aisi pala no kosopolya babaobite.” Lukongo lwa atumisi ku'mi (Mat 25:14-30)
19.11: Apo Yesu paabile kaegelya ku Yelusalemu. Bandu babampi'kaniage baganiage panga yaigali pasene bai Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' ulu'e isa.
19.12: Kwa nyo, Yesu ngaabakia lukongo lu'no, “Kwai na mundu ywalukolo lwa kikulungwa ywayabwi mwanja, yenda kunni'ma wa kuutalu li'nga pokya utawala wa ukulungwa no buya.
19.13: Bai, wai kaapala bu'ka, ngaakema wi'ti' atumisi bake ku'mi na kwapeya mbanje kila mundu na kwabakia, ‘Mupangi nsuluso mpaka panabuya.’
19.14: Lakini bandu ba palu' baatikunsukwa kwa nyo ngabatuma bandu bayende ku'lu' bakabaye, ‘Tukana kututawala yu'.’
19.15: “Aywo mundumuko aabuyangani kaya wayomwi pokya ukulungwa, popopo ngaabakia balu' atumisi baapei mbanje bakemelwe li'nga atange panga kila mundu abeliye ili'nga.
19.16: Ntumisi ywalongolile ngapitya, ngabaya, ‘Bwana, nibeliye ku'mi yi'ngi' ya mbanje yawanipeile.’
19.17: Naywembe ngammakia, ‘Unogie, wenga nga wantumisi nnogau. Kwa mwanjaa upangite kinannoga mumakowe masene, ulu'a panga wa kolongosi muilambo ku'mi.’
19.18: Ntumisi ywenebi'li' ngaisa kabaya, ‘Bwana, nibeliye yi'ngi' tano ya yi'lu' mbanje yawanipeile.’
19.19: Naywembe ngammakia, ‘Nawenga kai', ulu'a panga wa kolongosi muilambo tano.’
19.20: “Ntumisi ywi'ngi' ngaisa kabaya, ‘Bwana, utole mbanje yako, natiiya wiso mukitambala.
19.21: Naatiyogopa kwa mwanjaa wenga wa mundu nkali'. Wenga utola yangali yako na uuna yangali kena.’
19.22: Naywembe ngammakia, ‘Malongelo gako galaya makosa gako, wenga wantumisi nnau! Waatangite panga nenga nankali', nitola yangali yangu' na niuna yangali kena.
19.23: Kwa mwanjaa ki'li', ukotwike bi'ka mbanje yangu' kwa bababeleya, nanenga kibuyo nikaisa tola yaibeleyilwe?’
19.24: Apo ngaabakia balu' bababile palu', ‘Mumpokonywe ayo mbanje, mukampei yu'lu' ywabeliye ku'mi yi'ngi'.’
19.25: Bembe ngabammakia, ‘Lakini Bwana, aywo abile na mali yambone muno!’
19.26: Ywembe ngayangwa, ‘Kila ywabile na kili'be nga ywapeyelwa no yongekeyelwa. Lakini yu'lu' ywangali ba naso kili'be, ata si'lu' sabile naso saatolelwa.
19.27: Na nambi'yambi', babanisukwa na babanikana nibe na nkulungwa wabe, mwalete pano, na mwabulage papanopano nnu'ngi' yangu'.’ ” Yesu ayingya ku Yelusalemu kwa si'li'ku'si'li'ku' (Mat 21:1-11, Mal 11:1-11, Yoa 12:12-19)
19.28: Yesu paayomwi longela go, aatilongolya kalongokeya ku Yelusalemu,
19.29: paaegeli Bethfage na Betania papipi na Kitu'mbi' sa Minjaituni, aatumike banamasi' bake abi'li',
19.30: ngaabakia, “Muyende kukilambo sakibile nnu'ngi' yinu. Pamwayingya mukilambo, mukankolya mwana mbu'nda ywangakolelelwa na mundu atabilwe. Mumundwe, munnete pano.
19.31: Mana alu'a kunnaluya mundu mwanjaa ki'li' mumundwa, mwammakie, ‘Bwana endakumpala.’ ”
19.32: Bai, babatumilwe ngabayenda na baakoli kati mwabaabakiyilwe na Yesu.
19.33: Pabaabile kabamundwa yu'lu' mwana wa mbu'nda, bene ngabaalaluya, “Kwa mwanjaa ki'li' mumundwa mwana mbu'nda yu'?”
19.35: Bai, ngabampelekya Yesu yu'lu' mwana mbu'nda. Bu'kapo ngabatandika magu'bo gabe panani ya mbu'nda na kumwu'bu'ya Yesu panani yake.
19.36: Yesu payendeli na mwanja, bandu baatandike magu'bo gabe musimbasimba.
19.37: Paaegeli ku Yelusalemu pabwelyo wa Kitu'mbi' sa Minjaituni, lipi'nga lya banamasi' bake ngabatumbwa kwi'ndi'lya na kunkwi'ya Nnu'ngu' kwa lilobe liku'lu', kwa mwanjaa ya makowe maku'lu' gabagabweni.
19.38: Ngababaya, “Ayaliwite Nkulungwa ywaisa kwa lina lya Bwana! Amani kunani, utukupu kwa Nnu'ngu' ywabile kunani!”
19.39: Apo Mafalisayo bi'ngi' babaabile mu'lu' mulipi'nga lya bandu ngabammakia Yesu, “Mwalimu, wakanikie banamasi' bako kanebapange ndu'ti!”
19.40: Yesu ngayangwa, “Nimmakianga, mana bakotwike bembe, ata maliwe galu'a kwi'ndi'lya.” Yesu akili'lya kilambo sa ku Yelusalemu
19.41: Paaegeli muno na kuubona nni'ma gu'lu' Yesu aatikuuli'lya.
19.42: Ngabaya, “We Yelusalemu, Ukatangage li'noli'no makowe gagaleta amani! Lakini nambi'yambi' gaiyilwe paminyo yako.
19.43: Kwa mwanjaa masu'ba gendaisa, babakusukwa bakuti'ti'li'ki'a maboma, na kukuibya ndi'la wakane kosopolelwa.
19.44: Bakutimbatimba wenga pamope na bana bako bababile nkati ya ingu'mbi' yako, baakulekyali ata liwe limo panani ya li'ngi', kwa mwanjaa wautangiteli nsimu Nnu'ngu' paakwisili kukuyangatiya.” Yesu ayingya mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' (Mat 21:12-17, Mal 11:15-19, Yoa 2:13-22)
19.45: Bu'kapo, Yesu aayingi mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' no tumbwa kwabi'nga asulusi,
19.46: Nembe ngabaya, “Iandikilwe, ‘Nyumba yangu' yapanga nyumba yo salilya,’ lakini mwenga muipangite ibe mbango ya apokonyoli.”
19.47: Yesu aai kayi'gana mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' kila lisu'ba. Api'ndo ba dini, balimu ba salya na alongosi ba bandu baapalike kummulaga.
19.48: Lakini bai ntu'pu' lyopanga, mwanjaa bandu boti baai kabampi'kania muno.

20.1: Lisu'ba limo, Yesu waabile kaayi'gana bandu mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' na kwaalya makowe ganannoga, api'ndo ba dini, balimu ba salya pamope na agoi baatiisa,
20.2: ngababaya, “Utubakie! Upanga makowe ga goti kwa utawala waku', kai' nyai ywakupei utawala gu'?”
20.4: utawala wa Yoani Ywabatisage wabu'kite kwa Nnu'ngu' au bandu?”
20.5: Lakini bembe ngababakiana nnyanya, “Mana tubaite ubu'kite kwa Nnu'ngu', ywembe alu'a tulaluya, ‘Mboni mumwu'bi'li lili?’
20.6: Na mana tubaite ubu'kite kwa mundu, bandu boti ba pano batuku'mbwa maliwe, kwa mwanjaa boti bau'bi'lile panga Yoani aai nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu'.”
20.7: Bai, ngabammakia, “Tutangiteli utawala wo wabu'kite kwaku'.”
20.8: Yesu ngaabakia, “Ata nenga nimmakiangali nigapanga makowe ga kwa utawala waku'.” Lukongo lwa nng'unda wa minjabibu na aku'li'ma (Mat 21:33-46, Mal 12:1-12)
20.9: Yesu ngayendelya kwabakia bandu lukongo lu'no, “Mundu yumo ali'mike nng'unda wa minjabibu, na ayaiki aku'li'ma kwa mali'po no yabwa mwanja mpaka kilambo sa kuutalu, atami kwo kwa masu'ba ganambone.
20.10: Pa mauno, mundu ywo ngantuma ntumisi wake kwa balu' aku'li'ma bammauli lipungu lya itunda lya mauno ga nng'unda wa minjabibu. Lakini balu' aku'li'ma baatikunku'mbwa ntumisi ywo na kunki'li'bu'ya moko gabule.
20.11: Yu'lu' bwana ngantuma kai' ntumisi ywi'ngi', lakini bembe ngabanku'mbwa, bampangi makowe ga oni na kunki'li'bu'ya moko gabule.
20.12: Ngaantuma kai' ywenetatu, aywo ywembe pabannumiye ngabantaikulya paungo.
20.13: Yu'lu' mwene nng'unda ngabaya, ‘Nilu'a panga buli? Nalu'a kuntuma mwana wangu' ywanimpendile, kwaali' ywembe balu'a kunnyu'wa.’
20.14: Balu' aku'li'ma pabamweni bai, ngababakiana, ‘Ayu' ngalu'a tola ulisi wake, kwa nyo tummulage li'nga ulisi wo upange witu.’
20.15: Bai, ngabampiya paungo ya nng'unda wa minjabibu na kummulaga.” Yesu ngalaluya, “Yu'lu' mwene nng'unda alu'a kwapanga buli balu' aku'li'ma?
20.16: Alu'a isa kwabulaga aku'li'ma bo na kwapeya aku'li'ma bi'ngi' nng'unda wo wa minjabibu.” Bandu wabayu'wine makowe go ngababaya, “Lili! Kanegapite ata pasene!”
20.17: Lakini Yesu ngaabu'nju'lya minyo na kwabakia, “Bai, Maandiko Mapeleteu gaalomboli ki'li'? ‘Liwe lyabalikani asengi, nambi'yambi' lipangite liwe liku'lu' lya pakitumembe!’
20.18: Mundu ywoywoti ywatu'mbu'ka panani ya liwe lyo ati'kwanika ipandeipande na mana lintu'mbu'ki mundu ywoywoti, lyantimba.” Li'pa koli kwa Kaisali (Mat 22:15-22, Mal 12:13-17)
20.19: Balimu ba salya na api'ndo ba dini baatangite panga lukongo lwo lwali'ngage bembe, kwa nyo bapalage kummoywa papalu'palu', ila bayogwipe bandu.
20.20: Bai, ngabaupala nsimu waupwaika. Ngabaatuma bandu baku'pi'ki'ye panga anogau, bampekeseni Yesu kwa kunnaluya, li'nga bammoywe na kunkamukia kwa alongosi ba silikali.
20.21: Bandu bo ngabammakia, “Mwalimu, tutangite panga wendalongela no yi'gana makowe ga kakape, kai' wenga ubawali bandu, uyi'gana kakape ndi'la ya Nnu'ngu'.
20.22: Bai, utubakie yendayi'ki'ti'lwa mu salya ya Musa li'pa koli kwa Kaisali?”
20.24: “Munilaye lwela, lubile na kuminyo ya nyai?”
20.25: Nabembe ngabannyangwa, “Kuminyo ya Kaisali.” Yesu ngaabakia, “Bai, ga Kaisali mumpei Kaisali, ga Nnu'ngu' mumpei Nnu'ngu'.”
20.26: Bakombwili kunnyonja kwa likowe lyolyoti palu' pa bandu, kwa nyo ngabatama liki no sangala mwaayangwile. Makowe go uyu'ki (Mat 22:23-33, Mal 12:18-27)
20.27: Bu'kapo Masadukayo, bababaya panga babawile bayu'kali, bamwisili Yesu, ngababaya,
20.28: “Mwalimu, Musa atuandiki panga manaitei mundu nsi'si' awile na annei nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa wangali bana, nnunawe apalikwa antole ywo nnwawa li'nga ampapi nku'we bana.
20.29: Ngaipanga, nsimu gumo kwai na akingolo saba. Yu'lu' nku'lu' aatikobeka no waa wangali mwana.
20.30: Yu'lu' nnuna ywenebi'li' ywantweti yu'lu' nng'wi'li'kwa naywembe ngawaa kai',
20.31: na nnuna ywenetatu yai nyinyonyo. Makowe gai gagalu'galu' kwa boti saba, boti bawile wangali papa bana.
20.33: Lisu'ba lyabalu'a yu'yi'lwa babawile, nnwawa ywo apanga nnyumbo wa nyai? Kwa mwanjaa boti saba baankobike.”
20.34: Yesu ngaabakia, “Bandu ba nsimu gu'no kobeka no ku'nda,
20.35: lakini balu' bababalangilwa panga baapwaika yu'ka no tama na Nnu'ngu', baakobekali na baaku'ndali.
20.36: Kai', bawaali, kwa mwanjaa babaa kati malaika, no baa bana ba Nnu'ngu' kwa mwanjaa bayu'kite muuwi'li.
20.37: Lakini kwa mwanjaa kubile no yu'ka bu'ka kuuwi'li, ata Musa aayi'ki'tile. Mu Maandiko Mapeleteu ga si'lu' kiwi'mbi' sasabile kakiaka mwoto, kaantambwa Bwana kati ‘Nnu'ngu' wa Bulaimu, Nnu'ngu' wa Isaka, na Nnu'ngu' wa Yakobi.’
20.38: Bai, ywembe Nnu'ngu' ywa awi'li lili, ywembe Nnu'ngu' ywa balu' bababile bau'mi, kwa mwanjaa kasake boti bendalama.”
20.39: Bi'ngi' ba balu' balimu ba salya ngababaya, “Mwalimu, mwoyangwile ngamwembe.”
20.40: Ntu'pu' mundu ywi'ngi' ywalowite kai' kunnaluya gi'ngi'. Makowe ga Kilisitu (Mat 22:41-46, Mal 12:35-37)
20.41: Yesu ngaalaluya, “Ibayilwa buli panga Kilisitu ywabayilwe nga mwana wa Daudi?
20.42: Daudi mwene abaya mu Zabuli, ‘Bwana Nnu'ngu' aammakie Bwana wangu', Utame kummalyo gangu',
20.43: mpaka panaalu'a kwabi'ka andumu bako pai' ya magu'lu' gako.’
20.44: “Daudi ankema Kilisitu ‘Bwana,’ kwa nyo, Kilisitu apangali mwana wake bai, ila Bwana wake kai'.” Yesu akwi'li'ka bandu kanebabe kati balimu ba salya (Mat 23:1-36, Mal 12:38-40)
20.45: Yesu ngaabakia banamasi' bake nnu'ngi' ya bandu boti,
20.46: “Mwili'ndi'le na balimu ba salya babapenda pi'tapi'ta bawalile makanju malaso. Bapendi pangilwa abali na bandu kwa isima kusoko no tama muitamo ya bandu bako, mu Nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' na mumasalaka.
20.47: 44 Bapokonywa alwawa awi'li'kwa ku'no kabaku'pi'ki'ya panga anogau kwo sali sala ndaso. Abo baapata ukumu ngu'lu'.”

21.1: Yesu aatikwalingia matayili, ngaabona kabayi'ya salaka yabe mulisanduku lya mbanje ya mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu',
21.2: ngammona mau' yumo nng'wi'li'kwa kayi'ya mo ela njene.
21.3: Bai, ngabaya, “Nimmakianga, mau' yu' nng'wi'li'kwa nki'ba ayi'i kiku'lu' mulisanduku kuliko sabayi'i bi'ngi' boti.
21.4: Kwa mwanjaa boti bo bapiyike salaka bu'kana na mali yabe yaipi'tile, lakini mau' yu' muuki'ba wake, ayi'i yoti yabile nayo.” Yesu alondwa sengwanilwa kwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' (Mat 24:1-2, Mal 13:1-2)
21.5: Bandu bi'ngi' balongelyage makowe ga Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', mwainemekilwe kwa maliwe ga samani, pamope na upo yaipiyilwe kwa Nnu'ngu'. Yesu ngabaya,
21.6: “Aga goti gamugabona, gaaisa masu'ba lyaigalali ata liwe limo panani ya li'ngi', kila kili'be sasengwanilwa.” Tabu na ngu'su'mbu' (Mat 24:3-14, Mal 13:3-13)
21.7: Bai, ngabannaluya, “Mwalimu, makowe go gapitya pakubawi? Na kikowe saku' sasalaya panga makowe go gaegelile pitya?”
21.8: Yesu ngaayangwa, “Mulinguli mwakanekongelwa. Kwa mwanjaa baingi baisa na kulitumya lina lyangu', kila mundu kabaya panga, ywembe nga nenga no panga nsimu gu'lu' wegelile. Lakini mwenga kanemwakoleye!
21.9: Bai, pamwagayu'wa makowe ga ngondo na mayu'mano, kanemwayogope, kwa mwanjaa ago gapalikwa gapi'te wi'ti', lakini matemulyo ga goti gaapanga balo.”
21.10: Bu'kapo ngayendelya longela, “Nni'ma gumo waku'mbwana na wi'ngi' na ukulungwa gumo waku'mbwana na wi'ngi'.
21.11: Kila pandu palu'a panga na malendemo maku'lu' ga bwi', njala na utamwe wa tauni. Kai' kwabaa na makowe maakau na myanju miku'lu' kunani.
21.12: Wangapitya ago goti, yalongolya wi'ti' kummoywa mwenga, kummi'ka mungu'su'mbu' no pwatilwa mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' na kunnyi'yanga muutabilwe. Mwapelekelwa nnu'ngi' ya akulungwa na atawala kwa mwanjaa ya lina lyangu'.
21.14: Mukangamale mumyoyo yinu, kanemwaganiye pamwapala kwikengya.
21.15: Kwa mwanjaa nenga namwene nilu'a kumpeyanga milongelo yene malango, ata andumu bako bakukombwali kai' bakutaukyali.
21.16: Abelei binu, anuna, alongo na mambwiga binu balu'a kunsongya mwenga na mwabi'ngi' mwalu'a bulagilwa.
21.17: Bandu boti balu'a kunsukwanga kwa mwanjaa wa lina lyangu'.
21.18: Lakini, ata lunywili lumo lwa mitwe yinu lwaobali.
21.19: Kwo komeya kwinu mwalu'a kosopolya bwu'mi winu. Yesu alondwa sengwanilwa kwa Yelusalemu (Mat 24:15-21, Mal 13:14-19)
21.20: “Pamwalu'a kukibona kilambo sa ku Yelusalemu kiti'li'tilwe na mayesi, bai mwatange panga nsimu wisile wo sengwanilwa kwa kilambo so.
21.21: Apo, bababile ku Yudea babutuki muitu'mbi', balu' bababile mukilambo babu'ke na balu' bababile kumigunda kanebaki'li'bu'ki kukilambo.
21.22: Kwa mwanjaa masu'ba go nga ga ukumu, li'nga goti gagaandikilwe mu Maandiko Mapeleteu gatimi.
21.23: Balu'a kibona atopelwe na babayongeya masu'ba go! Kwa mwanjaa kwalu'a baa na siki ngu'lu' munni'ma na nyongo ya Nnu'ngu' yalu'a kwaisilya bandu bo.
21.24: Bi'ngi' babulagilwa kwa lipanga, bi'ngi' batolelwa mateka mumili'ma yoti, na kilambo sa ku Yelusalemu sali'batilwa na bandu bangali Ayahudi, mpaka nsimu wabe pawayomokya. Isa kwa Mwana wa Mundu (Mat 24:29-31, Mal 13:24-27)
21.25: “Kwalu'a baa na myanju mulisu'ba, mwei, na ndondwa. Dunia yoti yaba musiki kwa kitumbu sa kyukala so bu'kana na mwago wo yu'gayu'ga kwa masi' ga baali.
21.26: Bandu bainduka kwa mwanjaa ya bwoga, kabalolela makowe gagalu'a pitya, kwa mwanjaa makakala ga kunani galu'a tikatika.
21.27: Bu'kapo, baalu'a kummona Mwana wa Mundu kaisa mulyunde, mwene makakala na utukupu wammese.
21.28: Pagalu'a tumbwa pitya makowe go mwayi'me no tu'ndu'bi'ya mitwe yinu kunani, kwa mwanjaa kosopolelwa kwinu kuegelile.” Lukongo lwa ntini (Mat 24:32-35, Mal 13:28-31)
21.29: Bu'kapo ngaabakia lukongo lu'no, “Mulolekeye nkongo wa ntini na mikongo yi'ngi' yoti.
21.30: Pamwibona panga gatumbwile ipuka maakapi, mwatange panga nsimu wa kyuku wegelile.
21.31: Nyinyonyo, pamwagabona makowe go kagapangilwa, mwatange panga Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' wegelile.
21.32: Kakape nimmakianga, lubelekwo lu'no lwa nambi'yambi' lwapi'tali wangalipangika ago goti.
21.33: Makowe goti gagabile padunia na panani ya dunia gapi'ta, lakini mayi'gi'yo gangu' gaapi'tali. Tupalikwa tube minyo
21.34: “Mube minyo, yakanetopelwa myoyo yinu na makowe maakau, lobya na mengo ga bwu'mi gu'no. Mana lili, lisu'ba lyo lyamwisilyanga kwa kiimuimu.
21.35: Kwa mwanjaa lyamwisilya kati kitapa kwa boti babatama mudunia yoti.
21.36: Mutame mwiso bai na mukoye lu'ba Nnu'ngu' li'nga mupate makakala go pi'ta salama mumakowe goti gagalu'a pitya no yi'ma nnu'ngi' ya Mwana wa Mundu.”
21.37: Muntwekati masu'ba go Yesu ayi'ganage bandu mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', lakini kilo ayendage ku Kitu'mbi' sa Minjaituni no tama kwo.
21.38: Bandu boti bayendage mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' kindai' putiputi li'nga kumpi'kania.

22.1: Lisu'ba lya si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Makati Gangalu'la, yaikemelwa Pasika, yai kaiegelya.
22.2: Api'ndo ba dini na balimu ba salya baapalike ndi'la ya kummulaga Yesu, lakini baayogopage bandu.
22.3: Bai, Ibilisi ngannyingya Yuda Isikalioti, yumo ywa balu' banamasi' ku'mi na abi'li'.
22.4: Yuda aayi'i lagana na api'ndo ba dini na ali'ndi'li ba Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' mwopanga li'nga kunsongya Yesu kasabe.
22.5: Baatinapusika nabembe ngabayi'ki'tyana nakwe kunni'pa mbanje.
22.6: Yuda aayi'ki'tile, ngapala lipala lya kwakamukiya pangali tanga lipi'nga lya bandu. Kwibi'ka wiso si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Pasika (Mat 26:17-25, Mal 14:12-21, Yoa 13:21-30)
22.7: Bai, Lisu'ba lya Makati Gangalu'la ngaliika. Na alyo nga lisu'ba lyo sinjilwa Mwana wa Ngondolo ywa Pasika.
22.8: Apo Yesu ngaatuma Petili na Yoani, ngaabakia, “Muyende mukatubi'ki wiso si'li'ku'si'li'ku' li'nga tulye Pasika.”
22.10: Ngaabakia, “Pi'kani! Pamwalu'a yenda kukilambo, mwakwembana na nnalu'me ywapu'twi kibi'ga sa masi'. Mwanki'ngame mpaka nnyumba ya nyumba yaayingya.
22.11: Mwammakie mwene nsengo, ‘Mwalimu endakulaluya, kubi kwaku' kuswi kwo li'lya Pasika nenga na banamasi' bangu'?’
22.12: Naywembe aannangya sumba kiku'lu' kugolopwa sakibi'kilwe wiso, na mwenga mukabi'ke wiso ilyo.”
22.13: Bai, ngabayenda, baakikoli kila kili'be kibi kati mwaabakie Yesu, ngababi'ka wiso Pasika. Kilyo pamesa ya Bwana (Mat 26:26-30, Mal 14:22-26, 1Kol 11:23-25)
22.14: Saa payikite, Yesu ngatama lya na atumilwe bake.
22.15: Ngaabakia, “Ndeminyikia muno lya Pasika yi'no pamope na mwe, ku'no kaiegelya saa yo teselwa kwangu'.
22.16: Kwa mwanjaa nimmakianga panga nailyali kai' mpaka palu' panailya yi'lu' yaitimile pawaika Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
22.17: Bu'kapo ngatola nnobo wa divai no sukulu, kabaya, “Mupokyange, munywe pamope.
22.18: Kwa mwanjaa bu'ka nambi'yambi' nimmakianga, nainywali kai' divai ya njabibu mpaka pawalu'a isa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
22.19: Bu'kapo ngatola likati, ngasukulu, ngalimetwana na kwapeya kabaya, “Yi'no nga yi'ga yangu' yaipiyilwa kwa mwanjaa ya mwe. Mwapange nyo kwa kuniku'mbu'kya.”
22.20: Ngapanga nyinyonyo na nnobo wa divai bu'ka pa kilyo, kabaya, “Kikombe si'no nga lilagano lyayambi' lya myai yangu' yaiyitanika kwa mwanjaa mwenga.
22.21: Lakini, mulolange! Yu'lu' ywanisongya ai pamope nanenga pano pamesa.
22.22: Kakape Mwana wa Mundu ayenda bulagilwa kati mwabini Nnu'ngu', lakini akibona yu'lu' ywansongya.”
22.23: Apo ngabatumbwa laluyana bene na bene nyai kati yabe ywalu'a panga likowe lyo. Nyai nku'lu' pakati yitu!
22.24: Kwapitike ntau kwa abo banamasi' panga nyai ywaganiyilwa baa nku'lu' kuliko bi'ngi'.
22.25: Yesu ngaabakia, “Akulungwa ba bandu bangali Ayahudi batawala bandu babe kwa makakala, nabembe bakemelwa ayi'mi'li'ki'yi ba bandu.
22.26: Lakini kaneibe nyo kwinu, ila yu'lu' ywabi nku'lu' kwinu apalikwa abe nsene wa boti, na ywabi kolongosi apalikwa abe kati ntumisi.
22.27: Tubaye nku'lu' ngaywaku', yu'lu' ywatama pamesa no lya, au yu'lu' ywatumikia? Ngamwembe panga yu'lu' ywatama pamesa no lya! Lakini ata nyo nenga nibi pano pakati yinu kati nantumisi.
22.28: Mwenga ngamwabile nanenga nsimu woti wa mapayilwo gangu',
22.29: kati Tati' bangu' mwabangamukiye ukulungwa, nanenga ninkamukiyanga mwenga ukulungwa.
22.30: Mwalya no nywa pamesa yangu' muukulungwa wangu' no tama muiti'gu' ya kikulungwa kuisenwa ngolo ku'mi na ibi'li' ya Isilaili. Yesu alondwa panga Petili alu'a kunkana (Mat 26:31-35, Mal 14:27-31, Yoa 13:36-38)
22.31: “Simoni, Simoni! Pi'kania wi'ti'! Ibilisi ayi'ki'tilwe na Nnu'ngu' kumpeeta mwenga kati mundu mwapeeta ngano.
22.32: Lakini nenga nitikulu'bya kwa Nnu'ngu' li'nga imani yako yakanepu'ngwa. Nawenga pawalu'a niki'li'bu'kya, wasenge akina alongobo.”
22.33: Petili ngannyangwa, “Bwana, niyi'ki'tile yenda pamope nawenga muutabilwe, na ata waa.”
22.34: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Nikubakia wenga wa Petili, kapala bi'ka njogolo li'no kilo walu'a ngana mala itatu panga unitangiteli.” Nsimu wa atali wegelile
22.35: Bu'kapo, Yesu ngaalaluya banamasi' bake, “Nsimu panantumike wangali pu'twa mpuko wa mbanje wala utingo wala ilatu, mwapu'ngu'kilwe na kili'be sosoti?” Ngabayangwa, “Lili.”
22.36: Naywembe ngaabakia, “Nambi'yambi', ywabile na mpuko wa mbanje aupu'twe na ywabile na utingo nyinyonyo. Na ywabile ntu'pu' lipanga, api'mi'ye nganju yake li'nga akapi'me limo.
22.37: Nimmakianga gano mayi'gi'yo ga Maandiko Mapeleteu, ‘Aabi'kilwe kipi'nga simo na babaalabiya.’ Makowe ga gaandikilwe kwangu' nenga gapalikwa gatimi.”
22.38: Nabembe ngababaya, “Bwana, lola, pano pai na mapanga gabi'li'.” Naywembe ngabaya, “Bai gali'ngani!” Yesu annu'ba Nnu'ngu' kukitu'mbi' sa Minjaituni (Mat 26:36-46, Mal 14:32-42)
22.39: Yesu pabu'i po kati mwayobelile ngayenda ku Kitu'mbi' sa Minjaituni, na banamasi' bake ngabanki'ngama.
22.40: Paaikite kwo ngaabakia, “Mulu'bange Nnu'ngu' mwakaneyingya mumapayilwo.”
22.41: Bu'kapo ngaaleka no yenda kuutalu pasene ngakilikita no lu'ba Nnu'ngu',
22.42: “Tati', mana mupendile, munibu'ki'ye nnobo gu'. Ata nyo, ibe kati mwamupendi mwenga, kwenda kati mwanipendi nengali.”
22.43: Bu'kapo, malaika bu'ka kunani ngampitya li'nga kunyongea makakala.
22.44: Paabile mulwu'ngu' luku'lu', aannu'bite Nnu'ngu' kwa makakala muno, ngalimpita lyusu kati matondwa ga myai, ngalibutuka mpaka pai'.
22.45: Paayomwi lu'ba Nnu'ngu', aki'li'bu'ki banamasi' bake, na akoli bagonjike, kwa mwanjaa baatinyopa.
22.46: Ngaabakia, “Mboni mwendagonja? Muyumukange musali, mwakane yingya mumapayilwo.” Yesu aboyolwa kwa makakala (Mat 26:47-56, Mal 14:43-50, Yoa 18:3-11)
22.47: Kayendelya longela, ngaliisa lipi'nga lya bandu lilongoyilwe na Yuda, yu'lu' yumo ywa banamasi' ku'mi na abi'li'. Yuda ngayenda kumpanga abali Yesu kwa kunnonia.
22.48: Yesu ngammakia, “Yuda! Unsongya Mwana wa Mundu kwa kunnonia?”
22.49: Banamasi' bake pabagabweni go ngababaya, “Bwana, tukoleli mapanga gitu?”
22.50: Yumo kati yabe nganku'mbwa lipanga ntumisi ywa Mpi'ndo Mku'lu' wa dini, ngankata likutu lyake lya kummalyo.
22.51: Apo, Yesu ngabaya, “Kotokaa! Ili'ngani.” Ngalikunywa likutu lya mundu yu'lu', na kuntepwa.
22.52: Bu'kapo Yesu ngaabakia api'ndo ba dini, api'ndo ba ali'ndi'li ba Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' na api'ndo babaisi kummoywa, “Mboni mwisi na mapanga na mandolonga kuniboywa kati nenga nampokonyoli?
22.53: Panaabile na mwenga kila lisu'ba mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' mwaniboywili!. Lakini, gu'no nga nsimu winu lelo, nsimu wa utawala wa lubi'ndu'.” Petili ankana Yesu (Mat 26:57-58, Mal 14:53-54,66-72, Yoa 18:12-18,25-27)
22.54: Bai, ngabammoywa na kumpeleka kasake mpi'ndo nku'lu' wa dini. Petili anki'ngime nsu'gu' kwa kuutalu.
22.55: Mwoto wabi ukunganilwe pakatikati ya luwa. Nabembe batami pamope, na Petili abi pamope nabo.
22.56: Ntumisi yumo nnwawa paamweni Petili atami kayota mwoto ngammu'nju'lya minyo, kabaya, “Mundu yu' aai pamope na Yesu.”
22.57: Lakini Petili ngakana no baya, “Wewenga! Nenintangiteli yu'.”
22.58: Baliya pasene, mundu ywi'ngi' ngammona Petili, ngabaya, “Nawenga wanaywembe kati yabe.” Lakini Petili ngayangwa, “Wenga, nenintangiteli!”
22.59: Walipite lisaa limo, mundu ywi'ngi' ngakong'ondelya panga “Ayu' naywembe mwenekaya wa ku Galilaya.”
22.60: Petili ngabaya, “Wenga we, ne nikitangiteli ata saukilongela!” Na popopo paabile kalongela, njogolo ngabi'ka.
22.61: Bwana Yesu ngagalambuka na kummu'nju'lya minyo Petili, naywembe Petili ngaku'mbu'kya galu' gaabakiyilwe na Bwana Yesu, “Li'no kapala bi'ka njogolo walu'a nikana mala itatu.”
22.62: Apo ngapitya panja, no li'la munomuno. Yesu endasalangilwa no ku'mbu'lwa (Mat 26:67-68, Mal 14:65)
22.63: Balu' bandu babanni'ndi'lage Yesu, batekunku'mbwa na kunsalanga.
22.64: Bantabike kitambala kuminyo, kabannaluya, “Akuku'mbwi nyai? Ebu londwa, tulole!”
22.65: Ngabampikiya makowe gambone ga kumpwi'wa. Yesu nnu'ngi' ya Balasa Liku'lu' (Mat 26:59-66, Mal 14:55-64, Yoa 18:19-24)
22.66: Pakusile, kitamo sa api'ndo ba bandu saatipangilwa na amo bakwembine api'ndo ba dini na balimu ba salya. Yesu ngaletelwa nnu'ngi' ya Balasa Liku'lu' lya Ayahudi.
22.67: Nabembe ngabammakia, “Tubakia wenga nga wa Kilisitu ywabayilwe?” Yesu ngaabakia, “Ata mana nimmakiangite mwaniu'bi'lyali,
22.68: na ata mana ninnaluyangite liswali, mwaniyangwali.
22.69: Lakini bu'ka nambi'yambi', Mwana wa Mundu alu'a tama kummalyo ga Nnu'ngu' mwene makakala.”
22.70: Apo boti ngababaya, “Elo, baya wenga nga wa Mwana wa Nnu'ngu'?” Naywembe ngabaya, “Mubaya panga nenga nga naywembe.”
22.71: Nabembe ngababaya, “Buli, balo tukapala usaili wi'ngi'? Twabene tunnyu'wine kalongela munkano wake mwene.”

23.1: Bu'kapo, boti ngabayi'ma kumpeleka Yesu nnu'ngi' ya Pilato.
23.2: Ngabatumbwa kunsitakya kababaya, “Mundu yu' tunkoli kalemaya bandu bitu, kakana li'pa koli kwa Kaisali na kwikema ati' ywembe nga Kilisitu, Nkulungwa.”
23.3: Pilato ngannaluya Yesu, “Wenga nga wankulungwa wa Ayahudi?” Yesu ngannyangwa, “Wenga ngawaubaya.”
23.4: Pilato ngaabakia api'ndo ba dini na lipi'nga lya bandu, “Nikibonali kitumbu sosoti sa kunsenwa ayu' mundu.”
23.5: Lakini bembe ngabakong'ondelya kababaya, “Asopa bandu kwa mayi'gano gake munni'ma woti wa ku Yudea, aatumbuli ku Galilaya, na nambi'yambi' ai pano.” Yesu apelekelwa kwa Helode
23.6: Pilato wagayu'wine go, ngalaluya, “Mundu yu' nga mwenekaya wa ku Galilaya?”
23.7: Paatangite panga Yesu aai muutawala wa Helode, ngampeleka kwa Helode, ywabile ku Yelusalemu nsimu gu'lu'.
23.8: Helode aatipulaika muno paamweni Yesu. Aagayu'wine makowe gake, ila endelolela li'nga ammone kwa minyo gake. Kai', au'bi'lyage kummona Yesu kapanga mangelongelo.
23.9: Bai, ngannaluya makowe ganambone kwo kondeya, lakini Yesu ayangwili.
23.10: Api'ndo ba dini na balimu ba salya, baapitike nnu'ngi', na kunsitakya Yesu kwa makakala.
23.11: Bai, Helode pamope na asikali bake, ngabamwisia Yesu na kumpangya nsalango. Bu'kapo, ngabang'walika ngu'bo ya kikulungwa, na kunki'li'bu'ya kwa Pilato.
23.12: Helode na Pilato babaabile yu'wanganali, lakini bu'ka lisu'ba lyo baabile mambwiga. Yesu asenulwa bulagilwa (Mat 27:15-26, Mal 15:6-15, Yoa 18:39-19:16)
23.13: Bai, Pilato ngakemya kitamo sa api'ndo ba dini, alongosi na bandu,
23.14: ngaabakia, “Munnetike kasangu' ayu' mundu kamubaya panga aatindigana bandu. Nambi'yambi' pi'kaniange! Wanilokikiye likowe lyo nnu'ngi' yinu, nimwenili na lyakau lyolyoti lyalilandana na masitakyo ginu.
23.15: Wala nenga bai lili, ata Helode alibwenili lyakau lyolyoti, na nyo nganki'li'bwiye kasangu'. Ibonekana mpu'la bai panga mundu yu' apangiteli sosoti sakumpangia asenulwe kiwo.
23.16: Kwa nyo, nilu'a amulisa ammeselwe mikwasu, bu'kapo nalu'a kunnekekea.”
23.17: (Kila lisu'ba lya si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Pasika, Pilato yapalikwe kwayu'gu'lya bandu ntabilwe yumo.)
23.18: Lakini boti ngabapanga ndu'ti pamope, “Ummu'ye mundu yu' na utuyu'gu'li Balaba!”
23.19: Balaba aabi'kilwe muutabilwe kwa mwanjaa ayu'maniye bandu panni'ma, kai' aatibulaga.
23.20: Pilato apalike kunnekekea Yesu, kwa nyo ngalongela nabo kai'.
23.21: Lakini bembe ngabapanga ndu'ti, “Ummambe munsalaba, ummambe munsalaba!”
23.22: Pilato ngaabakia pampanda patatu, “Apangite lyakau lyaku'? Nilibonali lyakau lyakumpanga abulagilwe, kwa nyo nilu'a kummesa mikwasu, bu'kapo ninnekekeye.”
23.23: Lakini bembe ngabayongekea panga ndu'ti kwa makakala munomuno, panga Yesu lasima abambilwe munsalaba. Kuundi'la, malobe gabe ngagayu'wanika.
23.24: Bai, Pilato ngabaya panga mwabapala bembe ipangilwe.
23.25: Annyu'gu'li yu'lu' ywabampalage, ywabile ntabilwe kwa mwanjaa ayu'maniye bandu panni'ma no bulaga na kwapeya Yesu bampangi mwabapendile. Yesu endabambilwa (Mat 27:32-44, Mal 15:21-32, Yoa 19:17-27)
23.26: Pabaabile kabampeleka, bakwembine na mundu ywakemelwage Simoni wa Kilene, kabu'ka kunng'unda. Bai, ngabammoywa na kuntwi'ka gu'lu' nsalaba aupu'twe nsu'gu' ya Yesu.
23.27: Lipi'nga lya bandu lyatekunki'ngama, nkati yabe baabile alwawa babaabile kabalombola na kunni'lya.
23.28: Yesu ngaagalambukya kabaya, “Mwenga mwaakina mau' ba ku Yelusalemu! Kanemundi'li nenga, ila mwili'li mwabene na bana binu.
23.29: Kwa mwanjaa masu'ba gendaisa pabaalu'a baya, ‘Nantali balu' atonga, kingabeleka wala kingayongea bana!’
23.30: Nsimu wo, bandu ngabatumbwa kuibakia itu'mbi' na itundulia, ‘Mututu'mbu'ki na mutuwi'ki'li!’
23.31: Kwa mwanjaa manaitei bandu baupangya nkongo mmi'gi' kati nyo, yapanga buli kwa nkongo nnyu'mu'?”
23.32: Baatweti kai' bandu bi'ngi' abi'li' babaalabiye, babulagilwe pamope nakwe.
23.33: Pabaikite pandu papakemelwa “Lipakala lya Ntwe,” ngabammamba Yesu munsalaba papipi na balu' abi'li' babaalabiye, yumo lwammalyo wa Yesu na ywi'ngi' lwanki'ya lwake.
23.34: Yesu ngabaya, “Tati', mwasami, kwa mwanjaa batangiteli lyabalipanga.” Bu'kapo, ngababagana magu'bo gake kwo ng'andya mpumbe.
23.35: Bandu baabile wi'ma kabalola. Nabembe alongosi ngabansalanga kababaya, “Aakosopoli bi'ngi', nambi'yambi' aikosopoli mwene, manaitei ywembe nga Kilisitu, nsaulwa na Nnu'ngu'.”
23.36: Nabembe asikali baatikunsalanga kai', baatikunnyendelya na kumpeya kasiki,
23.37: kababaya, “Manaitei kakape wenga nga wankulungwa wa Ayahudi, wikosopoli wamwene.”
23.38: Kai' maandiko gano gaabi'kilwe panani ya nsalaba wake, “Ayu' nga Nkulungwa wa Ayahudi.”
23.39: Yumo ywa balu' babaalabiye bababambilwe munsalaba, aatikumpwi'wa kabaya, “Nga, kakape buli panga wenga nga wa Kilisitu ywabayilwe? Bai, wikosopoli wamwene, kai' utukosopoli na twenga.”
23.40: Lakini yu'lu' ywaalabiye ywi'ngi' ngankalipya nnyine kabaya, “Wenga unnyogopali Nnu'ngu' ata pasene? Wenga utesenulwa nyinyonyo.
23.41: Wenga nanenga ngaipalikwa pata mali'po gano kwa galu' gatupangite. Lakini mundu yu' apangiteli lyakau lyolyoti.”
23.42: Bu'kapo ngabaya, “Mwa Yesu! Mwangu'mbu'ki nsimu pamwayingya mu Ukulungwa winu.”
23.43: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Nikubakia kakape, li'no waba pamope nanenga kumbepo ya Nnu'ngu'.” Yesu awaa munsalaba (Mat 27:45-56, Mal 15:33-41, Yoa 19:28-30)
23.44: -45 Payabile kayika saa sita muntwekati, lisu'ba lyasomwi mulika, lubi'ndu' lwawi'ki'li munni'ma woti mpaka saa tisa. Na panjia yaitemwana Papeleteu pa Papeleteu mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' yapopwanike ande ibi'li'.
23.46: Yesu ngali'la kwa lilobe liku'lu', “Tati', mumoko ginu niibi'ka loo yangu'.” Payomwi longela go, ngayomoka.
23.47: Apo, yu'lu' asikali nku'lu' paagabweni gagapitike, annumbite Nnu'ngu' no baya, “Kakape ayu' aai mundu ywa aki.”
23.48: Bandu boti babaakongolekine po pala bagabone gagapangika, pabagabweni malau gagapitike, baki'li'bu'ki kaya ku'no kabaisenwa no usunika pamwoyo wabe.
23.49: Mambwiga bake boti na balu' alwawa babalongwaniye nakwe bu'ka ku Galilaya, baayi'mi kuutalu lola likowe lyo. Yesu endasikilwa (Mat 27:57-61, Mal 15:42-47, Yoa 19:38-42)
23.50: -51 Kwai na mundu yumo lina lyake Yusupu, mwenekaya wa Alimataya mukilambo simo sa ku Yudea. Aai mundu nnogau na mwene aki. Aabile kalolela isa kwa Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'. Pamope no panga aabile yumo ywa Kitamo Kiku'lu' sa Ayahudi, aabile anayi'ki'tyanali nabo mukyendo sabe.
23.52: Bai, ywembe ngayenda kwa Pilato, lu'ba ntwi wa Yesu.
23.53: Bu'kapo ngauluya ntwi bu'ka munsalaba, ngaingilya sanda ngabi'ka mulisiko lyalii'mbilwe mumpi'mbi', na lyabile lyangakolelwa.
23.54: Lisu'ba lyo lyabile Ijumaa kitamwiyo, kai' lyaai lisu'ba lyo bi'ka wiso Sabato ya Ayahudi.
23.55: Balu' alwawa babaalongwaniye na Yesu bu'ka ku Galilaya banki'ngime Yusupu, ngabalibona li'lu' lipango na ntwi wa Yesu mwaubi'kilwe.
23.56: Bu'kapo, baaki'li'bu'ki kaya no bi'ka wiso mauta ganannungya ga kuupakaya ntwi wa Yesu. Lisu'ba lya Sabato ya Ayahudi baatipu'mu'lya kati mwayaamuliswe na salya.

24.1: Jumapili, kindai' bulabula, balu' alwawa baayi'i kulisiko, baapu'twi galu' mauta ganannungya gagabi'kilwe wiso.
24.2: Baalikoli li'lu' liwe liimbiliyilwe kuutalu na lisiko,
24.3: pabaayingi nkati, baaubwenili ntwi wa Bwana Yesu.
24.4: Pabaabile kabasangala kwa likowe lyo, imukya bandu abi'li' babaaweti ngu'bo yene mmelemetya muno bayi'mi papipi nabo.
24.5: Balu' alwawa baatiyogopa muno, ngabayinamika ibu'ngi' yabe. Apo balu' bandu ngabaabakia, “Kwa ki'li' mumpala ywabile nkoti mumapango ga awi'li?
24.6: Abileli pano, ayu'kite. Muku'mbu'ki gammakie paabile ku'lu' ku Galilaya,
24.7: ‘Ipalikwa Mwana wa Mundu apiyilwe kwa bandu baakau, nabembe balu'a kummamba munsalaba na lisu'ba lyenetatu alu'a yu'ka.’ ”
24.8: Apo balu' alwawa ngabaku'mbu'kya mayi'gi'yo gake,
24.9: ngabaki'li'bu'ka bu'ka kulipango, na kwabakia balu' banamasi' ku'mi na yumo na apwasi bi'ngi'.
24.10: Babaapiyike makowe go kwa atumilwe baai, Malia Makatalena, Yoana na Malia mau' ba Yakobi, pamope na alwawa bi'ngi' babalongwaniye nabo.
24.11: Banamasi' pabagayu'wine makowe go baagabweni kati gangali ntwe kwa nyo bau'bi'li lili.
24.12: Lakini Petili aabutwike lubi'lo mpaka kulipango, palitike no lingulya nkati, ngaibona sanda bai. Ngabuyangana kaya ku'no kasangala kwa galu' gagapitike. Mwanja wo yenda ku Emau (Mal 16:12-13)
24.13: Lisu'ba lyolyolyo, apwasi abi'li' ba Yesu baai kabayenda kukilambo simo sakikemelwa Emau, ulipau wake kilometa ku'mi na yimo bu'ka ku Yelusalemu.
24.15: Pabaabile kabalongela no laluyana, Yesu mwene ngapitya, ngalongwana nabo.
24.16: Baamweni, lakini Nnu'ngu' aatabite malango ga kunkwipwa.
24.17: Ngaalaluya, “Mulongela ki'li' ku'no kannyenda?” Nabembe baayi'mi liki, no uta ngi'njaki'nja ya kuminyo yabe kwo usunika.
24.18: Yumo, ywakemelwa Kileopa, ngannyangwa, “Wenga ngawang'eni kisako ku Yelusalemu wokotoka tanga gagapitike kwo masu'ba gano?”
24.19: Naywembe ngaalaluya, “Makowe gaku'?” Bembe ngabannyangwa, “Makowe gagampatike Yesu wa ku Nasaleti. Ywembe aai nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu' nku'lu' mwene makakala go panga makowe no yi'gana nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu' na bandu boti.
24.20: Api'ndo ba dini na atawala bitu baampiyike asenulwe waa, ngabammamba munsalaba.
24.21: Lakini twenga tuu'bi'lyage panga ywembe nga ywalu'a kwikombwa Isilaili. Bu'ka pagapangilwe makowe ga goti, li'no lisu'ba lyenetatu.
24.22: Kai', alwawa bitu bi'ngi' baatikutung'ang'amuya. Baayi'i kulisiko kindai' bulabula.
24.23: Baaikolili yi'ga yake. Baaki'li'bwike kababaya panga bapitilwe na malaika ywabakie panga ai nkoti.
24.24: Aitu bi'ngi' baayi'i kulisiko lingulya wiso galu' gabalongei balu' alwawa, gaai nyinyonyo ila ywembe baamwenili.”
24.25: Kuundi'la Yesu ngaabakia, “Mboni mwalogeloge nyo, na myoyo yinu ndopau kwo kotoka kugau'bi'lya goti gagalongelilwe na alondoli ba Nnu'ngu'?
24.26: Buli, yali'nganili Kilisitu ateselwe, li'nga ayingi muutukupu wake?”
24.27: Ngaawanikia mayi'gi'yo gake goti ga mu Maandiko Mapeleteu tumbulya Musa mpaka alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' boti.
24.28: Pabaegeli palu' pakilambo sabayendage, Yesu ngapanga kati ayendelya na mwanja.
24.29: Lakini bembe ngabannu'ba kababaya, “Utame pamope na twe, kwendapilya na kilo kiegelile.” Bai, ngaika palu' pakilambo, no yingya nnyumba tama pamope nabo.
24.30: Waatami lya pamope nabo, ngatola likati kulilu'bya na kulimetwana, na kwabagana.
24.31: Popopo minyo gabe gaatibanjwa, ngabankwipwa, lakini ywembe baimuki abu'i na baamwenili kai'.
24.32: Bai, ngababakiana, “Panga myoyo yitu yabileli kaiyaka nkati yitu paabile katuawanikia Maandiko Mapeleteu mu'lu' mundi'la?”
24.33: Ngababu'ka saa yi'yi'lu'yi'lu', ki'li'bu'ka ku Yelusalemu, ngabaakolya balu' banamasi' ku'mi na yumo na balu' apwasi bi'ngi' bababile pamope nabo bakongolekine
24.35: Bai, balu' apwasi abi'li' ngabaayaulya ayabe galu' gabagapatike mundi'la, na mwabapatike kuntanga kwa kulimetwa likati. Yesu apitya banamasi' bake (Mat 28:16-20, Mal 16:14-18, Yoa 20:19-23, Mako 1:6-8)
24.36: Pabaabile kabaabakia go, baimuki mwene Yesu aayi'mi pakatikati yabe, ngaabakia, “Amani ibe namwenga.”
24.37: Baating'ang'amuka no yogopa kwa mwanjaa baganiage balibweni lyoka.
24.38: Lakini ywembe ngaabakia, “Kwa mwanjaa ki'li' muyogobala? Mboni mubaa na kyukala mumyoyo yinu?
24.39: Mulolekeye moko na magu'lu' gangu', nga nenga namwene. Munipapaye munibone kwa mwanjaa lyoka ntu'pu' yi'ga wala yupaa kati mwamunibona.”
24.40: Paayomwi longela go, ngaalaya moko na magu'lu' gake.
24.41: Pabaabile balo banau'bi'lyali kwa mwanjaa ya pulaa yabe na kabasangala, ngaalaluya, “Mubile naso kilyo sosoti pano?”
24.44: Bu'kapo ngaabakia, “Yi'no nga ikomekeyo ya makowe ganammakie panaabile pamope namwenga. Panga yaapalikwe yomwa goti gagaandikilwe kwa mwanjaa ya nenga mu salya ya Musa, muitabu ya alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' na mukitabu sa Zabuli.”
24.45: Bu'kapo, ngaayu'gu'lya malango gabe li'nga bapate kugatanga Maandiko Mapeleteu.
24.46: Ngaabakia, “Ngamo mwaiandikilwe, panga Kilisitu aateselwa na lisu'ba lyenetatu aayu'ka bu'ka kuuwi'li,
24.47: kwa nyo ngaipalikwa panga, kwa lina lyake, dunia yoti tumbulya ku Yelusalemu, bandu ba dunia yoti baalilwe panga banki'li'bu'ki Nnu'ngu' basamilwe masambi.
24.48: Mwenga nga mwakong'ondeli ba makowe go.
24.49: Nenga namwene nalu'a kumpelekyanga yu'lu' ywabayilwe tumilwa na Tati'. Lakini muli'nde ku'no kukilambo mpaka pamwapeyelwa galu' makakala gagabu'ka kunani.” Yesu au'bu'ka kunani (Mal 16:19-20, Mako 1:9-11)
24.50: Bu'kapo, ngaalongoya panja ya ku Yelusalemu mpaka ku Betania, ngatu'ndu'bi'ya moko gake kunani ngaayalya.
24.51: Paabile kaayalya, ngaaleka, no pu'tu'lwa kunani.
24.52: Bembe ngabankilikitya, bu'kapo ngabaki'li'bu'ka ku Yelusalemu babile na pulaa ngu'lu'.
24.53: Baatami masu'ba goti mulua lwa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' kabannumba Nnu'ngu'.

1.1: Kwai'mbu' kwai na Liyi'gi'yo, aywo Liyi'gi'yo aai na Nnu'ngu', naywembe aai Nnu'ngu'.
1.2: Bu'ka kwai'mbu', aywo Liyi'gi'yo aai pamope na Nnu'ngu'.
1.3: Kwo pi'tya ywembe ili'be yoti ngaiumbilwe, na pangali ywembe ntu'pu' kili'be sakiumbilwe.
1.4: Nkati yake ngamwawabile ukoto, na ukoto wo ngawaletike bweya kwa bandu.
1.5: Bweya wo umulika mulubi'ndu', na lubi'ndu' lukombwili kuimiya.
1.6: Aaisi mundu yumo ywaatumilwe bu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu', lina lyake Yoani.
1.7: Aywo aaisi kong'ondelya bu'kana na bweya wo, kwo pi'tya ywembe bandu boti bauu'bi'li.
1.8: Ywembe aabileli wu'lu' bweya we, ila aaisi kwabakia bandu bu'kana na awo bweya.
1.9: Wu'lu' bweya wa kakape, wammulikya kila mundu uisa padunia.
1.10: Liyi'gi'yo aabile padunia na kwa ndi'la yake dunia ngaiumbilwe, lakini dunia yantangiteli.
1.11: Aaisi kasake, lakini babaabile bandu bake baampokili.
1.12: Lakini boti babampokile, aapei uweso wo pangika bana ba Nnu'ngu', nga balu' babaliu'bi'lya lina lyake,
1.13: baabelekwili kwa myai, wala kati mwaipala yi'ga au mundu, ila mwapendi Nnu'ngu'.
1.14: Nalyembe Liyi'gi'yo lyapangike mundu no tama pamope na twenga. Na twenga twaubweni utukupu wake, utukupu wu'lu' waapeyilwe Mwana ywa kisake ywabu'ka kwa Tati'. Ywembe aalayite ukakape woti na ngu'ngu' ngu'lu' ya Nnu'ngu'.
1.15: Yoani aau'bwiye lilobe kaabakia bandu makowe gake, kabaya, “Ayu' nga yu'lu' ywanammakie panga, ‘Ywembe ywalu'a isa pasu'gu' yangu', nga nku'lu' kulikoni nenga, kwa mwanjaa nenga nabelekwali, ywembe aabile.’ ”
1.16: Kwo bu'kana no timilika kwake, twenga twaboti tupoki ngu'ngu' ngu'lu' yatwi'li'yilwe nayo.
1.17: Kwa mwanjaa salya ya Nnu'ngu' yaaletilwe kwa luboko lwa Musa, nambi'yambi' ngu'ngu' na kakape yaaisi kwa luboko lwa Yesu Kilisitu.
1.18: Ntu'pu' mundu ywoywoti ywaamweni Nnu'ngu' katu, ila Mwana ywa kisake ywabile nsawani na Nnu'ngu', ywembe ywalu'mbine na Tati', ngaywatubakiye makowe ga Nnu'ngu'. Ukong'ondeli wa Yoani Ywabatisage (Mat 3:1-12, Mal 1:1-8, Luk 3:1-18)
1.19: Amo, ngamwaalongei Yoani api'ndo ba Ayahudi pabaatumike alongosi ba dini na Alawi bu'ka ku Yelusalemu kunnaluya, “Wenga wa nyai?”
1.20: Yoani aakanili yangwa pabannalwiye, aalongei mpu'la kabaya, “Nenga na Kilisitu lili.”
1.21: Ngabannaluya, “Wenga wanyai nde? Wenga wa Elia?” Ywembe ngaayangwa, “Lili, nenga na Elia li.” “Wenga wa yu'lu' Nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu'?” Ngaayangwa, “Lili.”
1.22: Ngababaya, “Bai utubakiye panga wenga wa nyai, li'nga tupate sakwabakia babatutumike. Wenga wamwene wikema wanyai?”
1.23: Yoani ngayangwa, “Nenga nga na li'lu' lilobe lya mundu ywakema kulupu'ngu'ti' ywaabaite Nnondoli Isaya makowe gake, ‘Mugolwe ndi'la ya Bwana.’ ”
1.25: Ngabannaluya, “Manaitei wenga wa Kilisitu li, kai' wa Elia li, na wayu'lu' Nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu' li, mboni wendabatisa?”
1.26: Yoani ngaayangwa, “Nenga nibatisa kwa masi', lakini pakatikati yinu ayi'mi mundu ywamumwomongwa.
1.27: Aywo ywaisa pasu'gu' yangu', nenga nipwaikali ata undwana lugoi lwa ilatu yake.”
1.28: Makowe aga goti gaapangike ku Betania, kwiyi' ya Libi'ndi' lya Yordani, pandu paabile Yoani kabatisa. Yesu Mwana Ngondolo wa Nnu'ngu'
1.29: Pammalau' yake, Yoani aamweni Yesu kaisa paabile, ngabaya, “Ayu' nga Mwana Ngondolo wa Nnu'ngu' ywagabu'ya masambi ga dunia!
1.30: Ayu' nga yu'lu' ywanaalongei makowe gake panga, ‘Aisa mundu nku'lu' nsu'gu' yangu' kulikoni nenga, kwa mwanjaa nenga nabelekwali aabile!’
1.31: Nenga namwene nantangiteli, lakini kitumbu so isa batisa kwa masi' li'nga bandu ba Isilaili bapate kuntanga.”
1.32: Kai' Yoani aakong'ondeli kabaya, “Nimmweni Loo kauluka bu'ka kunani kati ngunda, no tu'la panani yake.
1.33: Nenga nantangiteli, lakini yu'lu' ywanitumike nibatise kwa masi' aanibakiye, ‘Yu'lu' ywawammona Loo kamuulukya no tama panani yake, aywo nga ywaalu'a batisa kwa Loo Mpeleteu.’
1.34: Nenga namwene nilibweni likowe li', nganikong'ondelya panga ayu' nga Mwana wa Nnu'ngu'.” Babatumbwi panga banamasi' ba Yesu
1.35: Pammalau' yake, Yoani na banamasi' bake abi'li' baabile pandu po kai'.
1.36: Paamweni Yesu kapi'ta, ngabaya, “Lingulya, Ayu' nga Mwana Ngondolo wa Nnu'ngu'.”
1.37: Balu' banamasi' abi'li' pabannyuwine Yoani kalongela go, ngabanki'ngama Yesu.
1.38: Yesu aatigalambuka ngaabona abo banamasi' kabammi'ngi'ya, aatikwalaluya, “Mupala namani?” Baatikunnyangwa, “Rabi,” (lombolya Mwalimu), “Utama kwaku'?”
1.39: Yesu ngayangwa, “Mwisange, mulu'a pabona.” Kwa nyo ngabayenda na kupabona pandu patamage, baatami nakwe lisu'ba li'lu', mpaka musaa ku'mi kitamwiyo.
1.40: Andelea nnunawe Simoni Petili, aabile yumo ywa banamasi' abi'li' babaayu'wine galu' gaagalongei Yoani, nabembe ngabammi'ngi'ya Yesu.
1.41: Andelea aankoli wi'ti' nku'we Simoni na kummakia, “Tunkoli Masiya (lombolya Kilisitu)!”
1.42: Nembe ngampeleka Simoni kwa Yesu. Yesu aatikunninga no baya, “Wenga wa Simoni, mwana wa Yoani, nambi'yambi' ulu'a kemelwa wa Kefa.” (Lilombolya Petili au Liwe). Kemelwa kwa Pilipi nanyine Natanaeli
1.43: Pammalau' yake Yesu apalage yenda Galilaya, bai ngankwemba Pilipi, ngammakia, “Unibi'ngi'ye.”
1.44: Pilipi aai mwenekaya wa Betisaida, kukilambo sa ki Andelea na Petili.
1.45: Pilipi nembe ngankwemba Natanaeli na kummakia, “Tunkoli yu'lu' ywembe makowe gake gaandikilwe mukitabu sa salya ya Musa na alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', yaani Yesu mwana wa Yusupu bu'ka Nasaleti.”
1.46: Natanaeli ngannaluya Pilipi, “Nasaleti! Buli, kikowe kinannoga kiwesa pitya bu'ka ku Nasaleti?” Pilipi ngammakia, “Wise saulole.”
1.47: Yesu pamweni Natanaeli kamwisilya, aalongei makowe gake kabaya, “Lingulya, ayu' kakape Mwisilaili. Nkati yake ntu'pu' ki'pi'li.”
1.48: Natanaeli ngannaluya, “Unitangite buli?” Yesu ngannyangwa, “Naakubweni pawaabile pai' ya ntini, Pilipi abile balo kukukema.”
1.49: Natanaeli ngammakia kai', “Mwalimu, wenga wa Mwana wa Nnu'ngu' na wa Nkulungwa wa Isilaili!”
1.50: Yesu ngammakia, “Uu'bi'lya mwanjaa naakubakiye naakubweni pawaabile pai' ya ntini? Bai, waagabona makowe maku'lu' kulikoni lyo.”
1.51: Apo ngaabakia, “Kakape gano ganimmakia mwenga, mwakubona kunani kakuyu'gu'ka na malaika ba Nnu'ngu' kabau'bu'ka no uluka bu'ka kunani mpaka kwa Mwana wa Mundu.”

2.1: Lisu'ba lyenetatu kwai na lisengele ku kilambo sa Kana ya Galilaya, na mau' bake Yesu baabile kwo.
2.2: Yesu na banamasi' bake nabembe baakokilwe kulisengele lyo.
2.3: Divai payaayomwike, mau' bake ngabammakia Yesu, “Divai iyomwike.”
2.4: Yesu ngaabakia mau' bake, “Mau', lyanipalikwa panga nilitangite, ila saa yo panga lyengo lyangu' inaikali.”
2.5: Mau' bake Yesu ngaabakia balu' apangakasi ba lisengele, “Lyolyoti lyaalu'a kummakia, mwapange.”
2.6: Bai, palu' kwaabile na ibi'ga sita yaiukulilwe kwa maliwe. Kwa mimu ya Kiyahudi, ibi'ga yo baitumyage kwa kwipeletea, kila kibi'ga kiwesage twi'lya malebe matano.
2.7: Yesu ngaabakia balu' atumisi, “Mwiitwi'li'ye masi' ayo ibi'ga.” Nabembe ngabaitwi'li'ya yi'lu' ibi'ga genugenu.
2.8: Bu'kapo ngaabakia, “Nambi'yambi' muteke ago masi' masini, mumpeleki mpi'ndo ywa si'li'ku'si'li'ku'.” Kwa nyo ngabateka na kumpelekya.
2.9: Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa si'li'ku'si'li'ku' paagapayite masi' go, kumbe gaagalambwike panga divai. Ywembe aatangiteli kwaibu'i, lakini balu' atumisi babaatekite masi' baatangite. Mpi'ndo wa si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ngaankema mwene lisengele,
2.10: ngammakia, “Kila mundu atumbwa wi'ti' bi'ka wiso divai inannoga, ata balu' babakokilwe pabaabonekana bayukwite, bapiya yi'lu' yanganoga. Lakini wenga wibi'i divai inannoga muno kulikoni ya patumbu!”
2.11: Yesu aapangite mwanju wu'no nnongoi, akwo Kana ya Galilaya. Aalayite utukupu wake, na banamasi' bake ngabamwu'bi'lya.
2.12: Bu'kapo, Yesu aaeli pamope na mau' bake, anunabe, na banamasi' bake, baalumuli ku Kapernaumu, akwo baatami kwa masu'ba masini. Yesu Munyumba ya Nnu'ngu' (Mat 21:12-13, Mal 11:15-17, Luk 19:45-46)
2.13: Paliegeli lisu'ba lya si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Pasika ya Ayahudi, Yesu aatiu'bu'ka yenda ku Yelusalemu.
2.14: Akwo kulua lwa nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', aakoli bandu kabapi'mi'ya ng'ombe, ngondolo, na ngunda. Na balu' babapunja mbanje baabile batami mumesa.
2.15: Aapotike nkwasu wa lukamba, ngaabi'nganga boti bu'ka pandu paluwa lwa nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', pamope na ngondolo na ng'ombe. Aapi'li'ngwi mesa ya balu' babaabile kabapunja mbanje na kwiyitana mbanje yabe.
2.16: Ngaabakia balu' babaabile kabasulusa ngunda, “Ikowe yi' mubu'ye pano! Nyumba ya Tati' bangu' kanemwiyu'ye pandu po sulusilya!”
2.17: Banamasi' bake ngabaku'mbu'kya panga iandikilwe, “Bwigu wangu' kwa nyumba yako wendanilangamisa.”
2.18: Apo Ayahudi ngabannaluya Yesu, “Uwesa kutulaya mwanju waku', li'nga tutange uku'lu' waubile nawo wo panga makowe ga?”
2.19: Yesu ngaayangwa, “Mwibomwane nyumba yi' ya Nnu'ngu', nanenga nilu'a kwisenga kai' kwa masu'ba gatatu!”
2.20: Apo Ayahudi ngababaya, “Nyumba yi' ya Nnu'ngu' yaasengilwe kwa myaka alubaini na sita, na wenga ubaya ulu'a kwisenga kwa masu'ba gatatu?”
2.21: Lakini ywembe nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' yailongelile yai yi'ga yake.
2.22: Paayu'kite bu'ka kuuwi'li, banamasi' bake ngabaku'mbu'kya galu' gaabaite. Ngabagau'bi'lya maandiko mapeleteu na makowe galu' gaabaite Yesu. Yesu aitangite myoyo ya bandu boti
2.23: Yesu paabile kusi'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Pasika akwo ku Yelusalemu, bandu baingi baaibweni myanju ya ayabu yaipangage, ngabamwu'bi'lya.
2.24: Lakini mwanjaa Yesu aatangite bandu boti, aau'bi'lili.
2.25: Aapalikeli bakiyilwa na mundu kikowe sosoti kwa makowe ga bandu, kwa mwanjaa aagatangite wisowiso makowe goti gagabile mumyoyo ya bandu.

3.1: Kwaabile na mundu yumo Mfalisayo, lina lyake Nikodemo, kolongosi yumo mu Balasa Liku'lu' lya Ayahudi lyalitawalage lya Ayahudi.
3.2: Ywembe aamwisili Yesu kilo ngammakia, “Mwalimu, tutangite panga wenga wa mwalimu wotumilwe na Nnu'ngu', kwa mwanjaa ntu'pu' mundu ywakombwa panga myanju yawipanga wenga ila Nnu'ngu' abe pamope nakwe.”
3.3: Yesu ngammakia, “Kakape nikubakia, mundu mana akotwike belekwa mala yenebi'li', aakombwali yingya mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
3.4: Nikodemo ngannaluya, “Mundu ywakomile akombwabuli belekwa kai'? Awesa yingya mundumbo ya mau' bake no belekwa pampanda pabi'li'?”
3.5: Yesu ngammakia, “Kakape nikubakia, mundu mana akotwike belekwa kwa masi' na Loo, akombwali katu yingya mu Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.
3.6: Sakibelekwa na mundu sa yi'ga, sakibelekwa na Loo, sa Loo.
3.7: Kwa nyo, kaneuomongwe panikubakia, ‘Mupalikwa belekwa pampanda pabi'li'.’
3.8: Nsunga upukatya yenda kwaupala, pukatya kwake wendakuuyu'wa, lakini utangiteli kwaubu'ka wala kwauyenda. Nyinyonyo kati mwaibile mundu mwabelekwa kwa Loo.”
3.10: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Wenga wa mwalimu wotanganikwe kwa Baisilaili, ugatangiteli makowe ga?
3.11: Nikubakia kakape, twenga tulongela gatugatangite no kong'onndelya gatugabweni, lakini mwenga mugakana gatummakia.
3.12: Manaitei kamukana u'bi'lya panimmakianga makowe ga padunia, mwaniu'bi'lya buli panammakianga makowe ga kunani?
3.13: Ntu'pu' mundu ywau'bwike yenda kunani ila Mwana wa Mundu, ywembe ngaywaulwike bu'ka kunani.
3.14: “Kati mu'lu' Musa mwantu'ndu'biye nng'ambo wa kyu'ma kunani ku'lu' kulupu'ngu'ti', nembe Mwana wa Mundu apalikwa tu'ndu'bi'yi'lwa kunani nyinyonyo,
3.15: li'nga kila mundu ywamwu'bi'lya abe na ukoto wangayomoka.
3.16: Kwa mwanjaa Nnu'ngu' aaipendi dunia, ngaampiya mwana wake wa kisake, li'nga kila mundu ywamwu'bi'lya aakaneoba, ila abe na ukoto wangayomoka.
3.17: Kwa mwanjaa Nnu'ngu' antumiteli Mwana wake isa kwisenwa dunia, ila dunia ikosopolelwe na Ywembe.
3.18: “Ywamwu'bi'lya Mwana aasenulwali, ywakana kumwu'bi'lya ayomwike senulwa kwa mwanjaa amwu'bi'lili Mwana wa kisake wa Nnu'ngu'.
3.19: No senulwa kwene nga ku'no, panga bweya wisi padunia lakini bandu balupendi lubi'ndu' kulikoni bweya, kwa mwanjaa makowe gabapanga maakau.
3.20: Kwa mwanjaa kila ywapanga maakau ausukwa bweya na aisali kubweya li'nga makowe gake maakau gaakane bonekana.
3.21: Lakini yu'lu' ywapanga makowe ga kakape, aisa kubweya li'nga gaagapanga gabonekane mpu'la panga gapangilwe mwapala Nnu'ngu'.” Yesu na Yoani Ywabatisage
3.22: Bu'ka pa go, Yesu na banamasi' bake baayi'i kunni'ma wa Yudea. Aatami kwo pamope nabo kwa masu'ba kaabatisa bandu.
3.23: Yoani nembe aabile kaabatisa akwo Ainoni, papipi na Salimu, kwa mwanjaa akwo kwai na masi' gatwi'la. Bandu baatikunnyendelya li'nga aabatise.
3.24: Nsimu wo Yoani aabile balo anayingiyilwali muutabilwe.
3.25: Kwaapitike ntau mukipi'nga sa banamasi' ba Yoani na Nnyahudi yumo bu'kana na mimu ya kwipeletea kwo uluga.
3.26: Bai, banamasi' bo ngabannyendelya Yoani na kummakia, “Mwalimu, yu'lu' mundu ywawaabile nakwe kwiyi' ya Yordani, na ngaywawankong'ondeli makowe gake, nambi'yambi' naywembe endabatisa na bandu boti bendakunnyendelya!”
3.27: Yoani ngayangwa, “Mundu akombwali ba na kili'be sosoti, wangali peyelwa na Nnu'ngu'.
3.28: Mwenga mwabene mwaakong'ondeli bangu' naabaite panga, ‘Nenga na Kilisitu li, ila nitumilwe li'nga ninnongoli.’
3.29: Nkobeki nga mwene mwali' ywaku'nda. Lakini mbwigalye nkobeki ywayi'ma papipi nakwe pi'kania lilobe lyake bai, endapulaika muno. Nyinyonyo, pulaa yangu' itimile kwa mwanjaa ywembe ywangama kulikoni nenga.
3.30: Ywembe ipalikwa au'bu'ke, nenga niuluke.” Ywaisa bu'ka kunani
3.31: Ywaisa bu'ka kunani nga nku'lu' wa boti. Lakini ywai ywa padunia, ywa padunia, nembe alongela makowe ga padunia. Ywembe ywaisa bu'ka kunani nga nku'lu' wa boti.
3.32: Ywembe alongela gaagabweni na kugayu'wa, lakini ntu'pu' mundu ywayi'ki'tya gaagakong'ondelya.
3.33: Lakini mundu ywoywoti ywayi'ki'tya gaagakong'ondelya, ayi'ki'tya panga Nnu'ngu' nga kakape.
3.34: Yu'lu' ywatumilwe na Nnu'ngu' alongela mayi'gi'yo ga Nnu'ngu', kwa mwanjaa Nnu'ngu' annyalya Loo wake mundu ywo wangali li'ngi'lya.
3.35: Tati' bampendi Mwana, nabembe bankamwiye ili'be yoti mumaboko gake.
3.36: Ywoywoti ywamwu'bi'lya Mwana, ukoto wake waayomokali, lakini yu'lu' ywankana Mwana aaupatali ukoto wo, na nyongo ya Nnu'ngu' yabaa panani yake.

4.1: Mafalisayo baayu'wine panga Yesu endebatisa no pata banamasi' baingi kulikoni Yoani.
4.2: Lakini ywabatisage aai Yesu mwene lili, baai banamasi' bake.
4.3: Yesu paayu'wine makowe go, aabu'i Yudea no buyangania kai' Galilaya.
4.4: Bai mwanja wo aapalikwe pi'tya kunkoa wa Samalia.
4.5: Ngaika ku kilambo simo sa ku Samalia sakikemelwa Sukali papipi na nng'unda wa Yakobi waampei mwana wake Yusupu.
4.6: Pandu po, nga palwabile lu'si' lwa Yakobi. Naywembe Yesu aabile atotokilwe kwa mwanja, ngatama pambwega ya lu'si'. Lisu'ba lyaai mu saa sita muntwekati.
4.7: Ngaisa nnwawa yumo Nsamalia teka masi'. Yesu ngammakia, “Nilu'ba masi' ninywe.”
4.8: (Wakati wo, banamasi' bake baayi'i kumisengo pi'ma kilyo.)
4.9: Yu'lu' nnwawa ngannyangwa, “Wenga wa Nnyahudi nanenga na nnwawa Nsamalia. Kwa buli unilu'ba nikupei masi' go nywa?” (Kwa mwanjaa Ayahudi bayangabanikali na Asamalia.)
4.10: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Kenda ukatanga sawesa kupeya Nnu'ngu' na nyai ywakulu'ba umpei masi' go nywa, wenga ulu'e kunnu'ba ywembe na alu'e kupeya masi' gagaleta ukoto”.
4.11: Yu'lu' nnwawa ngannyangwa, “Bwana, wenga ntu'pu' nnobo wo tekya, na lu'si' lu' luyendekeya. Ulu'a gapata kwaku' ago masi' ga ukoto?
4.12: Kwani wenga wampi'ndo kulikoni au'ku' bitu Yakobi, ywembe ngaywatupei lu'si' lu' lwalwaampwaike ywembe na bana bake, na myugo yake yendenywa?”
4.13: Yesu ngannyangwa, “Kila mundu ywanywa masi' ga lu'si' lu' aaminya nnyota kai'.
4.14: Lakini ywaalu'a nywa masi' ganaampeya nenga, aaibonali nnyota milele. Masi' ganaampeya ne, nkati yake sabaa kinywanyu sa masi' ga ukoto na kumpeya ukoto wangayomoka.”
4.15: Aywo nnwawa ngammakia, “Bwana, unipei ago masi', li'nga nakane minya nnyota kai', na kanenise pano palu'si' teka masi'.”
4.16: Yesu ngammakia, “Uyende ukankeme nsengogo, wise nakwe pano.”
4.17: Aywo nnwawa ngammakia, “Nenga ntu'pu' nnalu'me,” Yesu ngammakia, “Golongei kakape panga wenga nnalu'me ntu'pu'.
4.18: Kwa mwanjaa uyomwike tama na analu'me batano na ywotama nakwe nambi'yambi' nsengogo li, apo ulongei kakape.”
4.19: Yu'lu' nnwawa ngabaya, “Bwana, ibonekana mpu'la bai panga, wenga wa nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu'.
4.20: Api'ndo bitu bankilikityage Nnu'ngu' panani ya kitu'mbi' si'no, lakini mwenga mubaya panga pandu pa kunkilikitya Nnu'ngu' ku'lu' ku Yelusalemu.”
4.21: Yesu ngammakia, “Mau', muniu'bi'li panga nsimu wendaisa, nsimu wo ntu'pu' pabaalu'a kwakilikitya Tati' panani ya kitu'mbi' si', ata ku'lu' ku Yelusalemu.
4.22: Mwenga mwa Asamalia, muntangiteli ywamunkilikitya. Twayahudi tuntangite Nnu'ngu' ywatunkilikitya kwa mwanjaa ukosopoli wisi kwa ndi'la ya Ayahudi.
4.23: Lakini nsimu wendaisa, kai' uyomwike isa, babaankilikitya Nnu'ngu' kwa kakape, baakilikitya Tati' kwa loo na kakape. Kwa mwanjaa Tati' bapala bandu babankilikitya Nnu'ngu' kwa nyo.
4.24: Nnu'ngu' nga loo, na bandu boti babankilikitya, bapalikwa bankilikiti kwa loo na ukakape.”
4.25: Yu'lu' nnwawa ngammakia, “Nitangite panga Masiya, ywakemelwa Kilisitu, endaisa. Paaisa, aatubakia kila kikowe.”
4.26: Yesu ngammakia, “Nenga nanilongela nawenga nga na Masiya wene.”
4.27: Palongelage na nnwawa ywo, banamasi' bake baai kababuyangana. Baatisangala muno kummona kalongela na nnwawa. Lakini ntu'pu' ywannalwiye, “Upala namani kwa nnwawa yu'?” Au, “Mwanjaa namani ulongela na nnwawa?”
4.28: Yu'lu' nnwawa aakilei kibi'ga sake no buyangania kumisengo na kwabakia bandu,
4.29: “Mwise samunnole mundu ywanibakiye kila kili'be sanikipangite! Buli, iwesa panga kwaali' ayu' nga Kilisitu?”
4.30: Bai, bandu ngabakongolekana bu'ka mumisengo kunnyendelya Yesu.
4.31: Akwo nsu'gu' banamasi' bendekumpembelelya kababaya, “Mwalimu, ulye.”
4.32: Lakini ywembe ngaabakia, “Nenga nibile na kilyo samukotwike kitanga mwenga.”
4.33: Bai, banamasi' ngabatumbwa laluyana, “Kubile na mundu ywanneti kilyo?”
4.34: Yesu ngaabakia, “Kilyo sangu' panga si'lu' sapala ywanitumike no timisa lyengo lyake.
4.35: Mwenga mubaya, ‘Igali myei mine bai ika nsimu wo una.’ Lakini nenga nimmakianga, mutu'ndu'bi'ye minyo ginu muilinguli yakulya mumigunda mwaiyei, ili'nda unilwa.
4.36: Ywauna apata mbokoboko yake, na akongwa yakulya no bi'ka muukoto wangayomoka, li'nga yu'lu' ywapanda na ywauna, banapusike pamope.
4.37: Kwa nyo nnongelo wu' wa kakape, ‘Apandi bi'ngi', Auni bi'ngi'.’
4.38: Nenga nintumike mukaune yakulya yangaaukilya. Bi'ngi' baapangite kasi, lakini mwenga mupata bu'ka mulyusu lyabe.”
4.39: Asamalia baingi ba kilambo si'lu' bamwu'bi'li kwa kitumbu sa makowe gaalongei aywo nnwawa, “Anibakiye makowe goti ganigapangite.”
4.40: Kwa nyo balu' Asamalia bannyendeli Yesu na kunnu'ba atame nabo, nembe ngatama po masu'ba gabi'li'.
4.41: Bandu baingi baatiu'bi'lya kwa kitumbu sa liyi'gi'yo lyake Yesu.
4.42: Ngabammakia yu'lu' nnwawa, “Tuu'bi'lile lelo, kwenda kwa makowe gako bai lili, ila kwa mwanjaa tunnyu'wine twabene. Tutangite kakape panga ayu' nga Nkosopoli wa dunia.” Mwana wa mpi'ndo ywa silikali endatepulwa
4.43: Pagapite galu' masu'ba gabi'li', Yesu aatibu'ka yenda ku Galilaya,
4.44: mwanjaa Yesu mwene aalongei mpu'la panga, “Nnondoli wa Nnu'ngu' aisimilwali panni'ma wake.”
4.45: Bai paikite Galilaya, Agalilaya baingi baatikunkemya, kwa mwanjaa nabembe baabile kusi'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Pasika, baagabweni makowe gagapangite Yesu akwo Yelusalemu ku Pasika.
4.46: Yesu aaikite kai' kukilambo sa kana, kunkoa wa Galilaya, pandu paagalambwiye masi' panga divai. Kwaabile na mpi'ndo yumo ywa silikali ywaabile na mwana ntamwe akwo ku Kapernaumu.
4.47: Bai, ayo mundu paayu'wine panga Yesu aaisi popo pa Galilaya bu'ka ku Yudea, aatikunnyendelya na kunnu'ba aise antepwe mwana wake ywaabile ntamwe katetelya.
4.48: Yesu ngammakia, “Mwabandu mwenga mana mukotwike kwibona myanju na mangelongelo mwau'bi'lyali katu.”
4.49: Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa silikali ngammakia, “Bwana, nikulu'ba wise mwana wangu' abile balo anawaali.”
4.50: Yesu ngammakia, “Uyende bai, mwana wako ayu'yu'kilwe.” Aywo mundu ngau'bi'lya gaalongei Yesu, ngabu'ka.
4.51: Paabile mundi'la aakwembine na atumisi bake ngabammakia panga, mwana wake aai mwu'mi.
4.52: Nembe ngalaluya saa yayu'yu'kilwe mwana, ngabammakia, “Nsango wammu'i liso musaa saba ya muntwekati.”
4.53: Abo tati' ba mwana ngabaku'mbu'kya panga ayo nga yai saa yabakiyilwe na Yesu, “Mwana wako ayu'yu'kilwe.” Kwa nyo ywembe pamope na boti ba panyumba yake ngabamwu'bi'lya Yesu.
4.54: Awo waai mwanju wenebi'li' waupangite Yesu kabu'ka Yudea yenda Galilaya.

5.1: Bu'ka pa go kwai na si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya Ayahudi, nembe Yesu ngayenda ku Yelusalemu.
5.2: Akwo Yelusalemu papipi na nniango waukemelwa Nniango wa Ngondolo, kwabile na litanda lya masi' lyalyaakemilwe kwa Kiebrania Bethzatha. Litanda lyo lyati'li'ti'yilwe na yega tano.
5.3: Apo paai na bandu masikini baingi, atu'lu'ka minyo, itewe na babatombolwike, bali'ndage masi' gayu'geyu'ge.
5.4: Kwa mwanjaa malaika wa Bwana aaulwike kwo kokotya nkati ya li'lu' litanda, na kugatikatika masi'. Ntamwe ywalongolya yingya nkati ya litanda masi' paliyu'gayu'ga, utamwe wowoti waminyage, waatibu'ka.
5.5: Bai, apo paabile na mundu yumo ywai ntamwe kwa myaka salasini na minane.
5.6: Yesu paamweni aywo mundu agonjike, naywembe aatangite panga aabile ntamwe kwa myaka yambone ngammakia, “Upala ube wankoto?”
