14.19: Lakini Ayahudi bi'ngi' baaisi bu'ka Antiokia na Ikonio, ngabaasopa bandu balu'mbane nabo, ngabanku'mbwa maliwe Pauli na kunkwakwata mpaka panja ya kilambo kabakita ayomwike.
14.20: Lakini banamasi' pabaakongolekine na kunti'li'ta, aatiyumuka, ngaki'li'bu'kya kukilambo. Pammalau' yake ywembe na Balanaba baayi'i Delbe. Pauli na Balanaba babukia ku kilambo sa Antiokia ya ku Silia
14.21: Bu'ka pa Pauli na Balanaba ala abali inannoga akwo Delbe na kwapata banamasi' bambone, baabuyangani kai' Lustila, Ikonio, na Antiokia.
14.22: Baatikwakangamaya banamasi' ba ilambo yo na kwasenga batame akangamau muimani. Ngaabakia, “Tupalikwa twenga twaboti pi'tya mungu'su'mbu' li'nga tuyingi muukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.”
14.23: Baasawi api'ndo mu kila kanisa. Bu'kapo, kwo sali no punga, ngabaakamukia kwa Bwana ywaabile kabamwu'bi'lya.
14.24: Bu'ka po pi'tya munni'ma wa Pisidia, baaikite Pamfilia.
14.25: Bu'ka po ala liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' akwo Pelga, baayi'i Atalia.
14.26: Bu'ka kwo baayi'i kwa meli ki'li'bu'kya Antiokia, kwabaakamukiyilwe lyengo lyabayomolile kwa ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu'.
14.27: Pabaaikite Antiokia baapangite kitamo sa aumini ba palu', ngabaapeya abali ya makowe gaagapangite Nnu'ngu' pamope nabo, na mwaayu'gu'li bandu bangali Ayahudi niango wo yingya muimani.
14.28: Ngabatama pamope na balu' banamasi' kwa masu'ba gambone ku'lu' Antiokia.

15.1: Bai, bandu bi'ngi' pabaaikite Antiokia bu'ka ku Yudea, ngabatumbwa kwayi'gana balu' babau'bi'lile kababaya, “Manaitei mwaba mwangainilwa kati mwaibayilwe musalya ya Musa, mwakosopolelwali.”
15.2: Bai, Pauli na Balanaba ngabataukana nabo mulikowe li', kwa nyo api'ndo ngabaasawa Pauli, Balanaba, na aumini nsi'si' ba kanisa li'lu' lya Antiokia bayende ku Yelusalemu bonagana na balu' atumilwe na api'ndo kwa likowe lyo.
15.3: Bai, aumini baatikwayabuya, nabembe ngabatyangilya Foinike na Samalia. Ku'lu', baawanikie bandu bangali Ayahudi mwabanng'alambuki Nnu'ngu', na makowe go gaatikwapulaisa muno boti babau'bi'lile.
15.4: Pabaaikite ku Yelusalemu, baakemilwe na aumini atumilwe na api'ndo. Nabembe ngabapeya abali ya goti Nnu'ngu' gaapangite pamope nabo.
15.5: Lakini aumini bi'ngi' babaabile ba kipi'nga sa Mafalisayo baatiyi'ma kababaya, “Ipalikwa bandu bangali Ayahudi bainilwe no yi'ganilwa kwikoleya salya ya Musa.”
15.6: Bai, atumilwe na api'ndo ba kanisa baatami kitamo so pekeseni likowe lyo.
15.7: Ntau pauyendelyage, Petili ngayi'ma kabaya, “Mwalongo aumini ayangu' mwenga mutangite panga kwai'mbu' Nnu'ngu' aanisawi nenga nkati yinu nibaye abali inannoga kwa bandu bangali Ayahudi, li'nga bapate yu'wa no u'bi'lya.
15.8: Na Nnu'ngu', ywatangite myoyo ya bandu, aalayite mwaayi'ki'tile kwa kwapeya bembe Loo Mpeleteu kati mwatupei twenga.
15.9: Nnu'ngu' aabawili pakati yitu na bembe, aaipeletiye myoyo yabe kwa mwanjaa baatikumwu'bi'lya.
15.10: Bai, kwa ki'li' kumpaya Nnu'ngu' kwa kwatwi'ka aumini kigombo kitopau, au'ku' bitu wala twenga twakombwili kukipu'twa?
15.11: Kaneibe nyo, ila tuu'bi'lya panga twenga kati bembe tukosopolelwa kwa ndi'la ya ngu'ngu' ya Bwana Yesu.”
15.12: Kitamo soti satami liki, kabaapi'kania Balanaba na Pauli kabaawanikia mangelongelo goti Nnu'ngu' gaapangite kwo pi'tya bembe kwa bandu bangali Ayahudi.
15.13: Pabaayomwi longela Yakobi ngabaya, “Mwalongo bangu', munipi'kani!
15.14: Simoni aawanikiye apo patumbu Nnu'ngu' mwaapangile bandu bangali Ayahudi, ngaasawa bi'ngi' babe bandu bake.
15.15: Likowe li'no ngaliyi'ki'tyana na mayi'gi'yo ga alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' kati Maandiko Mapeleteu mwagalongela.
15.16: ‘Bu'ka pa makowe ga nalu'a ki'li'bu'ka no senga kai' utawala wa Daudi wausengwanike. Mbala bi'ka wiso no kangamaya kai'.
15.17: Li'nga bandu bi'ngi' boti, bandu bangali Ayahudi banaakemite babe bangu', baalu'a kunigalambukya.
15.18: Amo nga mwalongela Bwana, ywapangite likowe li' litanganikwe bu'ka kwai'mbu'.’
15.19: “Kwa nyo pala kwangu' kanetwaauye bandu bangali Ayahudi babanng'alambukya Nnu'ngu'.
15.20: Ila twapeleki balua ya kwabakia panga kanebapange upege, kanebalye ilyo yaibi'ki'lilwe kwa inyago, kanebalye kinyama sosoti sakipopotolilwe wala nywa myai.
15.21: Kwa mwanjaa bu'ka kwai'mbu' salya ya Musa yabile kaialilwa muilambo yoti no somelwa mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' kila Sabato.” Balua kwa aumini bangali Ayahudi
15.22: Atumilwe, api'ndo, na aumini boti baamwile kwasawa bandu nkati yabe na kwatuma Antiokia pamope na Pauli na Balanaba. Bai, ngabaasawa Yuda Balsaba na Sila babaabile alongosi ba au'bi'lya.
15.23: Nabembe ngabaatuma na balua yaiandikilwe nyinya. “Twenga twatumilwe na api'ndo, twalongo binu, tummakia mukayumukanga mwenga mwalongo mwangali Ayahudi mwammile akwo Antiokia, Silia, na Kilikia.
15.24: Tuyu'wine panga bandu bi'ngi' bu'ka ku'no kwitu baatikunsuluya mwenga kwa mayi'gi'yo gabe, baipangite myoyo yinu ibe na kyukala. Lakini baapangite nyo wangali yi'ki'ti'lwa na ywoywoti bu'ka kwitu.
15.25: Kwa nyo tuyi'ki'tyaniye kwa pamope kwasawa bandu nsi'si' na kwatuma kwinu pamope na batwapendile Balanaba na Pauli,
15.26: babaayi'ki'ti ata waa kwa mwanjaa ya lina lya Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu.
15.27: Kwa nyo twatuma Yuda na Sila kwinu babalu'a kummakia bene aga gatumwandikyanga.
15.28: Bai, Loo Mpeleteu na twenga tuyi'ki'tyaniye kanetwatwi'ke kigombo pi'ti'li'ki'ya pa makowe aga gangama.
15.29: Kanemupange upege, kanemulye ilyo yaibi'ki'lilwe kwa inyago, kanemulye kinyama sosoti sakipopotolilwe wala nywa myai. Mwapanga kinannoga mana mwakotoka panga go. Muyumukage!”
15.30: Bu'ka pa kwalaga, abo bandu baayi'i Antiokia akwo baakemite kitamo sa aumini, ngabaapeya yo balua.
15.31: Pabaaisomike ayo balua, mayi'gi'yo gake gaatikwasenga ngabapulaika muno.
15.32: Yuda na Sila, babaai alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', baatilongela na abo alongo aumini kwa mayi'gi'yo maingi, kabaasenga na kwakangamaya.
15.33: Bu'ka po tama kwo kwa masu'ba nsi'si', alongo ba Antiokia baatikwalaga kababaya, “Yendage, mwakimambwiga bitu.” Bu'kapo baaki'li'bu'ki kwa balu' babaatumike.
15.35: Lakini Pauli na Balanaba baaigali kwo Antiokia kwa masu'ba, ngabayi'gana no ala liyi'gi'yo lya Bwana, pamope na bandu bi'ngi' baingi. Pauli na Balanaba bendalekangana
15.36: Bu'ka pa masu'ba maingi Pauli aammakie Balanaba, “Tuki'li'bu'ke tukaakabwe balu' alongo mu kila kilambo satualite liyi'gi'yo lya Bwana, tukaalole mwabayendelya.”
15.37: Balanaba apalage bampu'twe na Yoani Maluko.
15.38: Lakini Pauli aapendili kumpu'twa Yoani Maluko kwa mwanjaa patumbu aatikwaleka ku'lu' Pamfilia no kana kwayangatiya lyengo lyabe.
15.39: Bai, kwapitike na ntau kati yabe, ngabalekangana. Balanaba ngantola Yoani Maluko, ngabau'bu'ka meli yenda Kuplo.
15.40: Naywembe Pauli ngaansawa Sila. Bu'kapo, alongo ba pandu palu' ngabaalu'bya uli'nda wa ngu'ngu' ya Bwana, ngababu'ka.
15.41: Mumwanja wo aapi'ti Silia na Kilikia, kaikangamaya imani ya bandu mumakanisa.

16.1: Pauli aaikite Delbe na Lustila, kwaatami mwanamasi' ywakemelwage Timoteo. Mau' bake baai aumini ba Kiyahudi, lakini tati' bake baai Agiliki.
16.2: Bandu ba Lustila na Ikonio baakong'ondeli unogau wa Timoteo.
16.3: Pauli aapalike longwana nakwe Timoteo mumwanja wake, kwa nyo aatikumwina. Aapangite nyo kwa mwanjaa Ayahudi boti ba po baatangite panga tati' bake Timoteo baai Agiliki.
16.4: Pabaapite muilambo yi'lu' baapei bandu malagyo gagaapiyilwe na atumilwe na api'ndo ku'lu' ku Yelusalemu, ngababakia bagakamwe.
16.5: Kwa nyo galu' makanisa gendekomala muimani na mitumbi ya aumini yendeyongekea kila lisu'ba. Pauli agabona makowe gayambi' ku'lu' Tiloa
16.6: Baapi'ti Fulugia na Galatia kwa mwanjaa Loo Mpeleteu aabayi'ki'tiyeli ala mayi'gi'yo ga Nnu'ngu' munni'ma waukemelwage Asia.
16.7: Pabaaikite mumipaka ya Misia bapayike yingya munni'ma wa Bitinia, lakini Loo wa Yesu aabayi'ki'tiyeli.
16.8: Bai, ngabapi'tya Misia no yenda ntawalia mpaka Tiloa.
16.9: Kilo so Pauli aagabweni makowe gayambi', gaamweni mundu yumo ywa Makedonia ayi'mi palu' na kunnu'ba, “Uloke wise Makedonia utuyangatiye.”
16.10: Bu'ka pa Pauli kugabona makowe gayambi' go twaamwile kwibi'ka wiso yenda Makedonia kiyu'ngu'ya, twakwipwi kakape panga Nnu'ngu' atukemite twaali abali inannoga ku'lu'. U'bi'lya kwa Lidia
16.11: Bu'ka Tiloa twayi'i kwa meli ntawalia mpaka Samotilake na pammalau' yake ngatuyi'ma Neapoli.
16.12: Bu'ka kwo, ngatuyenda mpaka Filipi, simo sa kilambo kiku'lu' sa Makedonia, kai' nga koloni lya Roma. Twaatami mukilambo so kwa masu'ba nsi'si'.
16.13: Sabato ya Ayahudi twapitike panja ya kilambo na twayi'i mbwega ya libi'ndi', tukitage panga nga pandu po sali. Twatetama no longela na alwawa babaakongolekine pandu po.
16.14: Nkati ya balu' babatupi'kaniage aai nnwawa yumo ywankilikitya Nnu'ngu' ywakemelwage Lidia mwenekaya wa Tiatila ywabile nsulusi wa ngu'bo ya katani ya lukanda lwa sambalau. Bwana aauyu'wi mwoyo wake ata api'kani no pokya galu' mayi'gi'yo gaagalongei Pauli.
16.15: Bu'ka pa aywo nnwawa pamope na alongobe batisilwa, aatitukoka kabaya, “Manaitei kakape mwibona panga nenga nimwu'bi'li Bwana, ninkemyanga kaya mukatame.” Aatuli'ndi'ndi'li tuyende. Pauli na Sila bendaboyolwa
16.16: Lisu'ba limo patwaabile katuyenda pandu po sali, mwi'nja yumo mmanda ywaabile na moka go londwa aakwembine na twenga. Kwa ulondoli wa mwi'nja ywo matayili bake bapatage mbanje yambone.
16.17: Bai, aywo mwi'nja aankotiye Pauli na twenga kapanga ndu'ti no baya, “Aba atumisi ba Nnu'ngu' Nku'lu'. Bammakianga ndi'la ya ukosopoli.”
16.18: Apangite nyo kwa masu'ba gambone. Lisu'ba limo, Pauli paauyilwe, ngaang'alambukya aywo mwi'nja na kugabakia ago moka, “Kwa lina lya Yesu Kilisitu, nikuamulisa ummu'ke mundu yu'!” Popopo ago moka gaatikummu'ka.
16.19: Matayili ba yu'lu' mwi'nja pabakwipwi panga ndi'la yabe yo pata mali iyomwike, baaboywi Pauli na Sila, ngabaakwakwata mpaka kwa bandu nnu'ngi' ya api'ndo ba kilambo.
16.20: Ngabaasitakya kwa maakimu kababaya, “Bandu ba nga Ayahudi na bapanga puyo mukilambo situ.
16.21: Bayi'gana makowe gagakanilwa kugakoleya twabandu ba Roma.”
16.22: Kipi'nga sa bandu sasaabile palu' salu'mbine na balu' maakimu, ngabaaula magu'bo gabe Pauli na Sila kwa makakala no amulisa baku'mbu'lwe mikwasu.
16.23: Bu'ka po ku'mbu'lwa munomuno, ngababi'ki'lwa nnyumba na asikali wa nyumba ya atabilwe ngaamuliswa kwabi'ka muuli'nda nkali'.
16.24: Bu'kana na amuli yo baabi'kite musumba sa nkati muno sa nyumba ya atabilwe na kugatabya magu'lu' gabe mulipi'ki'ti' lya nkongo lyaliotolilwe.
16.25: Papipi na meku Pauli na Sila baai kabasali no yi'mba myambo ya kunnumba Nnu'ngu', na ku'no atabilwe bi'ngi' baai kabaapi'kania.
16.26: Kwa kiimuimu kwapitike nnendemo nku'lu' wa bwi', wawalendemiye nyumba ya atabilwe. Popopo milyango yoti na pingwi ya atabilwe abo atabilwe yateyu'gu'ka.
16.27: Asikali wa nyumba ya atabilwe paayumwike na kwibona milyango ya nyumba ya atabilwe iyu'gu'lilwe, akitage panga atabilwe boti batolwike, na nyo aasolomwi lipanga lyake pala kwibulaga.
16.28: Lakini Pauli ngakema kwa lilobe liku'lu', “Kanewibulage wamwene kwa mwanjaa twenga tubile papano!”
16.29: Bu'ka pa kunkema mundu leta lumuli, aywo asikali wa nyumba ya atabilwe aabutuki nnyumba ngaitaikulya nnu'ngi' ya magu'lu' ga Pauli na Sila, ku'no kalendema kwo yogopa.
16.30: Bu'kapo aatikwalongoya panja, ngaalaluya, “Mwabakoo, nipange buli li'nga nikosopolelwe?”
16.31: Bembe ngabannyangwa, “Umwu'bi'li Bwana Yesu nawenga walu'a kosopolelwa, pamope na alongo boti ba pansengo wako.”
16.32: Bai, ngabamwalya liyi'gi'yo lya Bwana, ywembe na bandu ba pansengo wake woti.
16.33: Yu'lu' asikali aatikwapu'twa saa yi'yi'lu'yi'lu' ya kilo ngaagu'lwa mabanga gabe, bu'kapo ywembe na alongo bake ngababatisilwa popopo.
16.34: Bu'kapo ngaalongwana nabo Pauli na Sila kasake na kwapeya kilyo. Ywembe na alongo bake boti ngabapanga si'li'ku'si'li'ku' kwa mwanjaa nambi'yambi' bamwu'bi'li Nnu'ngu'.
16.35: Pammalau' yake kindai', maakimu baatumike ayangatiyi babe kababaya, “Mwayu'gu'li balu' bandu babu'ke.”
16.36: Yu'lu' asikali wa nyumba ya atabilwe aampei abali Pauli, “Maakimu batumite abali li'nga muyu'gu'li'lwe. Nambi'yambi' mwendakombwa bu'ka no yenda kwa amani.”
16.37: Pauli ngaabakia ayangatiyi, “Ati' ki'li'? Baatuku'mbwi mikwasu pa bandu wangali senulwa na twenga twabandu ba Roma. Kai' batubi'kite muutabilwe na nambi'yambi' bapala kutuyu'gu'lya kwa kinyemela! Ata pasene! Ipalikwa maakimu baise bene paapanopano batuyu'gu'li.”
16.38: Abo ayangatiyi baapei abali ya likowe lyo maakimu, nabembe pabaayu'wine panga Pauli na Sila baai bandu ba Roma, baatiyogopa.
16.39: Kwa nyo baayi'i kwalu'ba nsama na kwapiya muutabilwe, bu'kapo baalu'bike babu'ke pakilambo si'lu'.
16.40: Pauli na Sila pabaapiyilwe munyumba ya atabilwe baayi'i kunyumba ya Lidia. Akwo bakwembine na alongo aumini no bu'ka pa kwasenga, ngababu'ka.

17.1: Kwo pi'tya Amfipoli na Apolonia baayi'i mpaka Tesalonike, kwayaabile nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' ya Ayahudi.
17.2: Pauli aatiyingya kati mwagaabile mayobelya gake, aalongei nabo ntawalia kwa masu'ba goti gatatu ga Sabato ya Ayahudi katumya Maandiko Mapeleteu.
17.3: Aatikwaawanikia panga Kilisitu yaapalikwe abe mungu'su'mbu' no yu'ka bu'ka kwa awi'li. Ngaabakia, “Yesu ywanimwala kasinu nga Kilisitu.”
17.4: Bi'ngi' babe, lipi'nga lya Agiliki babankilikityage Nnu'ngu' pamope na alwawa baingi babaisimika baatiu'bi'lya, ngabalu'mbana nabo Pauli na Sila.
17.5: Lakini Ayahudi baabi'i bwigu, ngabaakoka bandu baakau kusoko panga kipi'nga no tumbwa puyo mukilambo soti. Ngabautangya nsengo wa Yasoni kabaapala Pauli na Sila li'nga baalete pa bandu.
17.6: Lakini baapatikeli. Kwa nyo, bankwakwatike Yasoni pamope na alongo bi'ngi' mpaka kwa api'ndo ba kilambo, ngabapanga ndu'ti, “Bandu ba baai kabaasopa bandu ba dunia yoti, na nambi'yambi' bai pano pakilambo.
17.7: Yasoni aakemi kasake. Boti bati'kwana amuli ya Kaisali kababaya, ‘Kubile na nkulungwa ywi'ngi' ywakemelwa Yesu.’ ”
17.8: Kwa mayi'gi'yo go baapei kyukala api'ndo ba kilambo na kipi'nga sa bandu.
17.9: Baapangite Yasoni na aine boti bapie mbwatyo, bu'kapo ngabaaleka bayende kasabe. Bandu ba Belea bapokya Liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'
17.10: Kilo balu' alongo aumini baaindikiye Pauli na Sila bayende Belea. Pabaaikite kwo bai, baayi'i munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' ya Ayahudi.
17.11: Bandu ba kwo baai kinannyu'wa muno kuliko balu' ba Tesalonike. Baatigapokya galu' mayi'gi'yo kwa kilu'lu' muno, ngabapekeseni Maandiko Mapeleteu kila lisu'ba li'nga lola kati galu' gaalongei Pauli na Sila gaai ga kakape.
17.12: Baingi babe baatiu'bi'lya na alwawa babaisimika ba Kigiliki na analu'me kai'.
17.13: Lakini Ayahudi ba Tesalonike pabakwipwi panga Pauli aai kaala liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' akwo Belea, baayi'i kwo no tumbwa panga puyo no sopa ipi'nga ya bandu.
17.14: Balu' alongo aumini baamwindikiye Pauli kiyu'ngu'ya ayende kumbwani, lakini Sila na Timoteo baaigali Belea.
17.15: Balu' alongo babaamwindikiye Pauli baayi'i pamope nakwe mpaka Atene. Pabaabakiyilwe na Pauli panga Sila na Timoteo banki'ngame kiyu'ngu'ya, ngababuya. Pauli alongela na bandu ba ku Atene
17.16: Pauli paabile kaali'nda Sila na Timoteo akwo Atene, mwoyo wake watwi'li nyongo muno paakibweni kilambo so kitwi'li inyago ya kinnu'ngu'.
17.17: Aataukine na Ayahudi na bandu bi'ngi' babakilikitage nabo munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'. Kila lisu'ba aai kalongela na bandu, pamope na boti balu' babaaisile kusoko.
17.18: Balimu ba ipi'nga ya wa Epikuro na wa Sitoiki, baatitaukyana nakwe. Bi'ngi' baatibaya, “Apala longela ki'li' ayu' pwetela?” Kwa mwanjaa Pauli aai kaala makowe ga Yesu na uyu'ki, bi'ngi' baabaite, “Ibonekana kati aala makowe ga kinnu'ngu' ageni.”
17.19: Kwa nyo bampu'twi Pauli ngabampeleka ku Balasa lya Aleopago kababaya, “Tupala tutange likowe li' lyayambi' lyaulilongelyage.
17.20: Ili'be yi'ngi' yatuyu'wine kwa makutu gitu tunaiyu'wali. Twapendi tanga makowe ga galombolya ki'li'.”
17.21: Bandu ba Atene na atami bi'ngi' ba kwo baai ntu'pu' sabapangage ila yaulyana no pi'kania makowe gayambi' gagapitike.
17.22: Bai, Pauli aayi'mi nnu'ngi' ya kitamo sa Aleopago, ngabaya, “Mwabandu ba Atene! Nibona panga mwenga nga mwabandu ba dini muno.
17.23: Kwa mwanjaa panaabile kanipi'ta akwo na kwo naibweni inyago yinu. Pakibi'ki'lyo simo sakiandikilwe, ‘Kwa Nnu'ngu' ywangatanganikwa.’ Bai, aywo ywamunkilikitya wangantanga, nga ywanimwalya mwenga.
17.24: Nnu'ngu' ywaumbike dunia na yoti yaibile mo, nga Bwana wa kunani na dunia, ywembe atamali mumayumba gagasengilwe na bandu.
17.25: Wala ayangatiyilwali na moko ga bandu panga kite apala sosoti si'lu', kwa mwanjaa ywembe mwene nga ywaapeya bandu ukoti, pu'mwa na kila kili'be.
17.26: Kwo pi'tya mundu yumo Nnu'ngu' aaumbite makabila goti na kwapanga batame mudunia yoti. Aatiamwa pakubawi na kwaku' kwo tama makabila go.
17.27: Aapangite nyo li'nga makabila go gakombwe kunkoleya ata kwo papakia li'nga kumwikya. Lakini ata nyo, Nnu'ngu' abileli kuutalu na kila mundu.
17.28: Kati mwaabaite mundu yumo, ‘Nkati yake ywembe twenga twendatama, twendaegela na tubile,’ kati mwabalongei mumayandiko ginu gi'ngi', ‘Twenga nga twabana bake.’
17.29: “Manaitei twenga twabana ba Nnu'ngu', inogelelyali kunng'anikia Nnu'ngu' panga kati zaabu, kyu'ma au ata liwe lyalibasilwe no lembelwa na mundu.
17.30: Nnu'ngu' aapangite kati alolali nsimu gu'lu' bandu pabaabile alalo. Lakini nambi'yambi' aamulisa bandu boti na kila pandu banng'alambuki Nnu'ngu' kwa kwileka sambi.
17.31: Kwa mwanjaa ayomwile libi'ka lisu'ba lyaalu'a kwasenwa bandu kwa aki kwa ndi'la ya mundu yumo ywansawile. Nnu'ngu' aalayike boti likowe li' kwa kunnyu'ya mundu ywo bu'ka kuuwi'li!”
17.32: Pabannyu'wine Pauli kalongelya likowe lyo yu'ka kwa awi'li, bi'ngi' babe baatikunsalawa lakini bi'ngi' baatibaya, “Tupala tumpi'kaniye kai' likowe li'!”
17.34: Lakini bandu mitumbi nsi'si' baatilongwana nakwe ngabapanga aumini. Nkati ya bandu bo baai Dionisio wa Balasa lya Aleopago, nnwawa yumo ywakemelwage Damali, na bi'ngi' babe.

18.1: Bu'ka pa go, Pauli abu'i Atene yenda Kolinto.
18.2: Akwo Kolinto ankoli Nnyahudi yumo ywakemelwage Akula, ywabelekuli Ponto. Akula, pamope na nnyumbowe ywakemelwage Plisikila, baai baki'li'bwike bu'ka Italia masu'ba gogogo kwa mwanjaa Kaisali Klaudio aamulise Ayahudi boti babu'ke Roma. Pauli aayi'i kwatyangilya,
18.3: na kwa mwanjaa bembe baai mapundi bo sona maema kati ywembe, Pauli aatitama no panga nabo kasi.
18.4: Kila Sabato ya Ayahudi aatiala munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', kapaya kwaatebeya Ayahudi na Agiliki.
18.5: Bu'ka pa Sila na Timoteo ika bu'ka Makedonia, Pauli aatumbwi tumya wakati wake woti kwo ala, kaakong'ondelya Ayahudi panga Yesu nga Kilisitu.
18.6: Pabankanile no tumbwa kumpwi'wa aakung'undike ngu'bo yake nnu'ngi' yabe kabaya, “Mana mwobite mwatanga mwabene, nenga ntu'pu' lukoolo lwolwoti kwa likowe lyo. No bu'ka nambi'yambi' nalu'a kwayendelya bandu bi'ngi' bangali Ayahudi.”
18.7: Bu'kapo, ngayenda tama kasake mundu ywankilikitya Nnu'ngu' ywakemelwage Tito Yusito, ywembe nyumba yake yaai papipi na yi'lu' nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'.
18.8: Kilispo, mpi'ndo ywa nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', aamwu'bi'li Bwana pamope na alongo bake boti. Akolinto baingi baatikugapi'kania makowe go ngabau'bi'lya no batisilwa.
18.9: Lisu'ba limo kilo Bwana aammakie Pauli mumakowe gayambi', “Kaneuyogope, uyendeli ala wangali kotoka,
18.10: kwa mwanjaa nenga nibile pamope nawe. Ntu'pu' mundu ywaalu'a kukusulu mwanjaa pano pakilambo pabile na bandu baingi bababile kwangu'.”
18.11: Bai, Pauli aatami kwo kayi'gana liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' kwabe kwa mwaka gumo na myei sita.
18.12: Nsimu Galio paabile mpi'ndo ywa nkoa wa Akaya, Ayahudi batikuntangya Pauli kwa pamope na kumpeleka kumankama,
18.13: kababaya, “Tunsitakya mundu yu' kwa mwanjaa asopa bandu bankilikiti Nnu'ngu' kwa ndi'la yangayi'ki'tyana na salya.”
18.14: Pauli abile balo longela, Galio ngaabakia, “Mupi'kaniange mwenga Mwaayahudi! Manaitei kakape likowe li' likaba kwa makowe maakau nilu'e kumpi'kanianga.
18.15: Lakini kwa kitumbu sa ntau wa mayi'gi'yo na maina ga salya yinu, muyomwane mwabene. Nenga ngani panga nsenuli wa makowe go.”
18.17: Nabembe boti ngabammoywa Sositene ywaabile mpi'ndo ywa nyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', ngabanku'mbwa papalu'palu' nnu'ngi' ya mankama. Lakini Galio aasitwikeli kyendo so ata pasene. Pauli abuyangania Antiokia kai'
18.18: Pauli aatami na balu' alongo akwo Kolinto kwa masu'ba maingi. Bu'kapo ngaalaga no u'bu'ka meli yenda Silia pamope na Plisikila na Akula. Akwo Kenklea, aasekwi nywili yake kwa mwanjaa ya nyalili yaabi'kite.
18.19: Paaikite Efeso, Pauli aalei Plisikila na Akula, aayi'i munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' ngalongela na Ayahudi.
18.20: Baannu'bite atame nabo kwa masu'ba gambone, lakini aayi'ki'tili.
18.21: Ila paabile kabu'ka, ngaabakia, “Nnu'ngu' mana apendile nalu'a isa kai' kasinu.” Bu'kapo, ngabu'ka kwa meli.
18.22: Meli yatiyi'ma Kaisalia, naywembe Pauli ngayenda kwakabwa balu' aumini, bu'kapo ngayenda Antiokia.
18.23: Aatami kwo kwa masu'ba, bu'kapo ngayendelya na mwanja kwo pi'tya ku Galatia na Fulugia kaasenga banamasi' boti. Apolo endaala ku Efeso na ku Kolinto
18.24: Nnyahudi yumo ywakemelwage Apolo mmelekulya ku Alekisandilia, aaikite Efeso. Aai mundu mwene malango kwo longela na ywagamanyi muno Maandiko Mapeleteu.
18.25: Aayi'ganilwe ndi'la ya Bwana, na kwa mwanjaa li'lu' liyi'gi'yo liyakage pamwoyo wake, aayi'gine wisowiso abali ya Yesu pamope no panga apatike ubatiso wa Yoani bai.
18.26: Plisikila na Akula pabannyu'wine kalongela kwo kangamala munyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', baampu'tu'li kasabe ngabannyi'gana ayo ndi'la ya Nnu'ngu' kwa wisowiso muno.
18.27: Apolo paabile kabu'ka yenda Akaya, balu' alongo batikunsenga kwa kwaandikya banamasi' ba Akaya bampoki. Paaikite kwo, aakombwi kwayangatiya balu' alongo babaau'bi'lile kwa ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu',
18.28: kwa mwanjaa aayendeli kwo kangamala ngaasinda Ayahudi pa bandu kaalaya bu'ka mu Maandiko Mapeleteu panga Yesu nga Kilisitu.

19.1: Nsimu Apolo paabile Kolinto, Pauli aai mumwanja kumili'ma miyu'mu' mpaka ku Efeso, akwo aakwembite banamasi' nsi'si'.
19.2: Aatikwalaluya, “Buli, mwenga pamwau'bi'lile mwapokile Loo Mpeleteu?” Nabembe ngabannyangwa, “Lili! Ata tunayu'wali panga kubile na Loo Mpeleteu.”
19.3: Naywembe Pauli ngaalaluya, “Mwabatisilwe kwa ubatiso waku'?” Ngabannyangwa, “Ubatiso wa Yoani.”
19.4: Nembe Pauli ngaabakia, “Yoani aabatisike balu' babanng'alambuki Nnu'ngu' kwa kwileka sambi na kwabakia bamwu'bi'li yu'lu' ywaalu'a isa nsu'gu' yake, nga Yesu.”
19.5: Pabaayu'wine go, ngababatisilwa kwa lina lya Bwana Yesu.
19.6: Bai, Pauli ngaabi'kya maboko kwalu'bya na Loo Mpeleteu ngaaulukya, baatumbwi longela luga yayambi' no londwa.
19.7: Boti mayumu baai analu'me mitumbi ku'mi na abi'li'.
19.8: Kwa myei itatu Pauli ayendage kunyumba ya kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', na akwo alongelage na bandu wangali yogopa, li'nga kwauta bau'bi'li Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'.
19.9: Lakini bi'ngi' bendetauka, baakani u'bi'lya no tumbwa longela maakau kwikana ndi'la ya Bwana pakipi'nga sa bandu. Apo Pauli aakani baa nabo pamope, aapelike pambwega balu' banamasi' bake, aai kalongela nabo kila lisu'ba munyumba yo somya ya mundu yumo ywakemelwage Tilano.
19.10: Aayendeli panga nyo kwa myaka ibi'li', ata bandu boti ba Asia, Ayahudi na bandu bangali Ayahudi, baakombwi yu'wa liyi'gi'yo lya Bwana. Bana ba Sekewa bapaya bi'nga moka
19.11: Nnu'ngu' aapangite mangelongelo maku'lu' kwa moko ga Pauli.
19.12: Magu'bo na itambala yaponolyage lyusu Pauli, yaapelekilwe kwa atamwe nabembe baatepulilwe matamwe gabe, na balu' bene moka gaatikwabu'ka.
19.13: Kwabile na Ayahudi bababi'ngage moka ku'no na kwo, kabapaya kulitumya lina lya Bwana Yesu kwa balu' babaayingililwe na moka. Babayage, “Nimwamulisa kwa lina lya Yesu yu'lu' ywaalilwa na Pauli mummu'ke mundu yu'.”
19.14: Bana saba ba Sekewa, Mpi'ndo wa dini ya Kiyahudi, ngabapangage nyo.
19.15: Lakini moka aatikwayangwa, “Nintangite Yesu, kai' ata Pauli ninnyu'wine, lakini mwenga mwakinyai?”
19.16: Bu'kapo, yu'lu' mundu ywayingililwe na moka aatikwalipulya boti na kwapi'ta kwa makakala. Na abo bana ba Sekewa baatitila bu'ka munyumba yi'lu' wausu na mabanga gambone.
19.17: Kila mundu ywabile Nnyahudi na ywangali Nnyahudi akwo ku Efeso aaliyu'wine likowe lyo. Boti baatiyogopa, ngabalikwi'ya lina lya Bwana Yesu.
19.18: Bandu baingi bu'ka mwa balu' babaau'bi'lile nsimu wo baatiisa no buyangania kwa Nnu'ngu' wabe kababaya masambi galu' gabagapangage, wangali iya.
19.19: Na bandu baingi bu'ka mubalu' babapangage makowe ga bwabi', baakongwi itabu yabe ya kwiyi'ganikia na kwitiniya mwoto bandu kabalola. Baapangite isabu ya mbanje yaikombwa pi'ma itabu yo, yaai yene samani ngu'lu'.
19.20: Kwa nyo, liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' lyayongekiye landala no yendelya pangika kwa makakala ga Nnu'ngu'. Mayu'mano ku Efeso
19.21: Pagayomwike pitya makowe go, Pauli aabini pamwoyo wake yenda ku Yelusalemu kwo pi'tya Makedonia na Akaya. Aabaite, “Bu'ka po ika kwo, nipalikwa niyende ku Roma.”
19.22: Kwa nyo, aatumike bandu abi'li' ayangatiyi bake Timoteo na Elasito bannongoli yenda ku Makedonia, ywembe mwene aaigali ku Asia kwa masu'ba.
19.23: Awo, nga wai nsimu wu'lu' wagaapitike mayu'mano maku'lu' kwa kitumbu sa ndi'la yi'lu' ya Bwana.
19.24: Mundu yumo ywakemelwage Demetilio, ywaabile na kipala, ayanage yu'ma li'nga tengenesa inyago ya nyumba ya nnu'ngu' ywakemelwage Atemi, na kwapeya nsuluso nku'lu' ywembe na mapundi aine.
19.25: Aakemi pamope na bandu bi'ngi' babapanga lyengo lya upundi wo yana kati ywembe aatikwabakia, “Mwenga mwa bandu! Utayili witu ubu'kana na usulusi wu'no.
19.26: Kai', mwenga mwendakugabona gapanga Pauli ga kwakonga na kwaobeya bandu, ku'no ku Efeso na ku Asia yoti kaabakia panga, ‘Inyago yaiyanilwe na bandu, kinnu'ngu' lili ata pasene.’
19.27: Kwa nyo kubile na makowe manonopau kwenda kwo obeya isima ya lyengo litu bai lili, ila ata kunyumba ya kunkilikitya nnu'ngu' nnwawa Atemi ywabile nku'lu', ywakilikitilwa ku Asia na dunia yoti, ukulungwa wake waapanga upokonyolilwe.”
19.28: Pabayu'wine makowe go, baatiusika no tumbwa panga ndu'ti kababaya, “Atemi ywa Efeso nga nku'lu'!”
19.29: Kilambo soti satwi'li puyo. Bannyingili Gayo na nnyine Alisitako, benekaya ba Makedonia babaabile mumwanja umo na Pauli. Baatikwaboywa no butuka nabo mpaka kulua lwo kwembanikia.
19.30: Mwene Pauli apalage longela na kipi'nga so sa bandu, lakini aumini baatikunkanikiya.
19.31: Alongosi bi'ngi' ba ku Asia, babaabile mambwigalye Pauli, baatumike bandu bankwi'li'ke panga kaneayingi muluwa lwo kwembanikia.
19.32: Pandu po kila mundu endepu'yu'ta bai, ywi'ngi' kalongela li', na ywi'ngi' li'lu', mpaka si'lu' kitamo saatimunaika. Baingi baatangiteli ata kitumbu so kwembana kwabe.
19.33: Ayahudi bannyi'mike Alekisanda nnu'ngi', ngabammakia makowe go longela. Bai, ngaapu'ngya luboko pala aikengi pa kipi'nga sa bandu.
19.34: Lakini pabaakwipwi panga ywembe Nnyahudi, boti kwa pamope baapangite ndu'ti kababaya, “Atemi ywa Efeso nga nku'lu'!” Baayendeli pu'yu'ta nyo kwa masaa gabi'li'.
19.35: Bu'kapo mwandiki ywa kilambo ngakitamika liki kipi'nga sa bandu na aatikwabakia, “Mwenga mwa bandu ba ku Efeso, dunia yoti itangite panga kilambo sa Efeso ngakili'ndi'la nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' Atemi ywabile nku'lu', na si'lu' kinyago sake sakitu'mbwike bu'ka kunani.
19.36: Bai, kwa mwanjaa makowe ga ntu'pu' ywakombwa kugakana, mupalikwa mutame liki kanemupange kikowe sosoti kwa kilokoloko.
19.37: Mwaletike bandu ba pano, pamope no panga bembe banayibali munyumba ya nnu'ngu', wala banankupululi ayu' nnu'ngu' witu.
19.38: Bai, manaitei Demetilio na mapundi aine babile na likowe lyolyoti kwa mundu ywoywoti, mabalasa gabile, na alongosi babile, bakasitakyane kwo.
19.39: Manaitei kubile na makowe gi'ngi' gogoti gamupala, gapalikwa gakaawanikiyilwe pa kibalangwa.
19.40: Kwa mwanjaa tulu'e sitakilwa kwa kitumbu sa puyo yatupangite li'no. Ntu'pu' kitumbu satukombwa piya sakilu'wa yi'ki'tyana na puyo yi'no.”

20.1: Paiyomwike puyo ya palu' Efeso, Pauli aakemi pamope aumini, ngaasenga myoyo yabe na kwalaga, ngaayabwa mwanja wo yenda Makedonia.
20.2: Aapi'ti muilambo yambone ya munni'ma wu'lu' ku'no kalongela na bandu makowe maingi ga kwasenga myoyo, ngaika ku Uyunani,
20.3: akwo aatami myei itatu. Aapalike yabwa mwanja kwa ndi'la ya baali yenda ku Shamu, lakini kwa mwanjaa Ayahudi baampangi masauli maakau, ngaileka ndi'la yo no buyangana kwo pi'tya ndi'la ya Makedonia.
20.4: Pauli aalongwaniye na Sopatilo mwana wa Pilo bu'ka Belea, Alisitako na Sekundo bu'ka Tesalonike, Gayo mundu wa bu'ka Delbe, Timoteo pamope na Tikiko na Tilofimo wa kunni'ma wa ku Asia.
20.5: Ila bandu bo baatilongolya, baayi'i kutuli'nda ku Tiloa.
20.6: Bu'ka po pi'ta si'li'ku'si'li'ku' ya makati gangalu'la, na twenga twau'bwike meli bu'ka Filipi. Twaai mumwanja kwa masu'ba matano, ngatulu'mbana na aitu akwo Tiloa, ngatutama yuma yimo. Yu'ka kwa Eutiko ku Tiloa
20.7: Lisu'ba lya Jumapili, twaakwembine li'nga metwana likati pamope. Pauli aalongei na bandu, nembe kwa mwanjaa aabini bu'ka pammalau' yake, aayendeli longela mpaka meku.
20.8: Mu'lu' musumba kuligolopwa, kwaai na imuli yambone kaiyaka.
20.9: Mwinsembe yumo ywakemelwage Eutiko aatami palililisa, Pauli payendelyage ala liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' kwa masaa gambone, Eutiko aalobi lugono ngatu'mbu'ka bu'ka kugolofa yenetatu. Bantondwi awile.
20.10: Pauli auluki pai', aatiyinama na kunkumbatya ngabaya, “Kanemube na kyukala, ayu' mundu ayu'kite.”
20.11: Bu'kapo Pauli ngau'bu'kya kai' kuligolopwa, aalimetwi likati no lya. Aayendeli longela mpaka kakusaa, ngabu'ka.
20.12: Bandu bammuyanganiye kaya yu'lu' mwinsembe abi mwu'mi, nabembe myoyo yabe yaatiumukuka muno. Bu'ka Tiloa mpaka Mileto
20.13: Lakini twenga twaatilongolya u'bu'ka mumeli yenda Aso, kwembe ngatwaalagine tukampaki Pauli, kwa mwanjaa apalage ika kwo kwa ndi'la ya magu'lu'.
20.14: Bai, aatukwembite ku'lu' Aso, twamwu'bwiye mumeli, twabu'i pamope mpaka Mitilene.
20.15: Bu'kapo, twayendeli na mwanja, pammalau' yake ngatuika Kio. Lisu'ba lyenebi'li', twayi'mi Samo, na pammalau' ngatuika Mileto.
20.16: Pauli aabini yendelya na mwanja kwa meli wangali pi'tya ku Efeso. Akanage yomwa masu'ba gambone muno akwo ku Asia, kwa mwanjaa atamaniage akalikoli lisu'ba lya Pentekosite ku Yelusalemu. Akwo Mileto Pauli aalaga api'ndo ba aumini ba ku Efeso
20.17: Pauli paabile ku Mileto, aatumike bandu yenda ku Efeso kwakema api'ndo ba kanisa sababonagane nakwe.
20.18: Pababonagine nakwe aatikwabakia, “Mwenga mwabene munibweni mwanitami na mwenga masu'ba goti, bu'ka lisu'ba lyanitumbwi li'bata pano Asia.
20.19: Nintumikiye Bwana kwa kwibu'ya samani na kwa moli, kanikomeya mapayilwo gaganipatike bu'kana na ulau wa Ayahudi.
20.20: Mutangite panga nimwiyangiteli likowe ata limo lyanilibweni likombwa kunnyangatiya mwenga, lakini nannyi'ganiye pa bandu kai' pansengo gumo mpaka wi'ngi'.
20.21: Naakwi'like Ayahudi na bandu bangali Ayahudi panga banng'alambuki Nnu'ngu' kwa kugaleka masambi na kumwu'bi'lya Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu.
20.22: Bai, kwa mwanjaa ninnyu'wa Loo Mpeleteu, niyabwa mwanja wo yenda ku Yelusalemu, pamope no panga nigatangiteli gagayenda kunipata kwo.
20.23: Lakini sanikitangite si'no bai panga kila kilambo sanilu'a yenda Loo Mpeleteu anikong'ondelya panga pingwi na ngu'su'mbu' ngainili'nda.
20.24: Lakini, bwu'mi wangu' niubalangilyali panga wa ngama muno kwangu' nenga, kulikoni kwiyomolya nganjo yangu' ya lyengo lyanipeyilwe na Bwana Yesu, lya kwiala abali inannoga ya ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu'.
20.25: “Mulole mwoti mwanityangite, ala liyi'gi'yo lya Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu', ntu'pu' babaalu'a kunibona kai'.
20.26: Kwa nyo, li'no nendakummakianga panga nenga ntu'pu' mundu ywoywoti ywalu'a oba ywakunibi'kya lukoolo.
20.27: Kwa mwanjaa nenga nasi'yiteli kummakianga goti gaagapala Nnu'ngu'.
20.28: Muli'ndi'le myoyo yinu na kipi'nga soti si'lu' Loo Mpeleteu ammi'kite mwenga. Mulikote kanisa lyake Nnu'ngu' lyaalipi'mite kwa myai yake mwene.
20.29: Nitangite munomuno panga, mananibu'i nenga, bandu alau babalandana na mapu'mbe makali', baalu'a isa kunnyingilyanga wangali kibi'kya kiya kipi'nga si'no.
20.30: Kai', bu'ka mukipi'nga sinu mwabene, baakatuka bandu babaalu'a kwaobeya ayabe kwo galambuya mayi'gano, li'nga baaute aumini na baabi'ngi'ye bembe.
20.31: Kwa nyo, mube minyo ku'no kamuku'mbu'kya panga kwa myaka itatu ntawalia kilo na muntwekati, naatotokilweli kunkwi'li'ka kila mundu, ata kwa moli.
20.32: “Bai, nambi'yambi', nimmi'kanga mumaboko ga Nnu'ngu' na kwa liyi'gi'yo lya ngu'ngu' yake lyalikombwa kunsenga, na kumpeyanga ulisi pamope na boti babapeleteyilwe.
20.33: Nenga naaminyikiyeli mbanje, wala ili'be yoyoti yaileta utayili.
20.34: Mwenga mwabene mutangite panga maboko gangu' gano gatumike kwo paalya makowe gangu' namwene na balu' babaabile pamope nanenga.
20.35: Kwa makowe goti, ninnayite panga kwa ndi'la yo panga kasi kwo binia, tupalikwa kwayangatiya bangali uweso na kugaku'mbu'kya mayi'gi'yo ga Bwana Yesu gaabaite, ‘Nantali muno kumpeya mundu kulikoni pokya bu'ka kwa mundu.’ ”
20.36: Payomwi longela go, Pauli aatikilikita na kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' pamope nabo.
20.37: Boti baatili'la muno, ku'no kabannaga kwa kunkumbatya na kunnonia,
20.38: baatitotokelwa munomuno, kwa si'lu' saabakiye panga baalu'a kummonali kai'. Ngabamwindikiya mpaka payingi mumeli.

21.1: Patuyomwi lagana nabo, twau'bwike mumeli no yenda ntawalia mpaka Kosi. Pammalau' yake twaikite Lode, patubu'i kwo twayi'i Patala.
21.2: Apo, twaikoli meli yailokage yenda ku Foinike, twaatiu'bu'ka no yendanayo.
21.3: Patuikite Kuplo, twaasegite mbwega na kupaleka kumaki'ya gitu, twayendeli na mwanja mpaka Silia, twayi'mike meli yitu pakiloko sa Tilo, na apo meli yitu ngaipalikwage iuluye kigombo sake.
21.4: Akwo, twaakoli aumini batwaatami nabo kwa yuma yimo. Nabembe kabalongoyelwa na Loo Mpeleteu, bammakie Pauli panga kaneayende ku Yelusalemu.
21.5: Lakini pagayomwike masu'ba gotama palu', twaatibu'ka. Balu' aumini, pamope na alwawa na bana, baatituindikiya mpaka panja ya kilambo. Twaboti twaatikilikita palu' pambwani na kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'.
21.6: Patuyomwi lagana, twaayingi mumeli, nabembe ngababuyangania kasabe.
21.7: Patubu'i Tilo, ngatuika ku Tolemai, akwo twatami nabo alongo aumini kwa lisu'ba limo kwapanga abali no bonagana nabo.
21.8: Pammalau' yake twatibu'ka ngatuika Kaisalia, twaiki munyumba ya Pilipi ywaalage abali inannoga, ywaabile yumo mwa balu' bandu saba babaasagulilwe ku Yelusalemu kwayangatiya alwawa awi'li'ka.
21.9: Pilipi aabile na ai'nja banee, bembe baapeyilwe uweso wa ulondoli wa Nnu'ngu'.
21.10: Bai, patutami kwo kwa masu'ba gambone, ngaisa Agabo, nnondoli yumo ywa Nnu'ngu', bu'ka ku Yudea.
21.11: Paatukolile, aautweti nkanda wa Pauli na kwitaba maboko na magu'lu' no baya, “Loo Mpeleteu abaya nnyanya, ‘Ayahudi ku'lu' ku Yelusalemu nga mwabaalu'a kuntaba mwene nkanda wu'no nyinyonyo na kunnyi'ya mumaboko ga bandu bangali Ayahudi.’ ”
21.12: Patugayu'wine go, bandu bi'ngi' babaabile pamope na twenga ngatunnu'ba muno Pauli kaneayende ku Yelusalemu.
21.13: Lakini Pauli aatiyangwa, “Mupala panga namani? Mupala kuniti'kwana mwoyo wangu' kwa moli ginu? Nenga niyi'ki'tile kwenda tabilwa baili, ata kiwo kwa kitumbu sa lina lya Bwana Yesu.”
21.14: Paakani yi'ki'tya katukatu gatummakie, ngatunneka katubaya, “Lyalibini Bwana lipaangike.”
21.15: Patutami palu' kwa masu'ba, twaibi'i wiso no yendelya na mwanja witu wa ku Yelusalemu.
21.16: Bi'ngi' ba aumini bu'ka Kaisalia baalongwaniye na twenga kutuindikia, ngatuika kasake Mnasoni, mundu wa Kuplo, akwo ngatwaayi'i tama. Ywembe aabile yumo ywa aumini ba patumbu. Pauli akwembana na Yakobi akwo ku Yelusalemu
21.17: Patuikite ku Yelusalemu, alongo baatupoki kwo napusika muno.
21.18: Pammalau' yake, twalongwaniye na Pauli yenda kwakaulya Yakobi na api'ndo boti ba kanisa.
21.19: Payomwi kwapanga abali, Pauli aabakie makowe goti limo ata li'ngi' gaagapangite Nnu'ngu' kwa bandu bangali Ayahudi kwo pi'tya lyengo lyake.
21.20: Pabaagayu'wine go, bankwi'yite Nnu'ngu' na bammakie Pauli, “Nnongo! Lola, kubile na maelupu ga Ayahudi babayi'ki'tya panga aumini, na boti baikamwa salya ya Musa.
21.21: Tubakiyilwe panga, wayi'gana Ayahudi babatama pamope na bandu bangali Ayahudi baisalawe salya ya Musa, kanebaaine bana babe liku'mbi', na baileke yali yabe ya Kiyahudi.
21.22: Tumbwelelo, bakosali yu'wa panga wisile ku Yelusalemu, bai, tupange buli?
21.23: Bai, upange li'lu' lyatukubakia. Tubile na bandu nsese pano, bembe babi'i nyalili kwa Nnu'ngu'.
21.24: Wiyingiye kwa bandu baa, uli'pe mbanje yoti kwa kwiipeletea pamope nabembe, na basekulwe nywili yabe. Kwa ndi'la yi', boti balu'a tanga panga makowe gabaagayu'wine gai gammali'la, nawenga uyendelya kwikamwa salya ya Musa wisowiso.
21.25: Bu'kana na balu' bandu bangali Ayahudi babaabile aumini, twaapeleki balua yatwabakiye panga kanebalye ilyo ya paibi'ki'lyo ya kinnu'ngu' ba ubu'su', kanebanywe myai, kanebalye inyama yaipopotolilwe, na kanebatome ilu'mbu'.”
21.26: Bai, pammalau' yake Pauli aatweti balu' bandu no panga nabo ibala ya kwiipeletea. Bu'kapo, ngayingya mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', kaabakia makowe ga kuuyomolyo wa lisu'ba lya kwiipeletea na salaka yayaalu'a piyilwa kwa kila mundu. Pauli aboyolwa mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'
21.27: Galu' masu'ba saba pagaegeli yomokya, bi'ngi' ba Ayahudi bu'ka Asia babaamweni Pauli mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', ngabakisopa kipi'nga soti sa bandu na ngabammoywa.
21.28: Baapangite ndu'ti kababaya, “Mwaisilaili mwaitu, mutuyangatiye! Ayu' nga yu'lu' mundu ywannyi'gana kila mundu na kila pandu taukana na bandu bitu, salya yitu, ata Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'. Kai', aaletike Agiliki mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' na kupasapuya pandu pano papeleteu.”
21.29: Baalongei nyo kwa mwanjaa patumbu baamweni Tilofimo, mwenekaya wa ku Efeso, alongwaniye na Pauli kabatyanga pamope, bakitage kwaali' Pauli aannyingiye mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'.
21.30: Kilambo soti saatwi'li puyo, bandu baaisi bu'ka kila pandu, baammoywi Pauli na kunkwakwatya panja ya Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu'. Popopo milyango yabe ngaiyigalilwa.
21.31: Baabini kummulaga, lakini abali yaamwiki kolongosi ywa yesi lya Kiroma panga ku Yelusalemu kwoti kwaai na puyo.
21.32: Popopo, mpi'ndo ywa Yesi aatweti asikali na alongosi ba yesi. Nabembe pabaamweni mpi'ndo ywa yesi na asikali, ngabasomwa kunku'mbwa Pauli.
21.33: Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi aamwegeleli Pauli na kummoywa, aamulise atabilwe kwa pingwi ibi'li'. Ngalaluya, “Ayu' nyai? Kai', apangite namani?”
21.34: Bandu bi'ngi' palu' pa kipi'nga sa bandu bapangage ndu'ti, aba kabalongela li', balu' kabalongela li'lu'. Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi waibweni panga akombwali tanga kitumbu sa yi'lu' ndu'ti, aamulise Pauli apelekelwe kunyumba ya banayesi.
21.35: Pauli paikite pa ngasi, asikali baampu'twi nnani nnani kwo yogopa puyo ya si'lu' kipi'nga sa bandu,
21.36: kwa mwanjaa sendekummi'ngi'ya ku'no kakipanga ndu'ti kababaya, “Mummulagi kwo!” Pauli aikengya kwa Ayahudi
21.37: Pabaannyingiyage munyumba ya banayesi, Pauli aannu'bite mpi'ndo ywa yesi kammakia, “Wendanji'ki'ti'ya kukubakia kikowe?” Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi ngannyangwa, “Kumbe umanyi longela Kigiliki!
21.38: Kwa nyo wenga wa yu'lu' mundu ywa Misili lili, ywaapangite puyo masu'ba gagapite kaalongoya makatauluma 4,000 mpaka kulubele?”
21.39: Pauli ngayangwa, “Nenga nga Nannyahudi, nibelekuli Taliso akwo Kilikia, namwenekaya ywa kilambo sakitanganikwe na boti. Sonde li'li'li', uniyi'ki'ti'ye nilongele na bandu ba.”
21.40: Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi ngaannyi'ki'ti'a. Kwa nyo Pauli aayi'mi mungasi, aapu'ngi luboko balu' bandu, pabaatami liki, aatumbwi longela nabo kwa Kiebrania.

22.1: Aatibaya, “Mwenga mwalongo bangu' na akina tati' bangu', munipi'kani mwaniikengya nnu'ngi' yinu.”
22.2: Pabayu'wine kalongela nabo kwa Kiebrania, baayongiye tama liki kulikoni patumbwi longela. Nembe Pauli aayendeli longela,
22.3: “Nenga Nannyahudi, nibelekuli Taliso ku'lu' Kilikia. Lakini naaku'li paapano pano pa kilambo sa Yelusalemu kwa mayi'gano ga mwalimu wangu' Gamalieli. Naayi'ganilwe wisowiso mwaiyenda salya ya api'ndo bitu, kaniyi'ma kwa mwoyo woti kwa Nnu'ngu' kati mwenga mwabene mwamubile nambi'yambi'.
22.4: Naatesike bandu ba ndi'la yi'no ata kwapanga babulagilwe kanaaboywa annalu'me kwa alwawa na kwataikulya kuutabilwe.
22.5: Mpi'ndo wa dini na balasa lyoti liku'lu' lya api'ndo, bendakombwa kong'ondelya likowe lyo. Bu'ka kwabe, naapeyilwe balua yabaandikilwe balu' Ayahudi babaabile ku'lu' ku Damasiko. Naayi'i Damasiko li'nga nikaaboywe bandu ba ndi'la yo, na kwaleta Yelusalemu babile atabilwe li'nga bakapwatilwe. Pauli alongelya abali yo kosopolelwa kwake (Mako 9:1-19, 26:12-18)
22.6: “Panaabile mundi'la kanili'nga Damasiko, musaa sita ya muntwekati, niimukya bweya nku'lu' bu'ka kunani kaunimulika mundu mwoti.
22.7: Apo nganitu'la pai', nganiyu'wa lilobe kalinibakia, ‘Sauli, Sauli! Mboni wendakunitesa?’
22.8: Nganilaluya, ‘Wa bwana, wenga wanyai?’ Nembe nganibakia, ‘Nenga ngana Yesu ywaunitesa.’
22.9: Bai, balu' bandu babaabile pamope nanenga, baaubweni wu'lu' bweya, lakini baaliyu'wineli li'lu' lilobe lya yu'lu' ywalongelage nanenga.
22.10: Bai, nenga naatilaluya, ‘Bwana, nipange buli?’ Nembe Bwana aatinibakia, ‘Ukatuke, uyende ku Damasiko, akwo ukabakiyilwa makowe goti gopalilwa kugapanga.’
22.11: Bu'kana na wu'lu' bweya nkali', nakombwili banjwa, kwa nyo yapalikwe balu' ayangu' banitandaye mpaka paniikite ku Damasiko.
22.12: “Akwo, kwaabile na mundu yumo ywabi'ngi'yage salya ya Musa munomuno na kunkilikitya Nnu'ngu'. Ywembe aatiisimilwa muno na Ayahudi babatamage Damasiko, lina lyake Anania.
22.13: Ywembe aaisi kunilola, ngayi'ma papipi yangu' ngabaya, ‘Wa nnongo wa Sauli! Ubanjwe kai'.’ Popopo, nganibanjwa kai' na kummona.
22.14: Ngabaya, ‘Nnu'ngu' wa au'ku' bitu akusawi upate tanga mwapala Nnu'ngu', kummona Mwene Aki, na kumpi'kania mwene kalongela.
22.15: Kwa mwanjaa ukankong'ondelya wamwene kwa bandu boti, kawabakia galu' gaugabweni na kugayu'wa.
22.16: Bai, nambi'yambi' mboni wendasi'li'ya? Uyi'me, ukabatisilwe, ukagu'lu'li'lwe masambi gako, kaulu'ba kwa lina lyake Bwana.’ Kemelwa kwa Pauli kwaalya bandu bangali Ayahudi
22.17: “Panibuyangani ku Yelusalemu, kanisalya mu Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu' naagabweni makowe gayambi'.
22.18: Naamweni Bwana kanibakia, ‘Uyu'mbi'ti'ke bu'ka ku Yelusalemu, kwa mwanjaa bandu ba pano baayi'ki'tyali gawalu'a kwabakia bu'kana na nenga.’
22.19: “Nani nganibaya, ‘Bwana, ata bembe batangite panga nenga nganiyendage ku mayumba goti ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu' li'nga kwayi'ya muutabilwe na kwaku'mbwa balu' babakuu'bi'lya.
22.20: Palu' payaayitanike myai ya nkong'ondeli wako Sitefano, nenga namwene naayi'mi pambwega, kaniyi'ki'tyana na sakipaangilwage, ku'no kanaali'ndi'lya magu'bo gabe abulagi.’
22.21: Bwana ngaanibakia, ‘Uyende, kwa mwanjaa nilu'a kutuma kuutalu kwa bandu bangali Ayahudi.’ ”
22.22: Si'lu' kipi'nga sa bandu saatikumpi'kania mpaka palu' paabaike likowe lyo, ngapabau'bu'ya malobe gabe kababaya, “Mummulage, mundu wa kubi nya apwaikali kunneka mwu'mi!”
22.23: Baayendeli panga ndu'ti ku'no kabakung'unda makoti gabe no timwana lyu'ku'mbi' kwa nyongo muno.
22.24: Kolongosi ywa yesi aamulise bandu bake bampeleke Pauli nkati ya nyumba ya banayesi, aalagi panga bammese mikwasu mpaka aabakie kitumbu sa Ayahudi kumpangya ndu'ti.
22.25: Lakini pabaayomwi kuntaba li'nga batumbwe kummesa kwa mikwasu, Pauli aannalwiye asikali yumo ywaayi'mi po, “Buli, yendayi'ki'ti'lwa kwinu kummesa mikwasu mwenekaya ywa Roma wangali senulwa?”
22.26: Yu'lu' asikali paayu'wine go, ampeleki abali mpi'ndo ywa yesi kabaya, “Upala panga namani? Mundu yu' ngite mwenekaya wa Roma!”
22.27: Bai, mpi'ndo ywa yesi aannyendeli Pauli kunnaluya, “Umbakie, wenga wa mwenekaya wa ku Roma?” Pauli ngayangwa, “Ngamwembe.”
22.28: Mpi'ndo ywa yesi aatibaya, “Nanenga nyinyonyo, nipatike wenekaya wa Roma kwo pi'ma kwa mbanje yansima.” Pauli ngabaya, “Lakini nenga namwenekaya ywa Roma bu'ka belekwa.”
22.29: Balu' bandu babapalage kumpekeseni Pauli baatikunneka no bu'ka. Ata yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi pakwipwi panga antabike Pauli, mwenekaya ywa Roma, aatiyogopa muno. Pauli pa Balasa Liku'lu' lya Ayahudi
22.30: Pammalau' yake, kwa mwanjaa yu'lu' kolongosi ywa yesi apalage tanga kitumbu sa Pauli laumilwa na Ayahudi, aatikunnyu'gu'lya na kwalagya api'ndo ba dini na Balasa lyoti liku'lu' bakwembane. Bu'kapo, annyi'mike Pauli nnu'ngi' yabe.

23.1: Pauli aabu'nju'li minyo balu' bandu ba Balasa Liku'lu' aatibaya, “Mwalongo bangu', nenga kwo binia pamwoyo wangu', ntu'pu' so senulwa nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu' mpaka pano panibile.”
23.2: Mpi'ndo ywa dini Anania aamulise balu' babaayi'mi papipi na Pauli banku'mbwe mbande pankano.
23.3: Bai, Pauli ngammakia, “Nnu'ngu' alu'a kuku'mbwa, wenga wawipanga wannogau, kumbe wannau. Wenga utami po kunisenwa nenga bu'kana na salya, nawenga witi'kwana salya kwa kuniku'mbwa nenga!”
23.4: Bandu babaayi'mi palu' ngabammakia Pauli, “Wenga ulowa kumpwi'wa mpi'ndo nku'lu' ywa dini ywa Nnu'ngu'!”
23.5: Pauli ngayangwa, “Mwalongo bangu', naatangiteli panga ywembe nga mpi'ndo ywa dini. Kwa mwanjaa iandikilwe, ‘Kaneunnongeli maakau kolongosi ywa bandu bako.’ ”
23.6: Pauli paakwipwi panga bi'ngi' baai Masadukayo na bi'ngi' Mafalisayo, aau'bwiye lilobe pa Balasa Liku'lu', “Mwalongo bangu', nenga na Mfalisayo, mwana wa Mafalisayo. Pano nenga nisitakilwa mwanjaa nipi'kanilya yu'ka kwa bandu babawile.”
23.7: Payomwi longela go, ngabatumbwa gongwana Mafalisayo na Masadukayo, na Balasa Liku'lu' lyabaganike ipi'nga ibi'li'.
23.8: Kitumbu sene sai si'no, Masadukayo bau'bi'lya panga ntu'pu' yu'ka kwa ywawile, kai' ntu'pu' malaika, au loo, lakini Mafalisayo bagau'bi'lya ago goti.
23.9: Ndu'ti yatiyongeya, na bi'ngi' ba balimu ba salya bu'ka mukipi'nga sa Mafalisayo baayi'mi wi'ma no taukana kwa makakala, “Tukibonali kikowe sosoti sakibile kyakau kwa mundu yu', kwaali' loo au malaika aatilongela nakwe.”
23.10: Bulwe waai nku'lu', mpi'ndo ywa yesi aayogwipe panga balu'e kunnumia muno Pauli, ngaamulisa ipi'nga ya banayesi iuluke na kummu'ya Pauli pakatikati yabe kwa makakala na kunneta nkati ya nyumba ya banayesi.
23.11: Kilo si'lu', Bwana aayi'mi papipi nakwe aatikummakia, “Ube na mwoyo nku'lu', kwa mwanjaa kati mwaunikong'ondeli ku Yelusalemu, ipalikwa ukanikong'ondeli nyaanyalu'nyalu' akwo ku Roma.” Ayahudi baamwa kummulaga Pauli
23.12: Pakusile, Ayahudi baatami kitamo pamope na baabi'i nyalili panga, “Tulyali wala tunywali mpaka tummulage Pauli.”
23.13: Na babaabi'i nyalili yo, baai bandu alubaini no pi'ti'li'ki'ya.
23.14: Baayendeli api'ndo ba dini na alongosi no baya, “Twiitabite pamope kwa nyalili panga tulyaali mpaka tummulage Pauli.
23.15: Bai, mwenga pamope na api'ndo ba Balasa Liku'lu', mummakie kolongosi ywa yesi annete Pauli akwo kwamubile, ipange kati mupala tanga kinkati makowe gake na twenga twibi'i wiso kummulaga abile balo mundi'la.”
23.16: Lakini mwipwawe Pauli paliyu'wine likowe lyo lya kumpelemba, aayi'i ku'lu' kunyumba ya banayesi na kummakia Pauli likowe lyo.
23.17: Apo Pauli ngankema asikali yumo na kummakia, “Untole mwinsembe yu' umpeleke kwa mpi'ndo ywa yesi abile na kikowe sa kummakia.”
23.18: Kwa nyo, yu'lu' asikali aampelike yu'lu' mwinsembe kwa mpi'ndo ywa yesi, ngammakia, “Pauli yu'lu' ntabilwe aatinikema na kunilu'ba ninnete ayu' mwinsembe kwaubile, kwa mwanjaa abile na likowe lya kukubakia.”
23.19: Mpi'ndo ywa yesi aankamwi luboko aywo mwinsembe na kumpeleka kuu'lu', ngannaluya, “Upala kunibakia namani?”
23.20: Yu'lu' mwinsembe ngabaya, “Ayahudi basikisine bakulu'be umpeleke Pauli ku Balasa Liku'lu' kabaku'pi'ki'ya, panga Balasa Liku'lu' lipala lipate abali ya nkati bu'kana na mundu ywo.
23.21: Lakini wenga kaneuyi'ki'ti kwa mwanjaa kubile na bandu babapi'ti'li'kiye alubaini, babile wi'ma li'nga kuntangya. Babi'i nyalili kotoka lya wala nywa kili'be sosoti mpaka bammulage Pauli. Tumbwelelo bai wi'ma, bakupi'kania mwaulu'a baya.”
23.22: Yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi annei mwinsembe aibu'ki kankwi'li'ka panga, “kaneummakie mundu ywoywoti makowe gano gaunibakiye.” Pauli apelekelwa kwa mpi'ndo ywa nkoa
23.23: Bai, yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi aakemite alongosi abi'li' ba yesi lyake na kwabakia, “Mubi'ke wiso banayesi 200, banayesi babau'bu'ka farasi 70, na banayesi babatumya mikwaa 200 bayende Kaisalia. Mutame wiso kwo bu'ka li'no saa itatu ya kilo.
23.24: Mubi'ke wiso farasi ba kumpu'twa Pauli li'nga akaike salama kwa ntawala Felisi.”
23.25: Aywo mpi'ndo ywa yesi aamwandiki balua Felisi inyanya.
23.26: “Nenga na Klaudio Lisia nikuandikya wenga wa mwisimiwa Felisi, wa mpi'ndo ywa nkoa. Salamu!
23.27: “Mundu yu' aaboyolilwe na Ayahudi li'nga kummulaga. Nenga panibakiyilwe panga ywembe mwenekaya wa Roma, naayi'i na kipi'nga sa banayesi kunkosopolya.
23.28: Nani nipalage tanga kitumbu sa Ayahudi kunsitakya, nganimwikiya ku Balasa lyabe Liku'lu'.
23.29: Nganikwipwa panga bansitaki mwanjaa ntau waubu'kana na salya yabe, lakini aapangiteli likosa lyolyoti lyo senulwa waa, wala tabilwa.
23.30: Panibakiyilwe panga Ayahudi baapangite ulau wo pala kummulaga, nganibinia kunneta kasako kiyu'ngu'ya, naalagi babapala kunsitakya sabasitaki kasako.”
23.31: Bai, balu' banayesi, kati mwabaabakiyilwe, bampu'twi Pauli kilo na kumpeleka Antipatili.
23.32: Pammalau' yake, balu' banayesi babayendage kwa magu'lu' ngababuyangania Yelusalemu kulua lwabe, kwaleka babayenda na farasi bayendeli pamope na Pauli.
23.33: Pabaaikite Kaisalia, bampei mpi'ndo ywa nkoa yi'lu' balua, na kummi'ka Pauli mmoko gake.
23.34: Felisi paisomike balua yo, ngaalaluya panga mundu yu' abu'i kunkoa gani. Paabakiyilwe panga abu'ka ku Kilikia,
23.35: ngabaya, “Naupi'kania mwalo wako pabaaisa babakusitakile.” Bu'kapo, ngaamulisa Pauli ali'ndi'li'lwe munyumba ya nkulungwa Helode.

24.1: Pagapite masu'ba matano, mpi'ndo ywa dini Anania aalongwaniye na alongosi nsi'si' na Telitulo nkengeli wa salya mpaka Kaisalia. Bannyendeli Felisi, Kolongosi ywa nkoa, li'nga bansitaki Pauli.
24.2: Pabankemite Pauli, Telitulo aatumbwi kunsitakya kabaya. “Mundumuko Felisi, kwo pi'tya wenga tupatike likenge liku'lu', no bu'kana na mwautulongoya, nni'ma gu'no ugalambwike kwa manogau gambone.
24.3: Kwa goti, twendasukulu na kugapokya kila pandu na kila lisu'ba.
24.4: Lakini kanenisi'li'ye muno, nikulu'ba upi'kani kwa kiya sako, makowe maipi gatupala longela.
24.5: Tukwipwi panga mundu yu' ywakunng'andyali. Ngaywatumbwi kwayu'maniya Ayahudi boti padunia, kai' ywembe nga mpi'ndo ywa kipi'nga sa Anasaleti.
24.6: Kai' aapayite kualabiya upeleteu wa Nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', lakini twatikummoywa.
24.8: Na wamwene wendakombwa kumpekeseni wiso mundu ywo makowe gatunsitakilya.”
24.9: Ayahudi nabembe ngabayi'ki'tyana na makowe go gakunsitakya Pauli kababaya panga goti ga kakape. Pauli aikengya kwa Felisi
24.10: Na ntawala ampu'ngi luboko Pauli kati mwanju wa kunnyi'ki'ti'a alongele, nembe ngabaya, “Nenga ntu'pu' kyukala sosoti sa kwikengya nnu'ngi' yako, kwa mwanjaa nitangite panga wenga wa nsenuli ywa nni'ma gu'no bu'ka kwai'mbu'.
24.11: Wenga wamwene wendakombwa kwipwa panga ganapi'tali masu'ba ku'mi na gabi'li' bu'ka panaayi'i ku Yelusalemu kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu'.
24.12: Bandu ba banikolili nkati ya nyumba ya Nnu'ngu', wala mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', wala pandu popoti pamisengo kanitaukana na mundu au kanaabakia bandu bapange puyo.
24.13: Wala, bakombwali kong'ondelya makowe gabanisitakilya nambi'yambi'.
24.14: Ila niyi'ki'tya likowe limo kasako, panga nintumikia Nnu'ngu' ywa au'ku' bitu no bi'ngi'ya ndi'la yi'lu' yabaibaya yo ubu'su'. Nenga niu'bi'lya kila kikowe sakiyi'ki'tyana na gagaandikilwe mu salya ya Musa na muitabu ya alondoli ba Nnu'ngu'.
24.15: Nenga niu'bi'lya kwa Nnu'ngu' kati mwabau'bi'lya bembe panga bandu boti, anogau na alau, baayu'ka.
24.16: Kwa nyo, nendakwikasa masu'ba goti tama maisa manogau wangali senulwa na mwoyo wangu', kwa Nnu'ngu' na kwa bandu.
24.17: “Bu'ka po tama myaka yambone kuutalu na nni'ma wangu', naaisi kwaletya alongo bangu' ba Kiyahudi babaabile akiba, kili'be sa kwayangatiya na salaka kwa Nnu'ngu'.
24.18: Panipangage makowe go, baanikoli munyumba ya Nnu'ngu', niyomwile panga ibala ya kwiipeletea. Naabileli na kipi'nga sa bandu wala puyo.
24.19: Lakini palu', baabile Ayahudi bu'ka kunkoa wa Asia, bembe ngabapalilwage isa kasako, kunisitakya mana baalibweni likosa lyolyoti kwangu' nenga.
24.20: Au, bandu bababile pano babaye bene likosa lyabalibweni kwangu' nenga, pabaniyi'mike pa Balasa lyabe Liku'lu'.
24.21: Ila likowe limo bai lyanilongei kwo tu'ndu'bi'a lilobe panaayi'mi, ‘Nenga li'no nisitakilwa mwanjaa niu'bi'lya panga, bababile kumambi', baayu'ka.’ ”
24.22: Bai Felisi, ywaabile aitangite ndi'la yi'lu' ya Yesu wisowiso, aamulise munaisa kabaya, “Naayomwa makowe ginu paaisa mpi'ndo ywa yesi Lisia.”
24.23: Nga mwamulisa yu'lu' asikali panga baanni'ndi'le Pauli amo muutabilwe, lakini banneke maulu pasene, na kanebaakanikie mambwigalye isa kumpeya saapala. Pauli endatabilwa
24.24: Pagaapite masu'ba, Felisi aaisi na nnyumbowe Dulusila, ywembe aai Nnyahudi. Aapiyite amuli akemelwe Pauli, aampi'kani abali ya imani yaibile kwa Yesu Kilisitu.
24.25: Lakini, Pauli paalongelage abali ya aki, baa na uweso wa kugasinda maminyikiyo ga yi'ga, no bu'kana na ukumu yayaaisa, Felisi aapatike bwoga no baya, “Gautubakiye gali'ngani! Wendakombwa bu'ka. Panaakupala, naakukema.”
24.26: Kai', Felisi aakokoti kunkema Pauli no longela nakwe, aganiage alu'a kumpeya mbanje.
24.27: Na payatimi myaka ibi'li', Polikio Fesito aayingi muutawala pandu pa Felisi, lakini mwanjaa Felisi apalage kwapulaisa Ayahudi, nganneka Pauli muutabilwe.

25.1: Pagapite masu'ba gatatu bu'ka Fesito ika Kunkoa wa Kaisalia, ngau'bu'ka yenda ku Yelusalemu.
25.2: Ku'lu', api'ndo ba dini na alongosi ba Ayahudi ngabansitakya Pauli kwa Fesito.
25.3: Bampembelyage Fesito aapangi manogau kwa kwaletya Pauli ku Yelusalemu, kwa mwanjaa bapalage bannyu'bi'li li'nga bammulage mundi'la.
25.4: Fesito ngayangwa, “Pauli endali'ndi'li'lwa muutabilwe akwo ku Kaisalia, na namwene niyenda kwokwo nambi'yambi'.
25.5: Bai, alongosi binu baeli nanenga bakansitaki mana apangite kikowe kilau mundu yu'.”
25.6: Payomwi tama kwo masu'ba manane au ku'mi, Fesito aabuyangani ku Kaisalia. Pammalau' yake aatami pa kiti'gu' so senwa no amulisa Pauli aletelwe.
25.7: Paaisi Pauli, Ayahudi babaaisi bu'ka ku Yelusalemu, baayi'mi papipi nakwe na kunsitakya kwa makowe matopau, gangali bembe kombwa kugaawanikiya panga kakape.
25.8: Pauli ngaikengya kwo baya, “Nenga nipangiteli ulau wowoti musalya ya Ayahudi, munyumba ya Nnu'ngu', ata kwa Nkulungwa wa Roma, Kaisali.”
25.9: Lakini Fesito kapala kwapulaisa Ayahudi, ngannaluya Pauli, “Buli, upala yenda ku Yelusalemu mwalo wako ukapi'kanilwe nnu'ngi' yangu' kwa kitumbu sa makowe gano?”
25.10: Pauli ngabaya, “Nenga niyi'ma pano pakiti'gu' so senwa sa Kaisali, ngapanipalikwa senulwa. Naapangyali ulau Ayahudi, na wamwene utangite.
25.11: Manaitei nikosite na nipangite ulau wo pwatilwa kiwo, nikanali bulagilwa. Lakini manaitei likowe lyabanisitakilya lya kakape lili, ntu'pu' ywakombwa kunikamukiya kasabe. Nikulu'ba mwalo wangu' nipeleke nnu'ngi' kwa Kaisali!”
25.12: Bai, Fesito payomwi longela mwalo wo na api'ndo bake ba Balasa Liku'lu', ngabannyangwa, “Upalike yenda nnu'ngi' kwa Kaisali. Bai, ulu'a yenda kwa Kaisali!” Fesito ammakia Agilipa abali ya Pauli
25.13: Pagapite masu'ba nsi'si', Nkulungwa Agilipa na Belinike nnu'mbu'we baayi'i Kaisalia kunkemya Fesito.
25.14: Baatami kwo kwa masu'ba maingi, nembe Fesito ngammakia Agilipa mwalo wa Pauli, “Kubile na mundu yumo pano, ywembe Felisi aannei muutabilwe.
25.15: Panaayi'i ku Yelusalemu, api'ndo ba dini na alongosi ba Ayahudi baanibakie makowe gake, kabanilu'ba ninsenwe.
25.16: Lakini nenga naayangwi panga, kwa yali ya Kiroma, mundu apwatilwali mpaka ywasitakilwe akwembane na babaansitakile pamope, no peyelwa lisu'ba lya kwikengya kwa ulau wabansitakilya.
25.17: Bai, pabaaikite pano nasi'yiteli, pammalau' yake naatami pakiti'gu' sangu' so senwa no lagya aywo mundu aletelwe.
25.18: Na babansitakile pabaayi'mi, bapiyiteli ulau kati mwaniganiyage.
25.19: Ila, bendetaukana nakwe kwa makowe ga dini yabe, na kwa abali ya mundu yumo ywakemelwa Yesu. Ywembe aatiwaa, lakini Pauli ali'ndi'ndi'lya ai mwu'mi.
25.20: Kwa mwanjaa naatangiteli mwo pekeseni kakape ya mwalo wu', nannalwiye Pauli panga mana apala yenda ku Yelusalemu akapi'kanilwe kwo makowe ga mwalo gu'.
25.21: Lakini Pauli palu'bike panga mwalo wake ukapi'kanilwe na Nkulungwa wa Roma, nganiamulisa ali'ndi'li'lwe musumba sa atabilwe mpaka panampeleka.”
25.22: Bai, Agilipa ngammakia Fesito, “Nani napendike nikampi'kania mundu yu' namwene.” Fesito ngayangwa, “Walu'a kumpi'kania malau'.” Pauli nnu'ngi' ya Agilipa na Belinike
25.23: Bai, pammalau' yake Agilipa na Belinike baaisi kwo isimika muno pabayingyae muliku'ta lya mikutano, babile na alongosi ba yesi na api'ndo ba kilambo. Fesito ngaamulisa bannete Pauli.
25.24: Fesito ngabaya, “Nkulungwa Agilipa, na mwaboti mwamubile pano pamope na twenga! Ayu' mundu ywamummona, Ayahudi boti bansitaki kwangu' ku'lu' ku Yelusalemu na pano nyinyonyo, kabaku'ku'li'ka no panga ndu'ti panga ipalikwa abulagilwe.
25.25: Nenga naibweni panga apangiteli ulau wowoti wo pwatilwa kiwo. Lakini mwanjaa mwene aalu'bike mwalo wake ukapi'kanilwe na Nkulungwa wa Roma, nilu'a kumpelekya.
25.26: Nenga ntu'pu' likowe lya ngama lya kumwandikya Nkulungwa wa Roma kwa makowe gake, ngaapo ninnetike nnu'ngi' yinu, munomuno kwako wa nkulungwa Agilipa, pi'ngi' niwesa pata so andika bu'kana no pekeseni kwako.
25.27: Kwa mwanjaa naapanga makosa kwa kumpeleka ntabilwe wangali awanikiya wisowiso sabansitakilile.”

26.1: Agilipa ngammakia Pauli, “Lelo, wendakombwa longela makowe gako.” Bai, Pauli ngaapu'ngya luboko no tumbwa longela.
26.2: “Nkulungwa Agilipa, inogelile muno nenga li'no yi'ma nnu'ngi' yako, kwikengya bu'kana na makowe goti Ayahudi gabanisitakile.
26.3: Nipulaika muno kwa mwanjaa wenga utangite mimu yoti ya Ayahudi na makowe gagaapanga bataukane, kwa nyo nikulu'ba ukomeye kwa kunipi'kania.
26.4: “Ayahudi boti batangite mwanaatami kunni'ma wangu' bu'ka unng'elo wangu' na ata ku Yelusalemu.
26.5: Baanitangite bu'ka kwai'mbu', na mana bapendile bakombwa kong'ondelya, panga naai na Mfalisayo kwa mu'lu' mwanibi'ngi'yage salya ngali' ya dini yitu.
26.6: Na nambi'yambi', niyi'ma pano senulwa kwa mwanjaa niliu'bi'lya li'lu' lilagano Nnu'ngu' lyaapei au'ku' bitu.
26.7: Makabila gitu ku'mi na gabi'li' gantumikia Nnu'ngu' kilo na muntwekati kwa mwanjaa gau'bi'lya kugabona kagatimya galu' gagalagilwe. Na kwa kitumbu so u'bi'lya ku'lu', wa Nkulungwa, Ayahudi ngabanisitakya!
26.8: Mwanjaa namani mwenga mukana u'bi'lya panga Nnu'ngu' alu'a kwayu'ya babawile?
26.9: Kakape nenga namwene, naau'bi'lile panga nipalikwa kugapanga goti ganikombwa kwa kulilangamisa lina lya Yesu ywa ku Nasaleti.
26.10: Nani naagapangite go ku Yelusalemu. Panaapeyilwe amuli na api'ndo ba dini, naayingiye aumini bake baingi muutabilwe. Pabaasenulwe kiwo, nenga nayi'ki'tile babulagilwe.
26.11: Mala yambone naatikwaku'su'mbwa mumayumba ga kunnu'ba Nnu'ngu', na kwali'ndi'ndi'lya baikane imani yabe. Naatikwausikya kati niminya lilalu', na kwabi'ngi'ya kumili'ma ya kuutalu li'nga kwaku'su'mbwa. Pauli ayaulya mwakosopolilwe (Mako 9:1-19, 22:6-16)
26.12: “Bai, panaabile mulyengo lyo kaniyenda ku Damasiko kwa makakala ga api'ndo ba dini,
26.13: panaabile mundi'la muntwekati, wa Nkulungwa, niubona bweya nku'lu' kulikoni bweya wa lisu'ba kaubu'ka kunani. Bweya wu'lu' waatuti'li'tike twaboti twatwaabile mumwanja wu'lu'.
26.14: Twatu'i pai' twaboti, nganiyu'wa lilobe kalilongela nanenga kwa Kiyahudi, ‘Sauli, Sauli, mboni wendakunitesa? Wendakwilumia bai, kati ng'ombe ywayu'mana na pimbo ya bwana wake.’
26.15: Nenga nganilaluya, ‘Wenga wanyai Bwana?’ Nembe Bwana ngayangwa, ‘Nenga ngana Yesu ywaunitesa.
26.16: Lakini ukatuke na uyi'me wi'ma lelo. Nikuisili li'nga upange wa ntumisi wangu'. Wenga walu'a panga wa nkong'ondeli wangu', wabakie bandu makowe gaugabweni li'no, na galu' ganaakulaya.
26.17: Nalu'a kukosopolya bu'ka mumaboko ga bandu bako Isilaili na ga bandu bangali Ayahudi, banaakutuma.
26.18: Li'nga waabanjuye minyo gabe, kawaayi'gana babu'ke mulubi'ndu' na kwayingiya mubweya. Baabu'ke bu'ka pai' ya makakala ga Ibilisi na kunng'alambukya Nnu'ngu'. Kwa ndi'la yo u'bi'lya bapate samilwa masambi gabe no peyelwa ulisi pamope na bandu bake apeleteu.’ Pauli alongelya utumisi wake
26.19: “Kwa kitumbu so, wa Nkulungwa Agilipa, nenga nipanga kati mwanilagilwe palu' panilaayilwe galu' gaganiisili bu'ka kunani.
26.20: Lakini naatumbwi wi'ti' kwaalya benekaya ba Damasiko, nganiyenda ku Yelusalemu na Yudea, kai' na bandu bangali Ayahudi. Naalyage panga bagalambuke bu'ka mumasambi gabe li'nga bammuyangani Nnu'ngu', na babonekane kwa gabapanga panga bagalambwike.
26.21: Kwa kitumbu sa makowe go Ayahudi baaniboywi nibile munyumba ya Nnu'ngu' li'nga banibulage.
26.22: Bai, kwa mwanjaa nipatike uli'ndi'li bu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu', ata li'no nibile nnu'ngi' yinu kaninkong'ondelya mwalongosi na mwabandu bi'ngi' mwamunipi'kania li'no. Kai' nilongelali mayi'gi'yo gi'ngi' gayambi', ila galu' ga alondoli ba Nnu'ngu' na Musa gabaabaite panga gaapitya.
26.23: Yani, Kilisitu aapalikwe pata ngu'su'mbu' no panga nnongoi kwo yu'ka kwa boti babawile, naywembe alu'a ala, panga kwa ndi'la yake, bweya ulu'a mulika kwa Ayahudi na bangali Ayahudi.”
26.24: Pauli paabile kaikengya nyo, Fesito ngammakia kwa lilobe liku'lu', “Wenga wa Pauli ubile na lilalu'! Akwo soma kwako muno ngakualabiye malango gako!”
26.25: Pauli ngannyangwa, “Mundumuko Fesito, nenga niminyali lilalu'. Makowe ganikubakia ga kakape na gampu'ku'bi'la.
26.26: Nkulungwa Agilipa aagatangite wiso makowe galu' gagapitike. Nanenga nendakombwa longela kaaniyu'wa wangali yogopa. Ndangite kakape panga makowe aga goti gatanganikwe kwake kwa mwanjaa gaaiyanikweli.
26.27: Wa Nkulungwa Agilipa, wendau'bi'lya mayi'gi'yo gabaalongei alondoli ba Nnu'ngu'? Ndangite panga wendau'bi'lya!”
26.28: Nembe Agilipa ngannyangwa Pauli, “Uwasa panga kwa mayi'gi'yo gako ga nambi'yambi' bai, wendakombwa kunigalambwa nenga panga na Nkilisitu?”
26.29: Pauli ngannyangwa, “Manaitei kwa mayi'gi'yo masene au gambone, ninnu'ba Nnu'ngu', kwenda kwa wenga kisako bai lili, ila ata kwa aba boti babanipi'kania li'no babe kati nenga, lakini kanebaike po yingiyilwa muutabilwe!”
26.30: Palongei go, Nkulungwa Agilipa, Mpi'ndo ywa Nkoa Fesito, Belinike na boti babaatami pamope nabo baayi'mi wi'ma.
26.31: Na pabaabile kababu'ka, ngababakiana, “Mundu yu' apangiteli ulau wo pwatilwa kiwo, wala tabilwa.”
26.32: Agilipa ngammakia Fesito, “Mundu yu' kwa kitumbu sa kuupeleka mwalo wake nnu'ngi' ukapi'kanilwe na Nkulungwa ywa Roma, ayu'gu'li'lwa lili.”

27.1: Bai, paiamulilwe yabwa mwanja wo yenda ku Italia, bammi'i Pauli na atabilwe bi'ngi' muuli'ndi'li wa Yulio ywaabile kolongosi ywa yesi mukipi'nga sakikemelwage “Kipi'nga sa Nkulungwa ywa Roma.”
27.2: Twau'bwike mumeli ya Adilamito yayaabile kaiyabwa pi'tya kumisengo ya kumbwani ya Asia. Twatumbwi mwanja witu tubile pamope na Alisitaliko, mwenekaya wa Makedonia bu'ka Tesalonike.
27.3: Pammalau' yake ngatuyi'ma Sidoni. Yulio aampangi kinannoga Pauli, kwa kunnyi'ki'ti'a akabonagane na mambwiga li'nga bapate kumpeya ili'be yaipalage.
27.4: Bu'kapo, ngatuyingya kai' mubaali yendelya na mwanja witu. Ngatupi'ta lwingo lwa kisiwa sa Kuplo li'nga kuusega nsunga kwa mwanjaa upukatyage yenda kwatuuma.
27.5: Patulokite baali kwiyi' ya kunkoa wa Kilikia na Pampilia, ngatuika kukilambo sa Mila, kunkoa wa Likia.
27.6: Ku'lu', yu'lu' mpi'ndo ywa yesi ngaikolya meli kaibu'ka Alesandulia kaiyenda Italia, nembe ngatuu'bu'ya nkati yake.
27.7: Twayendeli na mwanja mbolembole kwa masu'ba maingi. Mwanja waai wo kokona muno, ngatuika papipi na kilambo sa Nido. Na kwa mwanjaa nsunga utukanikiyage pi'ta mu'lu' mwatwabinile, ngatupi'ta lwingo lwa Kilete papipi na kumbwani ya Salumone, kwembe nsunga waai kwaani.
27.8: Twaapite katusega mbwega mbwega kwa tabu muno, ngatuika pandu papakemelwa Kiloko Kigolou, papipi na kilambo sa Lasea.
27.9: Twaatami palu' kwa masu'ba maingi. Lisu'ba lyo punga kwa Ayahudi paliyomwike pi'ta, na nsimu wa myanja ya mubaali pangali ntatala waapite. Pauli aatikwaking'inda kabaya,
27.10: “Mwanalu'me, nibona panga mwanja witu ulu'a baa na ntatala na asala yambone, kai' kwenda kwa igombo na meli baili, ata kwa bwu'mi witu.”
27.11: Lakini yu'lu' kolongosi ywa yesi aagau'bi'li muno mayi'gi'yo ga ywailongoya meli na ga mwene meli kuliko gaalongei Pauli.
27.12: Na mwanjaa kiloko si'lu' saapwaikeli tama nsimu wa kipepwe, baingi baapiyite usauli wo paya baike Fonisi, pakiloko salama sa Kilete, kwo tama nsimu wa kipepwe. Kimbu'nga kiku'lu' mubaali
27.13: Nsunga nsene pawaatumbwi pukatya bu'ka lwingo lwa kusi, bawasage panga bendakombwa timisa kati mu'lu' mwabaabinile. Ngabau'bu'ya kiyi'mi'kyo no yendelya mbwega mbwega papipi muno na Kilete.
27.14: Popopo ngawisa nsunga nkali' bu'ka kisiwa sa Kilete, bandu baukemite nsunga wa “Eurakilo”.
27.15: Meli ngaiku'mbu'lwa na nsunga nkali', na yakombwili yu'mana naso. Ngatulola minyo bai ikwakwatilwe na nsunga.
27.16: Patwaabile katupi'ta lwingo lwa kisiwa sa Kauda, twapatike kwani pasene, kwa mwanjaa saatuibiliye na nsunga. Kwa nyo ngatukombwa kwitabya ngalaba ya mumeli, lakini kwa tabu.
27.17: Apangakasi ba meli pabayomwi kwiyingiya ngalaba yi'lu' nkati ya meli, ngabakwi'ya no nyweletea lukamba kwitaba meli. Na mwanjaa bayogopage baakane kola mukyangi kwiyi' ya Libia, ngabauluya tanga na kwileka meli ikwakwatilwe na nsunga.
27.18: Pammalau' yake, bu'kana na mwatunokolelwa kwa makakala ga nsunga, ngabatumbwa taikulya igombo mubaali.
27.19: Na lisu'ba lyenetatu, kwa moko gabe bene, ngabataikulya ata yombo ya meli mubaali.
27.20: Kwa masu'ba maingi lyaabonekineli lisu'ba ata ndondwa, na nsunga nku'lu' kauyendelya pukatya, twati'kwanike mwoyo ata u'bi'lya kwitu kwo kosopolelwa kwatioba.
27.21: Bandu pabaatami masu'ba maingi wangalya kili'be, Pauli ngayi'ma pakati yabe no longela, “Mwanalu'me, mukanipi'kania mwanammakie no munaisa bu'ka patwaabile ku Kilete, mulu'e kwiyingyali asala yo obeya ili'be kati yi'.
27.22: Lakini lelo nendakunnu'ba mukangamaye myoyo, kwa mwanjaa ntu'pu' ata mundu yumo pamubile ywaalu'a waa, meli bai ngailu'a sengwanika.
27.23: Kwa mwanjaa kilo sa li'no, malaika wa Nnu'ngu' yu'lu' nenga naywake, naywembe nganinkilikitya, aatikuniisilya.
27.24: Aatinibakia, ‘Pauli, kaneuyogope! Upalikwa uyi'me nnu'ngi' ya Nkulungwa. Na kwo pi'tya ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu' kwako, boti baulongwaniye nabo kanebalanganyike.’
27.25: Bai, muku'le mwoyo, kwa mwanjaa nimwu'bi'lya Nnu'ngu' panga ilu'a pangika kati mwanibakiyilwe.
27.26: Lakini meli yitu ipalikwa ikole wi'ti' pakisiwa.” Boti baika kuuyu'mu' babile salama
27.27: Ata pakiikite kilo sa lisu'ba lya ku'mi na nsese, twanokolilwe na nsunga ku'no na kwo mubaali ya Adilia. Paiikite meku, apangakasi ba meli baawasite panga baaegeli kuuyu'mu'.
27.28: Baali'ngite yendekeya kwa masi', ngabaibona mbi'ma alubaini. Pabaayendeli nnu'ngi' pasene, ngabaibona mbi'ma salasini.
27.29: Kwo yogopa meli yaakane kola mumaliwe, ngabauluya iyi'mi'kyo nsese ya nsu'gu' ya meli, kabalu'bya kusee.
27.30: Apangakasi ba meli bapalage tila na kwileka meli, ngabauluya ngalaba mubaali, kabaku'pi'ki'ya panga bapala uluya kiyi'mi'kyo sa nnu'ngi'.
27.31: Lakini Pauli ngammakia kolongosi ywa yesi na asikali bake, “Bandu ba mana basomwi igala nkati ya meli, mwaalamali.”
27.32: Bai, asikali ngabaikutwana kamba yabatabili yi'lu' ngalaba na kwileka itumbuki mubaali.
27.33: Na papaabile kakusaa, Pauli aalu'bite bandu boti balye kilyo kabaya, “Mpaka li'no likite lisu'ba lya ku'mi na nsese mutami na kyukala na mulileli kili'be sosoti.
27.34: Bai, ninnu'banga mulye sakulya mupate yendelya lama. Mwanjaa nimmakianga, ntu'pu' ywaalu'a obeya ata lunywili lwa muntwe wake.”
27.35: Payomwi longela go, Pauli aatweti likati na kunsukulu Nnu'ngu' nnu'ngi' ya boti, aatimetwa no tumbwa lya.
27.36: Apo myoyo yabe ngaikangamala, nabembe ngabatumbwa lya sakulya.
27.37: Mayumu gitu, twaai twabandu mya ibi'li', sabini na sita nkati ya meli.
27.38: Pabaayukwite, ngabataikulya igombo ya ngano mubaali li'nga pu'ngu'ya utopau wa meli. Meli yendati'kwanika
27.39: Pakusile, apangakasi ba meli bautangiteli nni'ma wu'lu' lakini baalibweni lipala mubaali lyaliyingya kuuyu'mu'. Bai, baabini yenda yi'mi'ka meli mana ilu'e wesekana.
27.40: Baakutwanie kamba yabaatabi kiyi'mi'kyo, no tomboloya lukamba lwabaatabi nsukani wa meli, no u'bu'ya tanga ya nnu'ngi' ikamwe nsunga li'nga kwikwakwata meli iyende kumbwani.
27.41: Lakini baaikite pa litu'ta lya kyangi na meli ngaikola. Nnu'ngi', meli yayingi mukyangi wangali tenandena. Nsu'gu', meli yaatumbwi ti'kwanika ipande ipande kwa makakala ga mabi'mbi'.
27.42: Asikali bapalage kwabulaga atabilwe boti baakane tila kwo u'gi'lya.
27.43: Lakini mwanjaa kolongosi ywa yesi apalage kunkengya Pauli, ngaakanikiya kanebapange nyo. Aamulise panga balu' babaamanyi u'gi'lya balongoli kwitaikulya mmasi' no loka mpaka kuuyu'mu'.
27.44: Na bi'ngi' babaigile baabi'ngi'ye kabakamuliya mumbago au muipande ya meli. Amo nga mwabaikite bandu boti kuuyu'mu' babile akoti.

28.1: Patuponagilwe kiwo, ngatukwipwa panga, twikite pakisiwa sakikemelwa Melita.
28.2: Benekaya ba ku'lu' baatupangi manogau muno. Ula aatumbwi nia na kwaai na mbepo, kwa nyo bandu balu' baatukungani mwoto ngabatukemya tuyote.
28.3: Pauli aayi'i tina anju, na paaisi kokeya pamwoto, nng'ambo ngapita pakatikati ya li'lu' liki'nda lya anju kaatila lyoto na kunnuma Pauli muluboko.
28.4: Balu' benekaya pabaamweni nng'ambo yu'lu' kannuma muluboko lwake, ngababakiana, “Kakape mundu yu' mmulagi! Pamope no panga aponagilwe kiwo mubaali, balo nnu'ngu' ywakemelwa ‘Aki’ atimisa kiwo sake.”
28.5: Lakini Pauli ngankung'undya nng'ambo yu'lu' pamwoto na ampangiteli kili'be.
28.6: Bembe bawasage kwaali' alu'e imba au tu'la pai' kwa kiimuimu no waa. Pagapite masaa gambone na kummona ntu'pu' sakimpata, ngabagalambwa mawaso gabe no baya panga ywembe aai nnu'ngu'.
28.7: Papipi na palu' kwai na migunda ya mpi'ndo ywa palu' pa kisiwa ywaakemelwage Pubulio. Mundu yu' aatukemi kati twamambwigalye na kutupea pogonjo kwa masu'ba gatatu.
28.8: Tati' bake Pubulio baatigonja kwa mwanjaa baai na utamwe wo selenga myai na oma. Pauli ngayenda kunninga, ngabi'ka moko panani yake kunnu'bya, nembe ngayu'yu'ki'lwa.
28.9: Bu'kana na lyo, atamwe boti ba pandu palu', baatiisa na ngabatepulilwa.
28.10: Bandu baatituisimu muno, na katubu'ka kwa ndi'la ya meli yendelya na mwanja witu, baatupei kila kili'be sakipalikwa mumwanja witu. Mwanja wo bu'ka Melita mpaka Roma
28.11: Paipite myei itatu, twatumbwi kai' mwanja witu kwa meli yimo ya Alesandulia yaikemelwa “Kinnu'ngu' Mapaga.” Meli yo yaayi'mike mwanja wake kwa nsimu woti wa kipepwe.
28.12: Twaikite kukilambo sa Silakusa, no tama kwo kwa masu'ba gatatu.
28.13: Bu'ka ku'lu' ngatuyendelya na mwanja witu ngatuika kukilambo sa Lejio. Pammalau' yake nsunga ngautumbwa pukatya bu'ka kusi, mumwanja wa masu'ba gabi'li' ngatuika Puteoli.
28.14: Akwo ngatwakwemba alongo ba aumini, nabembe ngabatukoka tutame pamope nabo kwa yuma yimo. Amo ngamwatuyi'i mpaka tuika Roma.
28.15: Aumini ba ku'lu' Roma pabaayu'wine abali yitu, baaisi kutupokya mpaka kusoko lya Apio na Mikaawa Itatu. Pauli paabweni, ngansukulu Nnu'ngu' no ng'ang'ala. Pauli akwembana na Ayahudi ba Roma
28.16: Patuikite Roma, Pauli aayiki'tilwe tama paakisake mwene, lakini na asikali yumo ywa kunni'ndi'la.
28.17: Pagapite masu'ba gatatu, Pauli aakemite api'ndo ba Ayahudi babatamage ku'lu'. Pabaisile ngaabakia, “Mwalongo bangu', nenga naatitabilwa ku'lu' ku Yelusalemu no kamukiyilwa mmoko ga Aroma, pamope no panga nipangiteli ulau wowoti kwa Ayahudi au kwo ti'kwana salya na yali ya au'ku' bitu.
28.18: Aroma pabaapekesenile, balu'e kuniyu'gu'lya kwa mwanjaa banibwenili na lilau lya kunisenwa kiwo.
28.19: Lakini Ayahudi pabaakani nenga lekekeyelwa, nganilu'ba mwalo wangu' ukapi'kanilwe na Nkulungwa ywa Roma. Kwa gano goti, nenga nibinili kwasitakya Ayahudi ayangu'.
28.20: Kwa nyo, saninkemya li'nga tubonagane na nilongele na mwenga. Nitabilwa na pingwi yi'no kwa kitumbu sa yu'lu' ywatumpi'kanilya na Baisilaili.”
28.21: Balu' ngabannyangwa, “Twenga tunapokyali balua yaikulongelya wenga bu'ka ku Yudea, wala nnongo Nnyahudi ywaisi ku'no kutubakia ulau wowoti.
28.22: Lakini twapendi pi'kania mwauwasa, kwa mwanjaa tutangite panga, kila pandu bendakikana kipi'nga sako.” Gaalongei Pauli kwa Ayahudi ba Roma
28.23: Baasikisine lisu'ba lyo kwembana na Pauli. Lisu'ba lyo baamwisili bandu baingi panyumba yatamage. Bu'ka kindai' mpaka kitamwiyo, Pauli aabakie makowe maingi pamope na kwakong'ondelya makowe ga Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu'. Abiniage bau'bi'li abali ya Yesu, katumya mayi'gi'yo ga salya ya Musa na itabu ya alondoli ba Nnu'ngu'.
28.24: Bi'ngi' baagau'bi'lile makowe gaalongei, na bi'ngi' baagau'bi'li lili.
28.25: Na pabaabile kababu'ka wangali yi'ki'tyana, Pauli aayongiye kwabakia, “Loo Mpeleteu aalongei kakape kwa au'ku' binu kwa ndi'la ya nnondoli ywa Nnu'ngu' Isaya,
28.26: kabaya, ‘Uyende kwa bandu ba ukaabakie, Mwayendelya yu'wa, lakini mwaatangali, Mwayendelya lola, lakini mwakibonali samulolase.
28.27: Kwa mwanjaa myoyo ya bandu ba itenonopa, na makutu gabe matopau kwo yu'wa, minyo gabe gatiwiliwitya. Ikapanga nyoli, balu'e lola kwa minyo gabe, balu'e yu'wa kwa makutu gabe, balu'e tanga kwa malango gabe, Na kunigalambukya, nanenga nilu'e kwakosopolya.’
28.28: “Kwa nyo mutange panga abali yi'no yo kosopolelwa na Nnu'ngu' itumilwe ialilwe kwa bandu bangali Ayahudi, nabembe baalu'a pi'kania!”
28.30: Pauli aatami munyumba yo panga kwa myaka ibi'li'. Aakemi bandu boti babaaisi kunkaulya.
28.31: Aabile kaala abali ya Ukulungwa wa Nnu'ngu' na kwayi'gana bandu abali ya Bwana Yesu Kilisitu wangali yogopa wala kanikiyilwa.

1.1: Balua yi' iandikilwe na nenga na Pauli kwo yangatiyana na nnongo witu Sositene. Naakemilwe panga na ntumilwe wa Yesu Kilisitu bu'kana na mwabini mwene Nnu'ngu'.
1.2: Tumwandikyanga mwenga mwamubile mwa likanisa lya Nnu'ngu' lya Kolinto, mwamupeleteyilwe kwo lu'mbana kwinu na Kilisitu Yesu. Ngamukemelwa mube mwapeleteu bake Nnu'ngu' pamope na bandu boti babalitambwa lina lya Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu, ywembe nga Bwana wabe na Bwana witu.
1.3: Ngu'ngu' na amani yaibu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu' Tati' bitu na kwa Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu, ibe pamope na mwe. Mwayalya Nnu'ngu'
1.4: Ninsukulu Nnu'ngu' wangu' masu'ba goti kwinu mwenga, kwa kitumbu sa ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu' yamupeyilwe kwa ndi'la ya Yesu Kilisitu.
1.5: Kwa kitumbu so lu'mbana na Kilisitu, muyaliwite muulongeli woti na muutangi woti,
1.6: kwa mwanjaa ukong'ondeli watunnetile nkati yinu bu'kana na Kilisitu ulaya ukakape.
1.7: Kwa nyo, mupu'ngu'kilweli na upo yoyoti ya kiloo pamuli'nda kwa kilu'lu' bonekana kwa Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu.
1.8: Ywembe aalu'a kumpanga mukangamale mpaka kuundi'la, li'nga kane mube na makosa lisu'ba li'lu' lyoisa kwake Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu.
1.9: Nnu'ngu' ywau'bi'li'ka ngaywaankemite mwenga mutame mukiselele pamope na Mwana wake Yesu Kilisitu Bwana witu. Baganika kwa aumini mulikanisa
1.10: Mwalongo bangu', nendakunnu'banga kwa lina lya Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu mwaboti muyi'ki'tyane, kanekube na mayu'mano pakati yinu, na muganiye pamope kwa galu' gamugabinia.
1.11: Kwa mwanjaa nibakiyilwe na bandu ba munyumba ya Kloe panga kubile na mayu'mano pakati yinu.
1.12: Bai, pano nilombolya panga kila mundu wa kasinu alongela lya kisake, yumo abaya, “Nenga na ywa Pauli,” ywi'ngi', “Nenga na ywa Apolo,” ywi'ngi', “Nenga na ywa Petili,” na ywi'ngi', “Nenga na ywa Kilisitu.”
1.13: Buli, Kilisitu aatibaganika? Buli, Pauli aabambilwe kwa kitumbu sinu? Au mwaabatisilwe kwa lina lya Pauli?
1.14: Ninsukulu Nnu'ngu' kwa mwanjaa nimmatisikeli mundu ywoywoti kasinu ila Kilisipo na Gayo,
1.15: Kwa nyo, ntu'pu' ywawesa baya panga abatisilwe kwa lina lyangu'.
1.16: (Lakini niku'mbu'kile panga, naabatisike na bandu ba munyumba ya Stefana, bu'ka pa bo nitangiteli panga naammatisike na mundu ywi'ngi'.)
1.17: Kwa mwanjaa, Kilisitu aanitumikeli li'nga nibatise, ila niale Abali Inannoga, kai' niale pangali u'bi'lya ikima ya bandu, li'nga kiwo sa Kilisitu munsalaba sakane obeya makakala gake. Kilisitu nga makakala na ikima ya Nnu'ngu'
1.18: Kwa mwanjaa maalo ga kiwo sa Yesu munsalaba kwa balu' babaoba baibona ulogeloge bai, lakini kwitu twenga twatukosopolelwa, galaya makakala ga Nnu'ngu'.
1.19: Kwa mwanjaa maandiko mapeleteu gabaya, “Naialabiya ikima yabe bene ikima, na kugataikwa malango ga bene malango.”
1.20: Bai, tubaye buli bu'kana na bene ikima, balimu ba Salya ya Musa, au alongeli ba masu'ba gano? Nnu'ngu' alayite panga ikima ya dunia yi'no ulogeloge bai.
1.21: Nnu'ngu' mu ikima yake, aabini kwakosopolya balu' babau'bi'lya kwa ndi'la ya maalo gatuala, gagabonekana kwabe panga ga kilogeloge. Aapangite nyalu' kwa mwanjaa kwa ndi'la ya ikima ya kimundu, bandu baakombwili kuntanga Nnu'ngu'.
1.22: Ayahudi bapala mwanju li'nga bau'bi'li, na Ayunani bapala ikima.
1.23: Lakini twenga tuala abali ya Kilisitu ywabambilwe munsalaba, likowe li' kwa Ayahudi kiku'balo na kwa Ayunani ibonekana ulalo.
1.24: Lakini kwa balu' babakemilwe na Nnu'ngu', babe Ayahudi au Ayunani, Kilisitu nga makakala ga Nnu'ngu' na kai' nga ikima ya Nnu'ngu'.
1.25: Kwa mwanjaa sakibonekana na bandu panga ulogeloge, kwa Nnu'ngu' kibile na ikima kulikoni ikima ya bandu, na ukigopi wa Nnu'ngu' ubile na makakala kulikoni makakala ga bandu.
1.26: Mwalongo, muku'mbu'ki pamwakemilwe na Nnu'ngu'. Kwa kili'ngo sa kimundu mwabamboneli mwamwaabile na ikima, makakala, wala mubelekwili mumisengo yene yeo, wala yo isimika.
1.27: Lakini Nnu'ngu' aaisawi ikowe ya kilogeloge ya mudunia yi'no li'nga kwapeya oni bene ikima, kai', Nnu'ngu' aaisawi ikowe ya ukigopi ya mudunia yi'no li'nga kwapeya oni bene makakala.
1.28: Nnu'ngu' aaisawi ikowe yangaliisimilwa na yaisalaulilwa mudunia yi'no, ikowe yangali maana, li'nga aialabiye ikowe yabaibona ya maana.
1.29: Aapangite nyo li'nga kaneabe mundu ywakwipuna nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu'.
1.30: Lakini Nnu'ngu' annu'mbaniye na Kilisitu Yesu na kumpanga ikima yitu bu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu'. Kwa ndi'la ya Kilisitu tubalangilwa aki kwa Nnu'ngu' no pangilwa twapeleteu ba Nnu'ngu', no kosopolelwa bu'ka mumasambi gitu.
1.31: Kati mu'lu' mwagabaite Maandiko Mapeleteu panga, “Ywapala kwipuna, aipune kwa kitumbu sa Bwana.”

2.1: Mwalongo bangu', panaaisi kasinu kumwalya iyo ya liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu', naisi lili kwa ung'anga wo longela au kwo tumya ikima ya dunia yi'no.
2.2: Kwa mwanjaa panaabile kasinu naabini kanenilitange likowe li'ngi', ila abali ya Yesu Kilisitu ywabambilwe munsalaba bai.
2.3: Panaabile kasinu naabi na kigopi, kaniyogopa no lendema muno.
2.4: Mayi'gano na maalo gangu' gaapiyilweli kwa mayi'gi'yo ga kwauta bandu, au ikima, ila galayage uweso wa Loo wa Nnu'ngu',
2.5: li'nga imani yinu yaakanesengelwa muikima ya kimundu, ila mumakakala ga Nnu'ngu'. Ikima ya Nnu'ngu'
2.6: Ata nyo twenga tulongela kwa ikima kwa balu' babakomile loo yabe, lakini ikima yo ya pano padunia yi'noli, wala ya akulungwa ba dunia yi'no ya bababile mulikundi lyo oba.
2.7: Ila twenga tulongela ikima ya Nnu'ngu' yembe nga iyo yaiyilwe na Nnu'ngu' yayaabi'kilwe wiso kubile balo ata umbilwa kwa dunia kwa kitumbu sa utukupu witu.
2.8: Ntu'pu' ata nkulungwa yumo ywa mudunia yi'no ywaaitangite ikima yi'. Kenda bakaitanga ikima yo, balu'e kummambali munsalaba Bwana wa utukupu.
2.9: Lakini kati mu'lu' mwagabaya Maandiko Mapeleteu panga, “Makowe gangali bonekana na liyo, ata lisikilo linagayu'wali, makowe gangali ganiyilwa na mundu ywoywoti, ago nga galu' Nnu'ngu' aabi'ki wiso babampenda.”
2.10: Lakini Nnu'ngu' aatuumukuli twenga iyo yi'lu' kwa ndi'la ya Loo wake, kwa mwanjaa Loo apekeseni ili'be yoti, ata makowe ga nkati muno ga Nnu'ngu'.
2.11: Nyai ywatanga gawasa mundu ywi'ngi' ila loo ya mwene mundu yaibile nkati yake? Nyinyonyo, ntu'pu' ywatanga gawasa Nnu'ngu', ila Loo wa mwene Nnu'ngu'.
2.12: Kwa nyo, twenga tupokili loo wa padunia, ila tupoki Loo ywabu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu' li'nga tupate kugatanga galu' gatuyali Nnu'ngu'.
2.13: Bai, twenga tulongelali kwa mayi'gi'yo gatuyi'ganilwe kwa ikima ya kimundu, ila gatuyi'ganilwe na Loo mpeleteu. Tugalongela mayi'gi'yo ga kiloo kwa bandu bababile na aywo Loo.
2.14: Mundu wa dunia apokyali makowe ga Loo wa Nnu'ngu' kwa mwanjaa kwake ywembe makowe go ga kilalo bai. Malango gake gawesali kwipwa makowe go, ila gawesa kwipulwa kwo yangatiyilwa na Loo bai.
2.15: Lakini mundu ywatawalilwa na Loo wa Nnu'ngu' awesa kuukwipwa ukakape wa kila kili'be, lakini ywembe aukumilwali na mundu ywoywoti.
