4.10: Natwenga kwa kitumbu sa li', twendakasana kwa mwanjaa tubi'i liu'bi'lyo litu kwa Nnu'ngu' ywabile mwu'mi, nga nkosopoli wa bandu boti, munomuno kwa balu' babau'bi'lile.
4.11: Ago nga mayi'gi'yo gaupalikwa kugalagya na kugayi'gana.
4.12: Mundu ywoywoti kaneausalawe unsembe wako, ila ube wa mundu wo yigilwa na babau'bi'lya kwa nnongelo wako na nnyendo wako, upendo na imani, na upeleteu.
4.13: Paunili'nda mpaka isa kwangu', witoleye kwasomya bandu Maandiko Mapeleteu ku'no kawakangamaya myoyo na kwayi'gana.
4.14: Uku'mbu'ki tumya upo ya kiloo yopeyilwe kwa malobe ga alondoli ba Nnu'ngu', palu' pawabi'kilwe maboko ga api'ndo ba kanisa.
4.15: Ukasane kugapanga go kwa mwoyo wako woti, li'nga bandu boti bakubone mwoyendelya ku'la.
4.16: Wili'ndi'le wenga wamwene na mayi'gano gako. Mana upangite nnyo, waalu'a kwikosopolya wamwene na balu' babakupi'kania.

5.1: Kaneunkwi'li'ke nnalu'me nng'oi kwa kunkalipya, ila upalikwa unnyangatiye mbolembole kati tati' bako. Wapangi ansembe kati alongobo,
5.2: na alwawa agoi wapangi kati akinamau' bako, na ai'nja kati alu'mbu'go, upange nyo kwa mwoyo mpeleteu.
5.3: Waisimu alwawa awi'li'kwa na asengo babe bangali mundu ywa kwayangatiya.
5.4: Lakini nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa mana abile na bana au asu'ku'lu', bapalikwa timisa mwapala Nnu'ngu' kwa kwayangatiya abelei babe. Kwo panga nnyo, baapanga baki'li'bu'ya manogau gabaapangilwe, na nyo ngamwapendi Nnu'ngu'.
5.5: Nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa ywa kakape nga yu'lu' ywalekilwe kisake. Agabi'i mau'bi'lyo gake goti kwa Nnu'ngu', na ayendelya sali no lu'ba gapala kilo na muntwekati.
5.6: Lakini nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa ywatama mumaisa go minyikiya kila sakibona, aywo ayomwike waa pamope no panga balo akapu'mwa.
5.7: Malagyo go wabakiye bandu li'nga baakane pitya bo bi'ka lukoolo.
5.8: Lakini mundu ywakotoka kwayangatiya alongo ba panyumba yake, aywo aikani imani na nga mmaya kulikoni ywangali u'bi'lya.
5.9: Nnwawa nng'wi'li'kwa li'nga ayingi mukipi'nga sa awi'li'kwa babayangatiyilwa na likanisa apalikwa aikiye myaka sitini no yendelya bu'ka belekwa, na abe nnwawa ywaatami na nnalu'me yumo mumaisa gake.
5.10: Abe akong'ondelilwe kwa iyendo yake inannoga kati muuleli wa bana, kwakemya ageni, mwoyo wa kwatumikiya aumini, kwayangatiya babateselwa, na kwitoleya panga ganannoga kwa ndi'la yoti.
5.11: Lakini kaneuyi'ki'ti kwayingiya alwawa bali' awi'li'kwa mukipi'nga sa awi'li'kwa, kwa mwanjaa maminyikiyo ga payi'ga go pala ku'nda gawesa kwayingya no lekekeya kuntumikiya Kilisitu.
5.12: Kwa nyo, bailetya ukumu yo ti'kwana lilagano lyabalagine nakwe Kilisitu pabaatumbwile.
5.13: Kai' pamope na go, baboyolwa na ukata no belabela mumayumba. Kai', akata bai lili, ila abai, bendapekeseni no longela makowe gangali pwaika.
5.14: Kwa nyo, nipala alwawa bali' awi'li'kwa baku'nde, bapape bana no tunja mayumba gabe, li'nga baakane kwapeya andumu lipala lya kutulongelya maakau.
5.15: Kwa mwanjaa, awi'li'kwa bi'ngi' bababile balo bali' bayomwike tindigana na kummi'ngi'ya Ibilisi.
5.16: Lakini nnwawa ywoywoti ywa likanisa mana abile na alongo awi'li'kwa, apalikwa kwayangatiya li'nga kulipu'ngu'ki'ya likanisa kigombo. Kwo panga nya, likanisa liwesa kwayangatiya awi'li'kwa bangali alongo.
5.17: Api'ndo ba likanisa babayimi'li'ka wiso mengo gabe bapalikwa isimilwa na bapangilwe manogau, munomuno babaitoleya ala no yi'gana.
5.18: Kwa mwanjaa Maandiko Mapeleteu gabaya, “Kaneumwibe nkano ng'ombe pali'bata ngano li'nga ku'bata.” Kai', gabaya, “Mpangakasi apalikwa li'pi'lwa liposo lyake.”
5.19: Kaneuyi'ki'ti sitakilwa kwa mpi'ndo wa likanisa mpaka upeyelwe ukong'ondeli wa bandu abi'li' au atatu.
5.20: Balu' api'ndo babayendelya panga sambi wakalipi ku'no bandu boti ba likanisa kabapi'kania, li'nga na bi'ngi' bayogope.
5.21: Nikulagya ga nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu', Kilisitu Yesu, na malaika bake Nnu'ngu' panga ugakamwe ga pangali kummawa wala kumpendeleya mundu ywoywoti mumakowe goti.
5.22: Kaneuyu'ngu'ye kummi'kya moko mundu kwa lyengo lya Bwana, kwa mwanjaa mana ummi'i mwene sambi, mwayangatiyana sambi yake. Wili'ndi'le ube wampeleteu.
5.23: Tumbulya nambi'yambi', kaneunywe masi' bai, ila unywe na divai pasene kwa kitumbu sa kitamwe sa ndumbo yako na itamwe yi'ngi' yaikokotya kukuauya.
5.24: Masambi ga bandu bi'ngi' gabonekana ata ukumu ibile balo timya, lakini masambi ga bandu bi'ngi' gatiiyanikwa na gaabonekana nnu'ngi'.
5.25: Nyinyonyo, iyendo inannoga iiyanikali, na ata yi'lu' inannoga yaiiyanikwe yaaumukulwa.

6.1: Abanda boti bapalikwa kwaisimu angwana babe munomuno, li'nga bandu baakane tukana lina lya Nnu'ngu' na gatuyi'gana.
6.2: Abanda bababile na angwana Akilisitu kanebaasalawe kwa mwanjaa bembe alongo babe. Ila baatumikiye wiso muno, kwa mwanjaa bayangatiya aumini ayabe na bendakwapenda. Mayi'gano ga ubu'su' na utayili wa ukweli Upalikwa yi'gana no aala makowe ga.
6.3: Manaitei mundu ywoywoti ayi'gana mayi'gano ga ubu'su' no kana mayi'gano magolou ga Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu na galu' gagabu'kana na gapala Nnu'ngu',
6.4: ywembe atwi'lya kwipuna wala akitangiteli kili'be, na kipi'li' sake taukana no kalipyana bu'kana na mayi'gi'yo gabule. Ago galeta bwigu, bulwe, matukano na maku'pi'ki'yano,
6.5: na mayu'mano gangali yomoka ga bandu bene malango gagatindigine, ata balibali ukakape kabisa. Nga balu' babawasa panga dini nga ndi'la yo tayilika.
6.6: Kakape kwo bi'ngi'ya mwapala Nnu'ngu' kumpanga mundu apwailike muno mana yanni'ngana ili'be yabile nayo.
6.7: Kwa mwanjaa mudunia yi'no tuletikeli kili'be sosoti na tubu'kali na kili'be.
6.8: Ila mana tubile na kilyo na ngu'bo yo wala, ituli'ngane.
6.9: Lakini babapala utayili batu'mbu'ka mumapayilwo no kola mukitapa sa maminyikiyo maingi ga kilogeloge no sulu, gagaauta mpaka alabika no langanyika.
6.10: Kwa mwanjaa penda muno mbanje nga liina lya sampuli ya maakau maingi. Bandu bi'ngi', kwo minyikiya muno pata mbanje, bailei imani na kwilumiya bene kwo usunika muno. Mayi'gano ga ikima kwa Timoteo
6.11: Lakini wenga wa mundu wa Nnu'ngu', makowe go ugatile. Ila ubi'ngi'ye aki na mwapala Nnu'ngu', imani, upendo, komeya no gegekeya.
6.12: Uku'mbwane ngondo inannoga ya imani. Uukamwe ukoto wangayomoka wembe ngaukemilwe kwa wo, pauupiyite ukong'ondeli wa kweli nnu'ngi' ya akong'ondeli baingi.
6.13: Nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu' ywaipanga yumbe yoti ibe ngoti, na nnu'ngi' ya Kilisitu Yesu ywaapiyite ukong'ondeli wa kweli nnu'ngi' ya Pontio Pilato, nikulagya mayi'gi'yo gano.
6.14: Wikamwe amuli yi' pangali likosa au lukoolo kwa bandu, mpaka paaisa Bwana witu Yesu Kilisitu.
6.15: Isa kwake kwapangilwa na Nnu'ngu' kwa nsimu waubi'i mwene. Ywembe nga Nnu'ngu' mwene balaka na ngatawala kisake, nga nkulungwa ywa akulungwa, na Bwana wa mabwana.
6.16: Nnu'ngu' kisake bai nga ywangali kwembana na kiwo, na atama pabweya pangali egelya mundu. Kai', ntu'pu' mundu ywamweni, wala ywawesa kummona. Ywembe nga mwene isima na uweso wangayomoka. Amina.
6.17: Wabakiye matayili ba padunia yi'no panga bakotoke kwilumba wala u'bi'lya utayili wabe waupi'ta bai. Ila bapalikwa kumwu'bi'lya Nnu'ngu', ywatupeya ili'be yoti pangali li'ngi'lya li'nga twitumi kwo napusika.
6.18: Kai', walagi panga bapange manogau, na utayili wabe ube wo panga manogau, babe anogamwoyo no yi'ki'tya tumya mali yabe kiselele na ayabe.
6.19: Kwa ndi'la yi', baibi'kya mabi'ko gagaapanga kati nsingi waukangamile kwa masu'ba gagaaisa. Apo, ngapabaalu'a pokya ukoto wa kakape.
6.20: Timoteo, ukamulikiye gaupeyilwe. Kanewiyingiye mumayi'gi'yo ga mudunia au mataukano gangali pwaika gagabayilwa nga ilimu,
6.21: kwa kugayi'ki'tya mayi'gano go ga ubu'su', bandu bi'ngi' bayomwike kwileka imani. Mwaboti ninnu'bya ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu'.

1.1: Balua yi'no niiandike nenga na Pauli, ntumilwe wa Kilisitu Yesu kwa mabinio ga Nnu'ngu'. Nitumilwe li'nga naabakiye bandu bu'kana na ukoto watulagilwe kwa kumwu'bi'lya Kilisitu Yesu.
1.2: Nikuandikya wamwana wangu' waupendilwe Timoteo. Nikulu'bya ngu'ngu', kiya na amani bu'ka kwa Tati' Nnu'ngu' na kwa Kilisitu Yesu Bwana witu ibe nawe. Sukulu na mayi'gi'yo go senga
1.3: Ninsukulu Nnu'ngu' nywanintumikia kwo binia ganannoga kati mwabaantumikiye au'ku' bangu'. Kilo na muntwekati nendakuku'mbu'kya mumalu'bo gangu'.
1.4: Nigaku'mbu'kya moli gako, na nibile na kilu'lu' so bonagana kai' li'nga niupulaise muno mwoyo wangu'.
1.5: Niiku'mbu'kya imani yako ya kakape yayaabile wi'ti' kwa mbuya bako Loisi na mau' bako Eunike. Niu'bi'lya panga kakape na wenga ubile nayo kai'.
1.6: Kwa kitumbu si' nganikuku'mbu'ki'a uutili upo ya kiloo yawipokile panikubi'ki moko panani yako.
1.7: Mwanjaa Nnu'ngu' atupeili loo ya bwoga, ila ya makakala, ya upendo no li'ngi'lya.
1.8: Kwa nyo, kanewibone oni kong'ondelya makowe ga Bwana witu au kwa mwanjaa nibile muutabilwe bu'kana na ywembe. Ila, ulu'mbane na nenga mutabu ya Injili kwa makakala gaupeyelwa na Nnu'ngu'.
1.9: Ywembe aatitukosopolya, na kutusawa tupange twabandu bake apeleteu. Aapangite nyo kwa kitumbu sa yendo yitu inannoga lili, ila kwo binia na kwa ngu'ngu' yake. Aatupei ngu'ngu' yo kwa ndi'la ya Kilisitu Yesu, kubile balo umbilwa kwa dunia.
1.10: Na nambi'yambi' ngu'ngu' yo itanganikwe, kwo umukulilwa kwake nkosopoli witu Kilisitu Yesu ywaalabiye kiwo na kutulaya ukoto wangayomoka kwa ndi'la ya Abali Inannoga.
1.11: Kwa kitumbu sa Abali Inannoga yo nisaulilwe nibe namwaali, ntumilwe, na mwalimu.
1.12: Kwa kitumbu so nendaku'su'mbu'lwa, lakini niibonali oni kwa mwanjaa nintangite ywanimwu'bi'lile. Kai' nitangite panga endawesa kukili'ndi'la si'lu' saanikamukiye mpaka lisu'ba li'lu' lyo buyangana kwake.
1.13: Ugakamwe mayi'gano ga kakape gaugayu'wine gapange kili'be so yigilwa pamope na imani, na upendo mu Kilisitu Yesu.
1.14: Kwa makakala ga Loo Mpeleteu ywatama nkati yitu, ugali'ndi'le mayi'gano gano manogau gaukamukiyilwe.
1.15: Utangite panga bandu boti ba kunkoa wa Asia banilei, nkati yabe babile Figelo na Helimogene.
1.16: Bwana aabi'ki kiya alongo ba Onesiforo, kwa mwanjaa akokotyage isa kuniponwa moli na wala aibwenili oni kunibona nibile muutabilwe.
1.17: Paaikite Roma bai, aakasine kunipala mpaka paanibweni.
1.18: Na wenga ugatangite gambone gaanipangile akwo Efeso. Bwana ammi'ki kiya mulisu'ba lyake lyo buya.

2.1: Bai wamwana wangu', ube na makakala kwa ndi'la ya ngu'ngu' yatupata kwa Kilisitu Yesu.
2.2: Ugatole mayi'gano gaugayu'wine kasangu' nnu'ngi' ya bandu bambone, na wenga wayi'gane bandu bawau'bi'lya, li'nga baakombwe kwayi'gana bi'ngi' kai'.
2.3: Ulu'mbane na nenga mungu'su'mbu' kati asikali mwu'bi'li'ka wa Kilisitu Yesu.
2.4: Asikali mana abile kungondo, apalikwa abe kuutalu na makowe ga maisa ga kila lisu'ba, li'nga kumpulaisa mpi'ndo wake.
2.5: Mundu ywoywoti ywasindana ming'ando yo butuka lubi'lo, akombwali pata upo yo sinda mana akotwike koleya salya ya ming'ando yake.
2.6: Nni'mi ywakasana muuli'mi ngaywapalikwa pata mili'mbu' ya mauno gake.
2.7: Ugataunikiye ago ganigalongela, na Bwana aakupeya uweso wa kugatanga makowe galu' goti.
2.8: Unku'mbu'ki Yesu Kilisitu wa lubelekwo lwa Daudi ywayu'yilwe bu'ka kuuwi'li, kati mwaibaya Abali Inannoga yaniala.
2.9: Bu'kana na go nendaku'su'mbu'lwa ata baa muutabilwe kati nannau, lakini liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu' litabilwali.
2.10: Kwa nyo nendakomeya goti kwa kitumbu sa babasaulilwe na Nnu'ngu' li'nga nabembe babe na ukosopoli waubile kwa Kilisitu Yesu, pamope na utukupu wangayomoka.
2.11: Mayi'gi'yo ga, ga kakape panga, Mana twaawile pamope nakwe twaalama nakwe kai'.
2.12: Mana twaakomeya twaatawala nakwe. Mana twaankana naywembe aatukana.
2.13: Mana twau'bi'li'ka lili, ywembe balo aau'bi'li'ka, kwa mwanjaa akombwali kwikana. Mpangakasi ywayi'ki'tilwe na Nnu'ngu'
2.14: Waku'mbu'ki'ye aumini makowe go na kwakwi'li'ka nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu' panga bakotoke taukana bu'kana na mayi'gi'yo. Mitau ntu'pu' pwaila, ila yaalabiya babapi'kania.
2.15: Ukasane li'nga wilaye panga uyi'ki'tilwe na Nnu'ngu' kati mpangakasi ywangali kwibona oni, ywayi'gana kwa ukakape liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'.
2.16: Wibi'ke kuutalu na mayi'gi'yo gabule ga mudunia, kwa mwanjaa ago gaapanga bandu babe kuutalu na Nnu'ngu'.
2.17: Mayi'gano gabe gendatema kati libanga lya matana. Nkati ya babayi'gana go, babile ki Himenayo na Fileto,
2.18: babailei kakape kababaya panga uyu'ki witu upite, no alabiya imani ya bandu bi'ngi'.
2.19: Lakini nsingi wa Nnu'ngu' wauyi'mi wisowiso uandikilwe kwa mayi'gi'yo aga, “Bwana aatangite bababile bake,” na, “Kila ywaibaya ywembe ywa Bwana, auleke ulau.”
2.20: Muliku'ta kubile na yombo ya samani bai lili, ila na yangali samani, yi'ngi' itumika kwa makowe ga ngama, na yi'ngi' kwa kila lisu'ba.
2.21: Mundu mana aipeletiye kwa kugaleka malau goti, aapanga sombo sa ngama no saulilwa, kai' sendapwaika kwa lyengo lya Bwana no yi'ma wisowiso kwo panga makowe goti manogau.
2.22: Ugaleke maminyikio malau ga unsembe wako, ukoteye makowe ga aki, imani, upendo na amani pamope na bandu babankilikitya Bwana kwa myoyo mipeleteu.
2.23: Wibi'ke kuutalu na mitau ya kilogeloge yangali maana, kwa mwanjaa mitau iwesa leta bulwe.
2.24: Kai' ntumisi wa Bwana apalikwali abe munomo, ila abe nnogau kwa bandu boti, ywakombwa yi'gana na kwakomeya bandu.
2.25: Apalikwa kwakwi'li'ka bandu babantaukya, ila kwa ukali'li. Pi'ngi' Nnu'ngu' aawesa kwayalya galambuka na kwitanga kweli.
2.26: Bu'kapo bawesa pata malango no ku'su'pu'ka mukitapa sa Ibilisi saayonjike kwo panga bapange mwapendi ywembe.

3.1: Nambi'yambi' utange panga, masu'ba ga kuundi'la kwalu'a baa na nsimu wa tabu.
3.2: Kwa mwanjaa bandu baalu'a kwipenda bene, baapenda mbanje, baalu'a kwilumba, babaa bene umbu'ku'su', balu'a baa atukani, bangali kwayu'wa abelei babe, bangali sukulu, bangali kumwisimu Nnu'ngu',
3.3: bangali kwapenda ayabe, bangali penda awana, abai, bangali li'ngi'lya, akali', babakana manogau,
3.4: asongi, kingayu'wa, babaipuna, babapenda muno maminyikio ga dunia kulikoni kumpenda Nnu'ngu'.
3.5: Babonekana kati bandu bababi'ngi'ya gapala Nnu'ngu', lakini bagakana makakala gake. Kwa nyo utame kuutalu na bandu kati bo.
3.6: Nkati yabe babile babayingya mumayumba ga bandu na kwakonga alwawa alalo babatopilwe na masambi kabautilwa na maminyikio ga kila sampuli.
3.7: Alwawa bo bapala kwiyi'gana kila lisu'ba, lakini bakombwali kuutanga ukakape.
3.8: Bandu ba bautaukya ukakape kati mwabantauki Musa ki Yane na Yambre. Bandu bo malango gabe gatitindigana na imani yabe ipwaikali.
3.9: Lakini baayendelyali muno, kwa mwanjaa ulogeloge wabe waabonekana kwa bandu mpu'la, kati mwaubonekine ulogeloge wa balu' analu'me abi'li'. Malagyo ga kuundi'la
3.10: Ila wenga ukoleyite mayi'gano gangu', nnyendo wangu', binia kwangu', imani yangu', ukomeyi wangu', upendo wangu', na uli'ndi wangu'.
3.11: Utangite bandu mwabaniawiye na siki yaniipatike panaabile muilambo ya Antiokia, Ikonio na Lustila. Naatikomea goti, na Bwana Yesu nganikosopolya mu ago goti.
3.12: Kakape, boti babamwu'bi'lya Kilisitu Yesu no pala panga maisa gapala Nnu'ngu' baalu'a ku'su'mbu'lwa.
3.13: Lakini bandu alau na akongi baayendelya muno panga ulau, baalu'a kwakonga no kongelwa.
3.14: Lakini wenga uyendeli tama mu'lu' muukakape wauyi'ganilwe na kuuyi'ki'tya, kwa mwanjaa utangite wiyi'ganiye go bu'ka kwa nyai.
3.15: Bu'ka kuunangu'ta, ugatangite Maandiko Mapeleteu. Ago gakupanga utange panga ukosopoli upatikana kwa kumwu'bi'lya Kilisitu Yesu.
3.16: Maandiko Mapeleteu goti gaandikilwe kwa ulongosi wa Nnu'ngu' na gapwaika kwo yi'gana ukakape, kwi'li'ka no goloya mayi'gano, no longoya bandu batame mumaisa ga aki.
3.17: Maandiko gano gaapanga bandu ba Nnu'ngu' baibi'ke wiso no timya kwo panga manogau goti.

4.1: Nikulagya nnu'ngi' ya Nnu'ngu' na Kilisitu Yesu ywaalu'a kwaukumu akoti na awi'li, na ngaywaalu'a isa tawala abile nkulungwa.
4.2: Uale liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'. Utame wiso munsimu waupwaika na wangali pwaika. Ukalipi, ukwi'li'ke na wakangamaye bandu. Upange nyo ku'no kauyi'gana kwa ukomeyi woti.
4.3: Nikubakia panga ulu'a isa nsimu wa bandu kugakana mayi'gano ga kakape, kabapala gabapendi bene no sawa balimu baingi bo yi'gana gabagapendi kugapi'kania mumakutu gabe.
4.4: Baakana pi'kania ukakape no koleya u'mo ya ubu'su'.
4.5: Lakini wenga utame kwo li'ngi'lya mumakowe goti. Ukomeye ngu'su'mbu', uale Abali Inannoga, na upange kinannoga muutumisi wako woti.
4.6: Kwa mwanjaa nibi'ki'lwa wiso kati salaka, no yomoka kwangu' kuegelile.
4.7: Nitekasana mumasindano, mwanja niuyomolile na imani yangu' niikotike.
4.8: Na nambi'yambi' nipi'kanilya peyelwa taji ya aki. Bwana, nga akimu wa aki, aanipeya lisu'ba lyo buya kwake. Ayo napeyelwa nenga bai lili, ila na boti babamwu'bi'lya kwa kilu'lu' paabuya. Malagyo
4.10: Kwa mwanjaa Dema agapendi makowe ga padunia, nganileka no yenda ku Tesalonike. Kreske aayi'i Galatia, na Tito aayi'i Dalmatia.
4.11: Luka kisake ngaywaaigali nanenga pano. Pawisa ku'no ulongwane na Maluko kwa mwanjaa endapwaika kwa kuniyangatia mulyengo lya Nnu'ngu'.
4.13: Pawalu'a isa wanipu'tu'li likoti lyanalilei Tiloa kwa Kalpo, na itabu, munomuno itabu yi'lu' ya maki'ngo.
4.14: Alekisanda pundi kipala aanipangi maakau gambone. Bwana alu'a kunni'pa bu'kana na mwapangite.
4.15: Wili'ndi'le bu'kana na ywembe, kwa mwanjaa aatigataukya muno mayi'gano gitu.
4.16: Panitumbwi kwikengya ntu'pu' mundu ywaaniyi'mile, boti baatinileka. Ninnu'ba Nnu'ngu' kaneabalangili likosa lyo!
4.17: Lakini Bwana Yesu aabile na nenga. Aanipei makakala go ala Abali Inannoga li'nga bandu bangali Ayahudi wapate kwiyu'wa. Aanikosopoli mukiwo, kwa mwanjaa naai kati nibile pankano wa imba.
4.18: Bwana aalu'a yendelya kunikosopolya mumaakau goti na kunili'ndi'la mpaka panaaika muukulungwa wake wa kunani. Bwana Yesu akwi'yi'lwe milele na milele. Amina. Salamu ya kuundi'la
4.19: Wapei salamu ki Priska, Akula na alongo ba Onesiforo.
4.20: Elasito aaigali Kolinto, Tilofimo naanei Mileto kwa mwanjaa aai ntamwe.
4.21: Uyu'mbi'ti'ke isa kipepwe kibile balo. Eubulo, Pude, Linusi, Klaudia na aumini boti bakupei salamu.
4.22: Bwana Yesu abe na wenga. Ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu' ibe namwe.

1.1: Balua yi' niandike nenga na Pauli, ntumisi wa Nnu'ngu' na ntumilwe wa Yesu Kilisitu. Nitumilwe kwa kitumbu sa kwayi'gana bandu babasaulilwe na Nnu'ngu' li'nga bapate kumwu'bi'lya no tanga ukakape waulu'a kwalongoya tama maisa magolou,
1.2: na kwapeya mau'bi'lyo go li'nda ukoto wangayomoka. Nnu'ngu', ywangali longela ubu'su', aalagi ukoto wo kubile balo ata umbilwa kwa dunia.
1.3: Lakini, munsimu wake Nnu'ngu' aumukwi liyi'gi'yo lyake. Naakamukiyilwe nwaya liyi'gi'yo lyo na Nnu'ngu', Nkosopoli witu.
1.4: Nikuandikya wa Tito, wamwana wangu' wa kakape muimani yatuiu'bi'lya. Nikulu'bya ngu'ngu' na amani bu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu' Tati' na Kilisitu Yesu, Nkosopoli witu. Lyengo lya Tito ku Kilete
1.5: Naakulei kunni'ma wa Kilete li'nga ubi'ke wiso makowe gagaaigile, pamope no sawa api'ndo ba kanisa kwa kila kilambo, kati mu'lu' mwanaakulagile.
1.6: Mpi'ndo wa kanisa apalikwa kaneabe na lukoolo na mundu, abe nnalu'me wa nnwawa yumo. Bana bake bapalikwa babe babau'bi'lile bangali sitakilwa kwa makowe ga umbu'ku'su' wala kotoka yu'wa.
1.7: Nnyi'mi'li'ki wa kanisa apalikwa panga mundu ywangali bi'ki'lwa lukoolo kwa mwanjaa akamukiyilwe lyengo lya Nnu'ngu'. Kwa nyo kaneabe mundu ywakwipuna, ywayu'ngu'ya usika, nnobya wi'mbi', mwene nnomo wala pala mbanje kwa ndi'la ndau.
1.8: Ila abe mundu ywapenda kwapokya ageni wiso, ywapenda panga makowe manogau, mwene ikima, mwene aki, mpeleteu na ywawesa kwiyi'mi'li'ka mwene.
1.9: Apalikwa kamwa Liyi'gi'yo lya kakape kati mwaliyi'ganilwa, li'nga awese kwakangamaya bi'ngi' kwa mayi'gano ga kakape na kwakalipya balu' babagataukya mayi'gano ago.
1.10: Kwa mwanjaa babile bandu baingi, muno balu' babau'bi'lile bu'ka mudini ya Kiyahudi, bembe bayu'wali na baaobeya bi'ngi' kwa mayi'gi'yo ga kilalo.
1.11: Bapalikwa bakanikiyilwe, kwa mwanjaa baaobeya bandu bu'ka nsengo gumo ata wi'ngi' kwo yi'gana mayi'gi'yo gangali palikwa li'nga bapate mali kwa ndi'la ya ukongi.
1.12: Kwaabile na nnondoli yumo ywabe Nkilete ywaabaite panga, “Akilete masu'ba goti abu'su', bapwaikali kati inyama ya mmwitu, bapendi mila muno lakini bapendili panga kasi!”
1.13: Ukong'ondeli wu'no wa kakape. Kwa nyo wakwi'li'ke kwa ukali' li'nga bapate baa na imani yaitimile.
1.14: Bakotoke pi'kania u'mo ya Kiyahudi yangali maana yoyoti, na malagyo ga bandu babaukana ukakape.
1.15: Kwa balu' bababile na mwoyo nnogau, kila kili'be kwabe kipeleteu. Lakini ntu'pu' sosoti sakipanga kipeleteu kwa bandu asapu na bangali u'bi'lya Nnu'ngu', kwa mwanjaa malango na myoyo yabe itwi'li usapu.
1.16: Bembe babaya panga bantangite Nnu'ngu', lakini iyendo yabe ilaya mpu'la panga bendakunkana. Baatisukilwa, bangali yu'wa, na bangali pwaika mulikowe lyolyoti li'lu' linogau.

2.1: Lakini wenga wa Tito, upalikwa kwayi'gana bandu mayi'gano ga kakape.
2.2: Waabakiye analu'me agoi bapange makowe kwo li'ngi'lya, babe na isima na bawese kwitawala bene. Kai', babe ba kakape muimani, muupendo na muukomeyi.
2.3: Nyinyonyo waayi'gane alwawa agoi batame mumaisa mapeleteu. Kanebabe abai au babalobya, ila babe bandu bo yi'gana mayi'gi'yo manogau.
2.4: Kwo panga nyo, babe kabaayi'gana alwawa ai'nja kwapenda asengo babe na bana babe,
2.5: babe bandu babawesa kwitawala bene, apeleteu, babatunja wiso misengo yabe, anogau, babaayu'wa asengo babe, li'nga mundu ywoywoti aakane kulisalawa liyi'gi'yo lya Nnu'ngu'.
2.6: Nyinyonyo waakong'ondeli na ansembe babe bandu babawesa kwitawala bene.
2.7: Nawenga mumakowe gako goti upalikwa ulaye iyendo nogau li'nga uyigilwe, na kwo laya ukakape na isima mumayi'gano gako,
2.8: no longela wisowiso pangali bi'ki'lwa lukoolo, li'nga babakutaukya bapate isika. Kwa nyo baapanga ntu'pu' likowe lyo longela lyalibile lyakau kwitu twenga.
2.9: Waayi'gane abanda baayu'we angwana babe mumakowe goti, baapulaise na kanebataukane nabo,
2.10: wala kanebayibe, ila balaye panga au'bi'li'ka, li'nga lyengo lyabe lyoti lyaapange bi'ngi' bautilwe na mayi'gano ga Nnu'ngu' Nkosopoli witu.
2.11: Kwa mwanjaa ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu' yaileta ukosopoli kwa bandu boti ibonekine.
2.12: Ngu'ngu' yo ituyi'gana kana ulau na maminyikio ga dunia, li'nga tupate tama mumaisa ga kwitawala, ga aki, na mapeleteu munsimu wu'no,
2.13: ku'no katulolela lisu'ba lyaliyaliwite lyatuliu'bi'lya, nsimu wawapitya utukupu wa Nnu'ngu' Nku'lu' na Nkosopoli witu Yesu Kilisitu.
2.14: Ywembe aipiyite kwa kitumbu situ li'nga atuli'pi leni lya masambi goti na kutupanga twabandu apeleteu bake, bandu bene kilu'lu' so panga makowe manogau.
2.15: Bai, wayi'gane mayi'gi'yo ga, wakong'ondeli bandu na wakalipi kwa makakala goti. Mundu ywoywoti kaneakusalawe.

3.1: Waaku'mbu'ki'ye bandu panga bapalikwa kwaisimu na kwayu'wa alongosi babaatawala. Mwibi'ke wiso kwa kila lyengo linogau.
3.2: Waabakiye kanebantukane mundu ywoywoti, kanebayu'mane, ila babe anogau na atu'lya kwa bandu boti.
3.3: Kwa mwanjaa twenga twabene nsimu nsi'si' twaabile twaalalo, twakingayu'wa, twaatikongelwa, na twaatabilwe na maminyikio ga kila sampuli. Twaatami muulau na bwigu, twaatisukilwa na twenga ngatusukwana twabene na bene.
3.4: Lakini unogau na upendo wa Nnu'ngu', Nkosopoli witu pawaumukulilwe,
3.5: aatukosopoli lili kwo pi'tya makowe gitu ga aki gatupangite, ila kwa kiya sake. Aatukosopoli kwa kutupeletea kwo belekwa kai' na kutupanga twayambi' kwa ndi'la ya Loo Mpeleteu.
3.6: Nnu'ngu' atuulukiye Loo wake pangali li'ngi'lya kwo pi'tya Yesu Kilisitu Nkosopoli witu,
3.7: li'nga tubalangilwe aki kwa ngu'ngu' yake, tupate panga twaalisi ku'no katuu'bi'lya tubile na ukoto wangayomoka.
3.8: Mayi'gi'yo gano ga kakape. Nikupala wenga ugakong'ondeli makowe ga, li'nga boti babamwu'bi'lya Nnu'ngu' babe na kilu'lu' so panga makowe manogau. Mayi'gi'yo go manogau kai' gakumpwaika kila mundu.
3.9: Lakini utame kuutalu na nnomo au mataukyano ga kilogeloge bu'kana na salya au ngolo. Ago goti gapwaikali, kai', gabule bai.
3.10: Mundu ywayu'mania bandu, unkwi'li'ke mala yimo au ata mala ibi'li', mana aakana kukuyu'wa ulekane nakwe mpamo.
3.11: Utangite panga mundu kati ywo aulei ukakape, na sambi yake impwatya mwene. Mayi'gi'yo ga kuundi'la
3.12: Nibini yenda tama kukilambo sa Nikapoli kwa wu'no nsimu woti wa mbepo, lakini naalu'a kuntuma Atema au Tikiko kasako, mana aikite akwo wenga waabini isa Nikapoli li'nga tukwembane.
3.13: Ukondamie kunnyangatia Zena yu'lu' mundu wa salya, na Apolo. Waapei ili'be yoti yaipalikwa mumwanja wabe.
3.14: Ayi' nga ndi'la yaipalikwa bandu bitu baiyi'gane panga makowe manogau, li'nga kwayangatiya apaali mumakowe go imukya. Kwo panga nyo, maisa gabe gaapangali gabule.
3.15: Bandu boti bababile nanenga pano bendakusalimia. Tumbwelelo, na wenga kai' wasalimie aumini boti babatupenda muimani. Ngu'ngu' ya Nnu'ngu' ibe pamope na mwenga.

1.1: Nenga na Pauli na ntabilwe kwa kitumbu sa Kilisitu Yesu, na Timoteo nnongo witu, tukuandikya wa Filemoni waupendilwe, wampanga kasi nnyitu,
1.2: na kwa dada bitu ywapendilwe Afia, kwa Akilipa ywatuyangatiyana nakwe ku'mbwana ngondo ya imani, na kwa likanisa lyalikwembana panyumba yako.
1.3: Ngu'ngu' na amani bu'ka kwa Nnu'ngu' Tati' bitu na kwa Bwana Yesu Kilisitu ibe pamope na mwenga. Upendo na imani ya Filemoni
1.5: kwa mwanjaa niyu'wa abali ya imani yako kwa Bwana Yesu na upendo wako kwa aumini boti.
1.6: Nilu'ba Nnu'ngu' li'nga imani yaubile nayo wenga na twenga ikuyangatiye tanga muno balaka yoti yatupata nkati ya Kilisitu.
1.7: Wannongo wangu', utenipulaisa na kunikangamaya muno, kwa mwanjaa myoyo ya bandu ba Nnu'ngu' ipatike makakala gayambi' bu'kana na upendo wako. Lilu'bo kwa Onesimo
1.8: Kwa nyo, pamope no panga kwa Kilisitu nilu'e wesa baa na amuli yo lagya galu' gaupalikwa kugapanga,
1.9: lakini bu'kana na upendo nikulu'ba upange nya. Nenga na Pauli nambi'yambi' nanng'oi, kai' na ntabilwe kwa kitumbu sa Kilisitu Yesu,
1.10: nikulu'ba kwa kitumbu sa mwana wangu' Onesimo, ywanampatike muimani panaabile muutabilwe.
1.11: Patumbu ywembe aakupwaikeli, lakini nambi'yambi' akupwaika wenga na nenga kai'.
1.12: Pamope no panga nitekumpenda kwa mwoyo wangu' woti, lakini nambi'yambi' ninki'li'bu'ya kasako.
1.13: Naapendile ayendeli tama nanenga pano li'nga akamwe lipala lyako lya kuniyangatiya kwa nsimu wu'no wanibile muutabilwe kwa kitumbu sa Abali Inannoga.
1.14: Lakini naapangali likowe lyolyoti pangali kuliyi'ki'tya wenga, li'nga unogau wowoti waupanga kaneube wa kukuli'ndi'ndya, ila kwo penda wamwene.
1.15: Pi'ngi' si'no nga kitumbu so talukana nakwe Onesimo kwa masu'ba masene bai, li'nga upate baa nakwe kai' milele.
1.16: Nambi'yambi' kati mmanda bai lili, ila ywembe ywangama pi'ta mmanda, kati nnongo ywapendilwe kwangu' na kasako muno. Kai', ywembe kati mmanda bai lili, ila kai' kati yumo ywitu twatubile kwa Bwana.
1.17: Bai, manaitei utangite panga nenga nannyino muimani, umpoki Onesimo kati mu'lu' mwaulu'e kunipokya nenga namwene.
1.18: Mana aakukosile likowe lyolyoti au unnonga kili'be sosoti, unilonge nenga.
1.19: Nsisingwa wu'no wa kuundi'la niandika nenga na Pauli kwa luboko lwangu', naalu'a kuli'pa. Kai' ntu'pu' kitumbu sa kukuku'mbu'ki'ya panga, kasangu' wendalongelwa bu'kana na ukoto wako.
1.20: Tumbwe lelo wannongo wangu', nikulu'ba unipangi likowe li'no kwa kitumbu sa Bwana Yesu. Uupulaise mwoyo wangu', kati wannongo kwa Kilisitu.
1.21: Panikuandikya balua yi'no niu'bi'lya panga kwo yu'wa kwako ulu'a yi'ki'tyana na nenga, na nitangite panga ulu'a gapanga ata pi'ta gano ganikulu'ba.
1.22: Pamope na ago, unibi'ki wiso pandu po ikya, kwa mwanjaa niu'bi'lya panga kwo bi'ki'lya kwinu, Nnu'ngu' alu'a nibuyanganiya kasinu. Salamu ya kuundi'la
1.23: Epafila ywatabilwe pamope na nenga kwa kitumbu sa Kilisitu Yesu, endakusalimia.
1.24: Nyinyonyo Maluko, Alisitaliko, Dema na Luka apangakasi ayangu' bendakusalimia.
1.25: Ngu'ngu' ya Bwana Yesu Kilisitu ibe pamope na mwenga.
